## дәӢе®һжәҗеұӮзә§

| еұӮ | з”ЁйҖ” | дәӢе®һжәҗ | и§„еҲҷ |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Working | еҪ“еүҚдјҡиҜқеҲӨж–ӯ | chat session / IDE metadata | дёҚиҗҪзӣҳеҚідёҚдҪңдёәй•ҝжңҹдәӢе®һ |
| Persistent Review | з ”з©¶гҖҒеӨҚзӣҳгҖҒиҜ„дј°иҜҒжҚ® | `Workspace/DocsAI/Reviews/` | еҸӘиғҪдҪңдёәеҺҶеҸІеҲҶжһҗжҲ–иҜҒжҚ®жқҘжәҗ |
| Semantic Baseline | еҪ“еүҚи§„еҲҷгҖҒжөҒзЁӢе’Ңи§„ж ј | `Workspace/SystemAgent/`гҖҒ`SlimeAI/DocsAI/` | й•ҝжңҹи§„еҲҷеҝ…йЎ»иҗҪеңЁиҝҷдёҖеұӮ |
| Event Log | еҺҶеҸІж“ҚдҪңи®°еҪ• | git logгҖҒе·Іе®ҢжҲҗ SDD | еҸӘиҝҪеҠ е’ҢиҝҪжәҜпјҢдёҚдҪңдёәеҪ“еүҚе…ҘеҸЈ |

еҶҷе…Ҙж–°ж–ҮжЎЈеүҚе…ҲеҲӨж–ӯеҶ…е®№еұһдәҺе“ӘдёҖеұӮпјӣдёҚеҫ—жҠҠ Persistent Review еҪ“дҪң Semantic Baseline дҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ

## Schema migration

`Registry/manifest.yaml` schema_version `3` иЎЁзӨә SystemAgent е·Ід»Һ 13 зӣ®еҪ•йҮҚжһ„дёә Routes/Actors/Rules/Tools/Registry дә”зӣ®еҪ•гҖӮ

`Registry/skills.yaml` schema_version `3` еҸӘдҪңз”ЁдәҺ skill catalogгҖӮv3 еӯ—ж®өжҲҗзҶҹеәҰпјҡ`function_category` з”ЁдәҺе·Ізәіе…Ҙ rubric иҰҶзӣ–зҡ„ SystemAgent-owned й«ҳйЈҺйҷ©е…ҘеҸЈгҖҒж”¶е°ҫгҖҒз»ҙжҠӨжҲ– wrapper skillпјҢжңӘзәіе…ҘиҰҶзӣ–ж—¶еҸҜзңҒз•Ҙпјӣ`spec`гҖҒ`last_spec`гҖҒ`last_category` еұһдәҺ Behavioral Spec / Category Rubric pilot жҲ–дәәе·ҘиҜ„е®Ўи®°еҪ•пјӣ`last_static` жҳҜ Static Lint еҸҜйҖүдәәе·Ҙеҝ«з…§гҖӮйқһ pilot skill зҡ„з©ә `spec` / `last_*` дёҚи§ҶдёәеӨұиҙҘгҖӮ

## Rule action semantics

| action | еҗ«д№ү | иҫ№з•Ң |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `read_reference` | иҜ»еҸ–еҸӮиҖғиө„ж–ҷгҖҒеҺҶеҸІеҲҶжһҗжҲ–еӨ–йғЁиө„жәҗ | дёҚжҠҠиҜ»еҸ–з»“жһңзӣҙжҺҘеҪ“дҪңеҪ“еүҚдәӢе®һжәҗ |
| `edit_source` | дҝ®ж”№жҳҺзЎ®з»ҙжҠӨжәҗ | еҸӘеҶҷ `Workspace/SystemAgent/`гҖҒ`.ai-config/`гҖҒSDD жҲ–з”ЁжҲ·жҺҲжқғзҡ„жәҗж–Үд»¶ |
| `sync_generated` | з”ұи„ҡжң¬з”ҹжҲҗеүҜжң¬ | дёҚжүӢеҶҷ `.claude/.codex/.devin/.trae` skill еүҜжң¬жҲ– rule еүҜжң¬ |
| `advisory_check` | hookгҖҒreview жҲ– lint з»ҷеҮәжҸҗйҶ’ | й»ҳи®ӨдёҚиҮӘеҠЁж”№еҶҷж–Үд»¶пјҢдёҚжӣҝд»Јдәәе·ҘжҲ– SDD еҶізӯ– |

## зҰҒжӯў

- дёҚдҝқз•ҷеҗҢдёҖжӯЈж–Үзҡ„еҸҢдәӢе®һжәҗгҖӮ
- дёҚжҠҠе·Іе®ҢжҲҗ SDD зҡ„еҺҶеҸІи®°еҪ•еҪ“й•ҝжңҹе…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
- дёҚеңЁ README еӨҚеҲ¶жүҖжңү route/actor/rule жӯЈж–ҮгҖӮ

SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/sdds/021-SDD-0031-data-runtime-generic-slot-hard-cutover/design/main.md\n@@\n # Data Runtime Generic Slot Hard Cutover\n \n ## Goal\n \n-иҜҙжҳҺиҝҷдёӘ SDD иҰҒи§ЈеҶізҡ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ\n+жҠҠ Runtime Data дё»й“ҫи·Ҝд»Һ `object?` еҖјж§ҪеҲҮеҲ°жіӣеһӢж§ҪдҪҚпјҢйҷҚдҪҺ typed `DataKey<T>` иҜ»еҶҷгҖҒmodifierгҖҒcomputed cache зҡ„иЈ…з®ұжӢҶз®ұе’ҢеҠЁжҖҒиҪ¬жҚўйЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ\n+\n+жң¬иҪ®зӣ®ж Үпјҡ\n+\n+- `Data.Set<T>(DataKey<T>, T)` / `Data.Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` еҜ№йқһ computed еӯ—ж®өзӣҙжҺҘе‘Ҫдёӯ `DataSlot<T>`гҖӮ\n+- ж•°еҖј modifier зҡ„еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖҒжңүж•ҲеҖје’Ң slot cache д»Ҙ `T` дҝқеӯҳпјҢдёҚеҶҚйҖҡиҝҮ `object? -> double -> object?` дҪңдёәеӯҳеӮЁдё»й“ҫи·ҜгҖӮ\n+- computed д»Қе…је®№зҺ°жңү resolver жіЁеҶҢиЎЁпјҢдҪҶ runtime cache иҝӣе…Ҙ typed `DataSlot<T>`пјӣresolver иҝ”еӣһеҖјеҸӘеңЁиҫ№з•ҢиҪ¬жҚўдёҖж¬ЎгҖӮ\n+- `SetUntyped`гҖҒsnapshot loaderгҖҒdebug/TestSystem dump жҡӮз•ҷ Data иҫ№з•ҢпјҢе№¶жҳҺзЎ®ж ҮжіЁиЈ…з®ұ/GC йЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ\n+- еҸӘдҝ®ж”№ Data owner иҢғеӣҙпјӣEventгҖҒFeatureгҖҒAbilityгҖҒObjectPoolгҖҒTargetSelectorгҖҒLogger дёҚеңЁжң¬ SDD ж”№гҖӮ\n \n ## Context\n \n-еҲ—еҮәеҝ…иҰҒдёҠдёӢж–ҮгҖҒзҺ°жңүдәӢе®һжәҗе’ҢзәҰжқҹгҖӮ\n+### Context Boundary: дёҚж¶үеҸҠжёёжҲҸд»“е’Ң submoduleгҖӮ\n+- Workflow: `NewFeature` / large SDD refactorгҖӮ\n+- Owner skills: `ecs-data`гҖҒ`data-authoring`пјӣе®һзҺ°еҸӘи§ҰеҸҠ Data runtimeпјҢдёҚж”№ DataOS schema / `.../и®ҫи®Ў/01-DataиҝҗиЎҢж—¶objectеҺ»йҷӨи®ҫи®Ў.md`\n+  - `.../й—®йўҳ/01-DataSlotз»“жһ„еҢ–иЈ…з®ұ.md`\n+  - `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/*.cs`\n+  - `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/*.cs`\n+\n+### Problem Shape\n+\n+еҪ“еүҚ Data е·Іе®ҢжҲҗ descriptor-first / snapshot-first / generated `DataKey<T>`пјҢдҪҶ storage д»ҚеңЁзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„дёўеӨұжіӣеһӢдҝЎжҒҜпјҡ\n+\n+- `DataRuntimeStorage.TrySet<T>` и°ғ `TrySetUntyped(key.StableKey, value, ...)`пјҢеҖјзұ»еһӢеҶҷе…Ҙдјҡиҝӣе…Ҙ `object?` еҸӮж•°гҖӮ\n+- `DataSlot.Value object?` дҝқеӯҳжүҖжңүиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ\n+- `DataSlot.GetEffectiveValue(): object?` е’Ң `DataValueConverter.ConvertForRead(object?)` и®©иҜ»еҸ–з»§з»ӯиө°еҠЁжҖҒиҪ¬жҚўгҖӮ\n+- `DataSlot.ApplyModifiers(object?)` жҠҠж•°еҖјжӢҶжҲҗ `double` еҗҺеҶҚжҢү descriptor иЈ…еӣһ `object`гҖӮ\n+- `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>` дҝқеӯҳ computed иҫ“еҮәгҖӮ\n+- `DataChangeRecord` е’Ң `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged` д»ҚжүҝиҪҪ `object?` old/newпјҢдҪҶиҝҷжҳҜ Event/diagnostic иҫ№з•ҢпјҢжң¬иҪ®дёҚејәиЎҢж”№ Event еҚҸи®®гҖӮ\n+\n+### Main Risks\n+\n+- **иҢғеӣҙиҶЁиғҖ**пјҡеҰӮжһңжң¬иҪ®еҗҢж—¶еҲ йҷӨ `PropertyChanged(object?)` жҲ–ж”№ Feature/Ability contextпјҢдјҡи·ЁеҲ° Event/Capability SDDгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡеҸӘеңЁ Data runtime еҶ…йғЁ typed еҢ–пјҢе…¬е…ұдәӢд»¶еҚҸи®®жҡӮз•ҷгҖӮ\n+- **loader е…је®№иҫ№з•Ң**пјҡsnapshot loader еҪ“еүҚеҸӘиғҪдј  untyped еҖјгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡдҝқз•ҷ `SetUntyped`пјҢдҪҶи®©е®ғеҸӘдҪңдёәиҫ№з•Ң APIпјҢеҶ…йғЁиҪ¬жҚўеҗҺеҶҷ typed slotгҖӮ\n+- **computed resolver иҝҒз§»жҲҗжң¬**пјҡдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§жҠҠжүҖжңү resolver ж”№жҲҗ `IDataComputeResolver<T>` дјҡзүөеҠЁ Feature test е’Ң registryгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡжң¬иҪ®е…Ҳи®© computed slot/cache typed еҢ–пјҢresolver иҝ”еӣһ object еҸӘдҪңдёә registry иҫ№з•Ңпјӣе®Ңж•ҙ `IDataComputeResolver<T>` еҸҜд»ҘеҗҺз»ӯзӢ¬з«Ӣж”¶еҸЈгҖӮ\n+- **жөӢиҜ•иҜҒжҚ®дёҚи¶і**пјҡDataOS Godot scene еҸӘиғҪиҜҒжҳҺиЎҢдёәпјҢдёҚзӣҙжҺҘиҜҒжҳҺж— иЈ…з®ұгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡж–°еўһ runtime contract жөӢиҜ•жЈҖжҹҘ slot еҪўжҖҒе’Ң typed API дёҚиө° untyped counterпјҢеҶҚз”Ё grep gate жЈҖжҹҘдё»й“ҫи·ҜгҖӮ\n \n ## Design\n \n-жҸҸиҝ°жңҖз»Ҳи®ҫи®ЎгҖҒеҸ–иҲҚе’ҢеҪұе“ҚиҢғеӣҙгҖӮ\n+### Options\n+\n+1. **жҺЁиҚҗпјҡжёҗиҝӣ hard cutover еҲ° `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot`**\n+   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡз¬ҰеҗҲйЎ№зӣ®зә§иЈҒеҶіпјӣдҝқз•ҷ dictionary з®ЎзҗҶиҫ№з•ҢпјӣиЎҢдёәйЈҺйҷ©еҸҜз”ұзҺ°жңү DataRuntimeTestScene иҰҶзӣ–гҖӮ\n+   - д»Јд»·пјҡйңҖиҰҒеңЁ `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` еҶ…жӢҶеҮә typed slotгҖҒtyped converter/policy е’Ң computed typed helperгҖӮ\n+\n+2. **дёҖж¬ЎжҖ§е®Ңе…Ёж”№ `IDataComputeResolver<T>`гҖҒtyped `DataChanged<T>` е’Ң public untyped еҲ йҷӨ**\n+   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡжӣҙжҺҘиҝ‘йЎ№зӣ®зә§жңҖз»ҲеҪўжҖҒгҖӮ\n+   - д»Јд»·пјҡдјҡи·Ё Event/Feature/Ability/TestSystem и°ғз”ЁзӮ№пјҢиҝқиғҢвҖңе…Ҳж”№ dataпјҢе…¶д»–дёҚеҠЁвҖқгҖӮ\n+\n+3. **еҸӘеҠ жіЁйҮҠе’Ң grep gateпјҢдёҚйҮҚжһ„ storage**\n+   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡдҪҺйЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ\n+   - д»Јд»·пјҡдёҚиғҪи§ЈеҶі `DataSlot.Value object?` е’Ң `Data.Get/Set<T>` зғӯи·Ҝеҫ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ\n+\n+### Recommendation\n+\n+йҮҮз”Ёж–№жЎҲ 1гҖӮжң¬ SDD еҒҡ Data еҶ…йғЁзЎ¬еҲҮпјҡ`DataSlot<T>` еӯҳеӮЁдёҡеҠЎеҖјпјҢ`IDataSlot` еҸӘжҡҙйңІ metadataгҖҒmodifier ж“ҚдҪңгҖҒdiagnostic dump е’Ңиҫ№з•ҢеҶҷе…Ҙпјӣ`Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>` дҪңдёәи·Ёзұ»еһӢз®ЎзҗҶиҫ№з•ҢеҸҜдҝқз•ҷгҖӮе…¬е…ұ Event payloadгҖҒFeature/Ability context е’Ң TestSystem UI еұ•зӨәз•ҷз»ҷеҗҺз»ӯ SDDгҖӮ\n+\n+### Target Shape\n+\n+- `IDataSlot`\n+  - жҡҙйңІ `DataDefinition Definition`гҖҒ`Type ValueClrType`гҖҒ`bool HasValue`гҖӮ\n+  - жҸҗдҫӣ `GetEffectiveValueAsObjectForDiagnostics()` е’Ң `GetStoredValueAsObjectForDiagnostics()`пјҢеҸӘдҫӣдәӢд»¶/diagnostic/dump иҫ№з•ҢдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ\n+  - дёҚжҸҗдҫӣ `object? Value` дҪңдёәдёҡеҠЎеҖје…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ\n+- `DataSlot<T>`\n+  - дҝқеӯҳ `T?` жҲ– `T` + `HasValue`гҖӮ\n+  - `GetEffectiveValue()` иҝ”еӣһ `T`гҖӮ\n+  - `SetValue(T value)` з”Ё `EqualityComparer<T>.Default` еҲӨзӯүгҖӮ\n+  - `TrySetFromBoundary(object? raw, ...)` е…Ҳиө° converter/policyпјҢеҶҚеҶҷ typed valueгҖӮ\n+- `NumericDataSlot<T>`\n+  - еҸӘз”ЁдәҺ `int/float/double` descriptorгҖӮ\n+  - modifier з®ЎзәҝеҶ…йғЁз”Ё double и®Ўз®—пјҢдҪҶеҶҷеӣһ typed `T`пјҢslot/cache дёҚдҝқеӯҳ `object?`гҖӮ\n+- `ComputedDataSlot<T>`\n+  - зј“еӯҳ `T _cachedValue` + dirty зҠ¶жҖҒгҖӮ\n+  - resolver иҫ№з•Ңиҝ”еӣһ object еҗҺз«ӢеҚіиҪ¬жҚўжҲҗ `T`гҖӮ\n+- `DataRuntimeStorage`\n+  - `_slots: Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>`гҖӮ\n+  - `TrySet<T>(DataKey<T>, T, ...)` зӣҙжҺҘи§Јжһҗ definition -> `DataSlot<T>` -> typed policy -> `SetValue(T)`гҖӮ\n+  - `Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` зӣҙжҺҘеҸ– `DataSlot<T>.GetEffectiveValue()`гҖӮ\n+  - `SetUntyped` дҝқз•ҷдёә loader/debug/TestSystem иҫ№з•ҢпјҢжіЁйҮҠж ҮжҳҺеҖјзұ»еһӢдјҡиЈ…з®ұпјҢдёҚжҺЁиҚҗдёҡеҠЎи°ғз”ЁгҖӮ\n+\n+### Must Confirm\n+\n+- noneгҖӮжң¬иҪ®з”ЁжҲ·е·ІжҳҺзЎ®вҖңжҢүз…§ Data зҡ„ж–№жЎҲз”ҹжҲҗ SDD е№¶жү§иЎҢпјҢе…Ҳж”№ dataпјҢе…¶д»–дёҚеҠЁвҖқгҖӮдёәйҒҝе…Қйҳ»еЎһжү§иЎҢпјҢжң¬ SDD йҮҮз”Ё Data-only й»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫжҺЁиҝӣгҖӮ\n+\n+### Should Confirm\n+\n+- еҗҺз»ӯжҳҜеҗҰеҲӣе»әзӢ¬з«Ӣ Event SDD еҲ йҷӨ `PropertyChanged(object?)` е’Ң Event dynamic objectгҖӮ\n+- еҗҺз»ӯжҳҜеҗҰеҲӣе»әзӢ¬з«Ӣ Feature/Ability SDD еҲ йҷӨ `ActivationData/ExecuteResult object?`гҖӮ\n+\n+### Defaults I Will Use\n+\n+- `SetUntyped`гҖҒ`TrySetUntyped` е’Ң `GetAll` жҡӮз•ҷ Data boundaryпјҢдёҚдҪңдёәдёҡеҠЎзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ\n+- `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged(string, object?, object?)` жң¬иҪ®дёҚж”№пјҢеҸӘд»Һ typed slot еңЁйҖҡзҹҘиҫ№з•Ңз”ҹжҲҗ old/new objectгҖӮ\n+- `IDataComputeResolver` е…¬е…ұжҺҘеҸЈжң¬иҪ®дёҚж”№пјҢcomputed slot еҶ…йғЁ typed cache е…ҲиҗҪең°гҖӮ\n+- дёҚж”№ DataOS schemaгҖҒsnapshotгҖҒgenerated DataKeyпјҢйҷӨйқһзј–иҜ‘жҲ–жөӢиҜ•жҡҙйңІеҝ…йЎ»еҗҢжӯҘгҖӮ\n+- дёҚж”№жёёжҲҸд»“е’Ң BrotatoLike submoduleгҖӮ\n+\n+### Not Recommended\n+\n+- дёҚеј•е…Ҙ `DataRuntimeValue` еӨҡеӯ—ж®ө unionгҖӮйЎ№зӣ®зә§и®ҫи®Ўе·ІиЈҒеҶіиҜҘж–№жЎҲеҶ—дҪҷпјҢдјҡеӨҚеҲ¶ descriptor зұ»еһӢдҝЎжҒҜе№¶еҲ¶йҖ ж–°еҠЁжҖҒеҲҶеҸ‘еұӮгҖӮ\n+- дёҚз”ЁеӨҡеӯ—е…ё `Dictionary<string, float/int/bool>` дҪңдёәжң¬иҪ®й»ҳи®Өж–№жЎҲпјӣе®ғж— жі•иҮӘз„¶иҰҶзӣ– ResourceRefгҖҒstring arrayгҖҒmodifier listгҖҒcomputed е’Ң diagnosticsгҖӮ\n+- дёҚеңЁжң¬ SDD еҲ йҷӨ Event/Feature object APIпјӣйӮЈдјҡи·ЁеҮәз”ЁжҲ·жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„ Data-only иҢғеӣҙгҖӮ\n \n ## Verification\n \n-еҲ—еҮәе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺеҝ…йЎ»жү§иЎҢзҡ„йӘҢиҜҒгҖӮ\n+### Standard Answer\n+\n+- expectedInputs: Data descriptor definitions for Value`; modifier/computed behavior regresses; DataOS validator or build fails.\n+- artifactPath: `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataRuntimeTestScene.cs` plus command outputs recorded in `progress.md`.\n+\n+### Commands\n+\n+```bash\n+dotnet build Brotato_my.csproj --no-restore /clp:ErrorsOnly\n+bash Data/DataOS/Tools/validate-dataos.sh Data/DataOS/Authoring/slimeainew.authoring.db\n+python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate SDD-0031\n+python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all\n+bash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh\n+bash Workspace/SystemAgent/Tools/skill-test/lint.sh static all --no-fail --summary-only\n+rg -n \"class DataSlot\\\\b|object\\\\? changes CLI or workflow behavior.\n+- **Reason**: жң¬ SDD ж”№еҸҳ Runtime Data typed hot pathгҖҒmodifierгҖҒcomputed cache е’Ң diagnostics иҫ№з•ҢгҖӮ\n \n ## Scenarios\n \n-### Scenario: Restore task context from an SDD\n+### Scenario: Typed DataKey write uses typed slot\n \n-Given an SDD exists with README, tasks, progress, design and bdd files\n-When an AI or user opens the SDD README\n-Then they can identify status, scope, affected areas, reading order and next action\n+Given a catalog contains `Attribute.BaseHp` as a float descriptor\n+When runtime code calls `Data.Set(new DataKey<float>(\"Attribute.BaseHp\"), 20f)`\n+Then `DataRuntimeStorage` writes a `DataSlot<float>`\n+And the typed set path does not call the untyped boundary writer\n+And `Data.Get(new DataKey<float>(\"Attribute.BaseHp\"))` returns `20f`\n+\n+### Scenario: Untyped loader boundary still converts with diagnostics\n+\n+Given a catalog contains float, string array, modifier list and object ref descriptors\n+When snapshot loader or debug code calls `SetUntyped`\n+Then values are converted at the boundary and stored in typed slots\n+And wrong CLR types still return structured `DataWriteError`\n+And the boundary API is documented as not for gameplay hot path\n+\n+### Scenario: Numeric modifiers keep typed effective values\n+\n+Given a float descriptor allows numeric modifiers\n+When Additive, Multiplicative, FinalAdditive, Override and Cap modifiers are applied\n+Then the effective value matches the existing modifier formula\n+And the slot stores and returns typed `float`\n+And dependent computed descriptors are marked dirty after modifier changes\n+\n+### Scenario: Computed values cache in typed storage\n+\n+Given a computed float descriptor depends on runtime float inputs\n+When `Data.Get<float>` reads the computed key twice without dependency changes\n+Then the resolver runs once\n+And the cached value is stored as typed `float`\n+When a dependency changes\n+Then the computed slot is marked dirty and recomputes on next read\n*** Update File:       "unified_diff": "@@ -16,4 +16,6 @@\n \n-Data Runtime Generic Slot Hard Cutover\n+жң¬ SDD жү§иЎҢ `design/ECSжЎҶжһ¶дјҳеҢ–/1.жӢҶз®ұиЈ…з®ұ+GCдјҳеҢ–/и®ҫи®Ў/01-DataиҝҗиЎҢж—¶objectеҺ»йҷӨи®ҫи®Ў.md` зҡ„ Data-only еҲҮзүҮпјҡжҠҠ Runtime Data typed `DataKey<T>` иҜ»еҶҷгҖҒmodifier е’Ң computed дё»й“ҫи·Ҝд»Һ `DataSlot.Value object?` еҲҮеҲ° `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot`гҖӮ\n \n+жң¬иҪ®еҸӘж”№ Data runtimeгҖҒData testsгҖҒDocsAI Runtime/Data е’Ң `ecs-data` skill жәҗгҖӮEventBus dynamic objectгҖҒFeature / Ability typed execution contextгҖҒObjectPoolгҖҒTargetSelectorгҖҒLogger д»ҚжҢүйЎ№зӣ® roadmap еҗҺз»ӯ SDD еӨ„зҗҶпјҢжң¬иҪ®дёҚж”№гҖӮ\n+\n ## Reading Order\n@@ -21,6 +23,8 @@\n 1. `design/INDEX.md` вҖ” и®ҫи®Ўж–ҮжЎЈеҲ—иЎЁе’Ңдё»и®ҫи®Ўе…ҘеҸЈ\n-2. `tasks.md` вҖ” еҪ“еүҚд»»еҠЎжӢҶеҲҶ\n-3. `progress.md` вҖ” жңҖиҝ‘з»“и®әе’ҢжҒўеӨҚзӮ№\n-4. `bdd.md` вҖ” иЎҢдёәеңәжҷҜжҲ–дёҚйҖӮз”ЁиҜҙжҳҺ\n-5. `notes.md` вҖ” еҸӮиҖғдёҺејҖж”ҫй—®йўҳ\n+2. `design/main.md` вҖ” жң¬иҪ® DeepThinkгҖҒиЈҒеҶігҖҒиҢғеӣҙе’Ңе®һзҺ°ж–№жЎҲ\n+3. `../../design/ECSжЎҶжһ¶дјҳеҢ–/1.жӢҶз®ұиЈ…з®ұ+GCдјҳеҢ–/и®ҫи®Ў/01-DataиҝҗиЎҢж—¶objectеҺ»йҷӨи®ҫи®Ў.md` вҖ” йЎ№зӣ®зә§ Data ж–№жЎҲжқҘжәҗ\n+4. `tasks.md` вҖ” еҪ“еүҚд»»еҠЎжӢҶеҲҶ\n+5. `bdd.md` вҖ” Data runtime иЎҢдёәйӘҢж”¶\n+6. `progress.md` вҖ” жңҖиҝ‘з»“и®әе’ҢжҒўеӨҚзӮ№\n+7. `notes.md` вҖ” еҸӮиҖғдёҺејҖж”ҫй—®йўҳ\n \n@@ -29,4 +33,4 @@\n - **Current Task**: T1.1\n-- **Last Conclusion**: SDD-0031 е·ІеҲӣе»әпјҢз”ЁдәҺи·ҹиёӘ Data Runtime Generic Slot Hard CutoverгҖӮ\n-- **Next Action**: йҳ…иҜ» READMEгҖҒdesign/INDEX.md е’Ң tasks.md еҗҺз»§з»ӯжҺЁиҝӣгҖӮ\n+- **Last Conclusion**: SDD-0031 е·ІеҗҜеҠЁпјӣиҢғеӣҙеҶ»з»“дёә Data-only generic slot hard cutoverпјҢtyped `DataKey<T>` зғӯи·Ҝеҫ„иҰҒз»•ејҖ `object?` slotпјҢloader/debug/TestSystem зҡ„ untyped иҫ“е…ҘжҡӮз•ҷиҫ№з•ҢгҖӮ\n+- **Next Action**: е®ҢжҲҗ T1.1 readiness validate еҗҺе…ҲеҶҷ DataRuntimeTestScene RED жөӢиҜ•пјҢеҶҚж”№ `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/`гҖӮ\n - **Open Blockers**: none\n",

    "/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI/SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/sdds/021-SDD-0031-data-runtime-generic-slot-hard-cutover/bdd.md": {
      "type": "update",
      "unified_diff": "@@ -5,3 +5,3 @@\n - **Required**: true\n-- **Reason**: This SDD changes CLI or workflow behavior.\n+- **Reason**: жң¬ SDD ж”№еҸҳ Runtime Data typed hot pathгҖҒmodifierгҖҒcomputed cache е’Ң diagnostics иҫ№з•ҢгҖӮ\n \n@@ -9,6 +9,33 @@\n \n-### Scenario: Restore task context from an SDD\n+### Scenario: Typed DataKey write uses typed slot\n \n-Given an SDD exists with README, tasks, progress, design and bdd files\n-When an AI or user opens the SDD README\n-Then they can identify status, scope, affected areas, reading order and next action\n+Given a catalog contains `Attribute.BaseHp` as a float descriptor\n+When runtime code calls `Data.Set(new DataKey<float>(\"Attribute.BaseHp\"), 20f)`\n+Then `DataRuntimeStorage` writes a `DataSlot<float>`\n+And the typed set path does not call the untyped boundary writer\n+And `Data.Get(new DataKey<float>(\"Attribute.BaseHp\"))` returns `20f`\n+\n+### Scenario: Untyped loader boundary still converts with diagnostics\n+\n+Given a catalog contains float, string array, modifier list and object ref descriptors\n+When snapshot loader or debug code calls `SetUntyped`\n+Then values are converted at the boundary and stored in typed slots\n+And wrong CLR types still return structured `DataWriteError`\n+And the boundary API is documented as not for gameplay hot path\n+\n+### Scenario: Numeric modifiers keep typed effective values\n+\n+Given a float descriptor allows numeric modifiers\n+When Additive, Multiplicative, FinalAdditive, Override and Cap modifiers are applied\n+Then the effective value matches the existing modifier formula\n+And the slot stores and returns typed `float`\n+And dependent computed descriptors are marked dirty after modifier changes\n+\n+### Scenario: Computed values cache in typed storage\n+\n+Given a computed float descriptor depends on runtime float inputs\n+When `Data.Get<float>` reads the computed key twice without dependency changes\n+Then the resolver runs once\n+And the cached value is stored as typed `float`\n+When a dependency changes\n+Then the computed slot is marked dirty and recomputes on next read\n",
      "move_path": null
    },

      "unified_diff": "@@ -4,3 +4,11 @@\n \n-иҜҙжҳҺиҝҷдёӘ SDD иҰҒи§ЈеҶізҡ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ\n+жҠҠ Runtime Data дё»й“ҫи·Ҝд»Һ `object?` еҖјж§ҪеҲҮеҲ°жіӣеһӢж§ҪдҪҚпјҢйҷҚдҪҺ typed `DataKey<T>` иҜ»еҶҷгҖҒmodifierгҖҒcomputed cache зҡ„иЈ…з®ұжӢҶз®ұе’ҢеҠЁжҖҒиҪ¬жҚўйЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ\n+\n+жң¬иҪ®зӣ®ж Үпјҡ\n+\n+- `Data.Set<T>(DataKey<T>, T)` / `Data.Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` еҜ№йқһ computed еӯ—ж®өзӣҙжҺҘе‘Ҫдёӯ `DataSlot<T>`гҖӮ\n+- ж•°еҖј modifier зҡ„еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖҒжңүж•ҲеҖје’Ң slot cache д»Ҙ `T` дҝқеӯҳпјҢдёҚеҶҚйҖҡиҝҮ `object? -> double -> object?` дҪңдёәеӯҳеӮЁдё»й“ҫи·ҜгҖӮ\n+- computed д»Қе…је®№зҺ°жңү resolver жіЁеҶҢиЎЁпјҢдҪҶ runtime cache иҝӣе…Ҙ typed `DataSlot<T>`пјӣresolver иҝ”еӣһеҖјеҸӘеңЁиҫ№з•ҢиҪ¬жҚўдёҖж¬ЎгҖӮ\n+- `SetUntyped`гҖҒsnapshot loaderгҖҒdebug/TestSystem dump жҡӮз•ҷ Data иҫ№з•ҢпјҢе№¶жҳҺзЎ®ж ҮжіЁиЈ…з®ұ/GC йЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ\n+- еҸӘдҝ®ж”№ Data owner иҢғеӣҙпјӣEventгҖҒFeatureгҖҒAbilityгҖҒObjectPoolгҖҒTargetSelectorгҖҒLogger дёҚеңЁжң¬ SDD ж”№гҖӮ\n \n@@ -8,3 +16,46 @@\n skills: `ecs-data`гҖҒ`data-authoring`пјӣе®һзҺ°еҸӘи§ҰеҸҠ Data runtimeпјҢдёҚж”№ DataOS schema / seed ж—¶дёҚиҝҗиЎҢз”ҹжҲҗеҷЁгҖӮ\n+- е·ІиҜ»дәӢе®һжәҗпјҡ\n+  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Routes/NewFeature.md`\n+ `.../и®ҫи®Ў/01-DataиҝҗиЎҢж—¶objectеҺ»йҷӨи®ҫи®Ў.md`\n+  - `.../й—®йўҳ/01-DataSlotз»“жһ„еҢ–иЈ…з®ұ.md`\n+  - `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/*.cs`\n+  - `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/*.cs`\n+\n+### Problem Shape\n+\n+еҪ“еүҚ Data е·Іе®ҢжҲҗ descriptor-first / snapshot-first / generated `DataKey<T>`пјҢдҪҶ storage д»ҚеңЁзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„дёўеӨұжіӣеһӢдҝЎжҒҜпјҡ\n+\n+- `DataRuntimeStorage.TrySet<T>` и°ғ `TrySetUntyped(key.StableKey, value, ...)`пјҢеҖјзұ»еһӢеҶҷе…Ҙдјҡиҝӣе…Ҙ `object?` еҸӮж•°гҖӮ\n+- `DataSlot.Value object?` дҝқеӯҳжүҖжңүиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ\n+- `DataSlot.GetEffectiveValue(): object?` е’Ң `DataValueConverter.ConvertForRead(object?)` и®©иҜ»еҸ–з»§з»ӯиө°еҠЁжҖҒиҪ¬жҚўгҖӮ\n+- `DataSlot.ApplyModifiers(object?)` жҠҠж•°еҖјжӢҶжҲҗ `double` еҗҺеҶҚжҢү descriptor иЈ…еӣһ `object`гҖӮ\n+- `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>` дҝқеӯҳ computed иҫ“еҮәгҖӮ\n+- `DataChangeRecord` е’Ң `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged` д»ҚжүҝиҪҪ `object?` old/newпјҢдҪҶиҝҷжҳҜ Event/diagnostic иҫ№з•ҢпјҢжң¬иҪ®дёҚејәиЎҢж”№ Event еҚҸи®®гҖӮ\n+\n+### Main Risks\n+\n+- **иҢғеӣҙиҶЁиғҖ**пјҡеҰӮжһңжң¬иҪ®еҗҢж—¶еҲ йҷӨ `PropertyChanged(object?)` жҲ–ж”№ Feature/Ability contextпјҢдјҡи·ЁеҲ° Event/Capability SDDгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡеҸӘеңЁ Data runtime еҶ…йғЁ typed еҢ–пјҢе…¬е…ұдәӢд»¶еҚҸи®®жҡӮз•ҷгҖӮ\n+- **loader е…је®№иҫ№з•Ң**пјҡsnapshot loader еҪ“еүҚеҸӘиғҪдј  untyped еҖјгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡдҝқз•ҷ `SetUntyped`пјҢдҪҶи®©е®ғеҸӘдҪңдёәиҫ№з•Ң APIпјҢеҶ…йғЁиҪ¬жҚўеҗҺеҶҷ typed slotгҖӮ\n+- **computed resolver иҝҒз§»жҲҗжң¬**пјҡдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§жҠҠжүҖжңү resolver ж”№жҲҗ `IDataComputeResolver<T>` дјҡзүөеҠЁ Feature test е’Ң registryгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡжң¬иҪ®е…Ҳи®© computed slot/cache typed еҢ–пјҢresolver иҝ”еӣһ object еҸӘдҪңдёә registry иҫ№з•Ңпјӣе®Ңж•ҙ `IDataComputeResolver<T>` еҸҜд»ҘеҗҺз»ӯзӢ¬з«Ӣж”¶еҸЈгҖӮ\n+- **жөӢиҜ•иҜҒжҚ®дёҚи¶і**пјҡDataOS Godot scene еҸӘиғҪиҜҒжҳҺиЎҢдёәпјҢдёҚзӣҙжҺҘиҜҒжҳҺж— иЈ…з®ұгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡж–°еўһ runtime contract жөӢиҜ•жЈҖжҹҘ slot еҪўжҖҒе’Ң typed API дёҚиө° untyped counterпјҢеҶҚз”Ё grep gate жЈҖжҹҘдё»й“ҫи·ҜгҖӮ\n \n@@ -12,6 +63,93 @@\n \n-жҸҸиҝ°жңҖз»Ҳи®ҫи®ЎгҖҒеҸ–иҲҚе’ҢеҪұе“ҚиҢғеӣҙгҖӮ\n+### Options\n+\n+1. **жҺЁиҚҗпјҡжёҗиҝӣ hard cutover еҲ° `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot`**\n+   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡз¬ҰеҗҲйЎ№зӣ®зә§иЈҒеҶіпјӣдҝқз•ҷ dictionary з®ЎзҗҶиҫ№з•ҢпјӣиЎҢдёәйЈҺйҷ©еҸҜз”ұзҺ°жңү DataRuntimeTestScene иҰҶзӣ–гҖӮ\n+   - д»Јд»·пјҡйңҖиҰҒеңЁ `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` еҶ…жӢҶеҮә typed slotгҖҒtyped converter/policy е’Ң computed typed helperгҖӮ\n+\n+2. **дёҖж¬ЎжҖ§е®Ңе…Ёж”№ `IDataComputeResolver<T>`гҖҒtyped `DataChanged<T>` е’Ң public untyped еҲ йҷӨ**\n+   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡжӣҙжҺҘиҝ‘йЎ№зӣ®зә§жңҖз»ҲеҪўжҖҒгҖӮ\n+   - д»Јд»·пјҡдјҡи·Ё Event/Feature/Ability/TestSystem и°ғз”ЁзӮ№пјҢиҝқиғҢвҖңе…Ҳж”№ dataпјҢе…¶д»–дёҚеҠЁвҖқгҖӮ\n+\n+3. **еҸӘеҠ жіЁйҮҠе’Ң grep gateпјҢдёҚйҮҚжһ„ storage**\n+   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡдҪҺйЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ\n+   - д»Јд»·пјҡдёҚиғҪи§ЈеҶі `DataSlot.Value object?` е’Ң `Data.Get/Set<T>` зғӯи·Ҝеҫ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ\n+\n+### Recommendation\n+\n+йҮҮз”Ёж–№жЎҲ 1гҖӮжң¬ SDD еҒҡ Data еҶ…йғЁзЎ¬еҲҮпјҡ`DataSlot<T>` еӯҳеӮЁдёҡеҠЎеҖјпјҢ`IDataSlot` еҸӘжҡҙйңІ metadataгҖҒmodifier ж“ҚдҪңгҖҒdiagnostic dump е’Ңиҫ№з•ҢеҶҷе…Ҙпјӣ`Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>` дҪңдёәи·Ёзұ»еһӢз®ЎзҗҶиҫ№з•ҢеҸҜдҝқз•ҷгҖӮе…¬е…ұ Event payloadгҖҒFeature/Ability context е’Ң TestSystem UI еұ•зӨәз•ҷз»ҷеҗҺз»ӯ SDDгҖӮ\n+\n+### Target Shape\n \n+- `IDataSlot`\n+  - жҡҙйңІ `DataDefinition Definition`гҖҒ`Type ValueClrType`гҖҒ`bool HasValue`гҖӮ\n+  - жҸҗдҫӣ `GetEffectiveValueAsObjectForDiagnostics()` е’Ң `GetStoredValueAsObjectForDiagnostics()`пјҢеҸӘдҫӣдәӢд»¶/diagnostic/dump иҫ№з•ҢдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ\n+  - дёҚжҸҗдҫӣ `object? Value` дҪңдёәдёҡеҠЎеҖје…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ\n+- `DataSlot<T>`\n+  - дҝқеӯҳ `T?` жҲ– `T` + `HasValue`гҖӮ\n+  - `GetEffectiveValue()` иҝ”еӣһ `T`гҖӮ\n+  - `SetValue(T value)` з”Ё `EqualityComparer<T>.Default` еҲӨзӯүгҖӮ\n+  - `TrySetFromBoundary(object? raw, ...)` е…Ҳиө° converter/policyпјҢеҶҚеҶҷ typed valueгҖӮ\n+- `NumericDataSlot<T>`\n+  - еҸӘз”ЁдәҺ `int/float/double` descriptorгҖӮ\n+  - modifier з®ЎзәҝеҶ…йғЁз”Ё double и®Ўз®—пјҢдҪҶеҶҷеӣһ typed `T`пјҢslot/cache дёҚдҝқеӯҳ `object?`гҖӮ\n+- `ComputedDataSlot<T>`\n+  - зј“еӯҳ `T _cachedValue` + dirty зҠ¶жҖҒгҖӮ\n+  - resolver иҫ№з•Ңиҝ”еӣһ object еҗҺз«ӢеҚіиҪ¬жҚўжҲҗ `T`гҖӮ\n+- `DataRuntimeStorage`\n+  - `_slots: Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>`гҖӮ\n+  - `TrySet<T>(DataKey<T>, T, ...)` зӣҙжҺҘи§Јжһҗ definition -> `DataSlot<T>` -> typed policy -> `SetValue(T)`гҖӮ\n+  - `Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` зӣҙжҺҘеҸ– `DataSlot<T>.GetEffectiveValue()`гҖӮ\n+  - `SetUntyped` дҝқз•ҷдёә loader/debug/TestSystem иҫ№з•ҢпјҢжіЁйҮҠж ҮжҳҺеҖјзұ»еһӢдјҡиЈ…з®ұпјҢдёҚжҺЁиҚҗдёҡеҠЎи°ғз”ЁгҖӮ\n+\n+### Must Confirm\n+\n+- noneгҖӮжң¬иҪ®з”ЁжҲ·е·ІжҳҺзЎ®вҖңжҢүз…§ Data зҡ„ж–№жЎҲз”ҹжҲҗ SDD е№¶жү§иЎҢпјҢе…Ҳж”№ dataпјҢе…¶д»–дёҚеҠЁвҖқгҖӮдёәйҒҝе…Қйҳ»еЎһжү§иЎҢпјҢжң¬ SDD йҮҮз”Ё Data-only й»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫжҺЁиҝӣгҖӮ\n+\n+### Should Confirm\n+\n+- еҗҺз»ӯжҳҜеҗҰеҲӣе»әзӢ¬з«Ӣ Event SDD еҲ йҷӨ `PropertyChanged(object?)` е’Ң Event dynamic objectгҖӮ\n+- еҗҺз»ӯжҳҜеҗҰеҲӣе»әзӢ¬з«Ӣ Feature/Ability SDD еҲ йҷӨ `ActivationData/ExecuteResult object?`гҖӮ\n+\n+### Defaults I Will Use\n+\n+- `SetUntyped`гҖҒ`TrySetUntyped` е’Ң `GetAll` жҡӮз•ҷ Data boundaryпјҢдёҚдҪңдёәдёҡеҠЎзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ\n+- `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged(string, object?, object?)` жң¬иҪ®дёҚж”№пјҢеҸӘд»Һ typed slot еңЁйҖҡзҹҘиҫ№з•Ңз”ҹжҲҗ old/new objectгҖӮ\n+- `IDataComputeResolver` е…¬е…ұжҺҘеҸЈжң¬иҪ®дёҚж”№пјҢcomputed slot еҶ…йғЁ typed cache е…ҲиҗҪең°гҖӮ\n+- дёҚж”№ DataOS schemaгҖҒsnapshotгҖҒgenerated DataKeyпјҢйҷӨйқһзј–иҜ‘жҲ–жөӢиҜ•жҡҙйңІеҝ…йЎ»еҗҢжӯҘгҖӮ\n+- дёҚж”№жёёжҲҸд»“е’Ң BrotatoLike submoduleгҖӮ\n+\n+### Not Recommended\n+\n+- дёҚеј•е…Ҙ `DataRuntimeValue` еӨҡеӯ—ж®ө unionгҖӮйЎ№зӣ®зә§и®ҫи®Ўе·ІиЈҒеҶіиҜҘж–№жЎҲеҶ—дҪҷпјҢдјҡеӨҚеҲ¶ descriptor зұ»еһӢдҝЎжҒҜе№¶еҲ¶йҖ ж–°еҠЁжҖҒеҲҶеҸ‘еұӮгҖӮ\n+- дёҚз”ЁеӨҡеӯ—е…ё `Dictionary<string, float/int/bool>` дҪңдёәжң¬иҪ®й»ҳи®Өж–№жЎҲпјӣе®ғж— жі•иҮӘз„¶иҰҶзӣ– ResourceRefгҖҒstring arrayгҖҒmodifier listгҖҒcomputed е’Ң diagnosticsгҖӮ\n+- дёҚеңЁжң¬ SDD еҲ йҷӨ Event/Feature object APIпјӣйӮЈдјҡи·ЁеҮәз”ЁжҲ·жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„ Data-only иҢғеӣҙгҖӮ\n+\n ## Verification\n \n-еҲ—еҮәе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺеҝ…йЎ»жү§иЎҢзҡ„йӘҢиҜҒгҖӮ\n+### Standard Answer\n+\n+- expectedInputs: Data descriptor definitions for float/int/double/bool/string/string_array/object_ref/modifier_list/computed; typed `DataKey<T>` set/get; loader `SetUntyped`; modifier changes; computed dependency dirty.\n+- expectedObservations: typed set/get creates `DataSlot<T>` or numeric typed slot; typed path does not increment untyped boundary counter; modifier and computed effective values match previous behavior; loader/debug untyped still converts and reports structured errors.\n+- passCriteria: DataRuntimeTestScene covers typed slot contract, modifier pipeline, computed cache, diagnostics and existing DataOS behavior; grep gate shows `DataSlot.Value object?` and `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>` removed from Data runtime.\n+- failCriteria: typed `DataKey<T>` write still calls `TrySetUntyped`; slot exposes business `object? Value`; modifier/computed behavior regresses; DataOS validator or build fails.\n+- artifactPath: `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataRuntimeTestScene.cs` plus command outputs recorded in `progress.md`.\n+\n+### Commands\n+\n+```bash\n+dotnet build Brotato_my.csproj --no-restore /clp:ErrorsOnly\n+bash Data/DataOS/Tools/validate-dataos.sh Data/DataOS/Authoring/slimeainew.authoring.db\n+python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate SDD-0031\n+python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all\n+bash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh\n+bash Workspace/SystemAgent/Tools/skill-test/lint.sh static all --no-fail --summary-only\n+rg -n \"class DataSlot\\\\b|object\\\\? Output:
# Data Runtime Generic Slot Hard Cutover

## Goal

жҠҠ Runtime Data дё»й“ҫи·Ҝд»Һ `object?` еҖјж§ҪеҲҮеҲ°жіӣеһӢж§ҪдҪҚпјҢйҷҚдҪҺ typed `DataKey<T>` иҜ»еҶҷгҖҒmodifierгҖҒcomputed cache зҡ„иЈ…з®ұжӢҶз®ұе’ҢеҠЁжҖҒиҪ¬жҚўйЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ

жң¬иҪ®зӣ®ж Үпјҡ

- `Data.Set<T>(DataKey<T>, T)` / `Data.Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` еҜ№йқһ computed еӯ—ж®өзӣҙжҺҘе‘Ҫдёӯ `DataSlot<T>`гҖӮ
- ж•°еҖј modifier зҡ„еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖҒжңүж•ҲеҖје’Ң slot cache д»Ҙ `T` дҝқеӯҳпјҢдёҚеҶҚйҖҡиҝҮ `object? -> double -> object?` дҪңдёәеӯҳеӮЁдё»й“ҫи·ҜгҖӮ
- computed д»Қе…је®№зҺ°жңү resolver жіЁеҶҢиЎЁпјҢдҪҶ runtime cache иҝӣе…Ҙ typed `DataSlot<T>`пјӣresolver иҝ”еӣһеҖјеҸӘеңЁиҫ№з•ҢиҪ¬жҚўдёҖж¬ЎгҖӮ
- `SetUntyped`гҖҒsnapshot loaderгҖҒdebug/TestSystem dump жҡӮз•ҷ Data иҫ№з•ҢпјҢе№¶жҳҺзЎ®ж ҮжіЁиЈ…з®ұ/GC йЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ
- еҸӘдҝ®ж”№ Data owner иҢғеӣҙпјӣEventгҖҒFeatureгҖҒAbilityгҖҒObjectPoolгҖҒTargetSelectorгҖҒLogger дёҚеңЁжң¬ SDD ж”№гҖӮ

## Context

### Context Read

- Git Boundary: `/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI`
- Worktree: noneгҖӮз”ЁжҲ·иҰҒжұӮеңЁеҪ“еүҚд»“жҢү Data ж–№жЎҲз»§з»ӯжү§иЎҢпјӣеҲӣе»әдёҙж—¶ worktree дјҡеўһеҠ  SDD/AI config еҗҢжӯҘеҷӘйҹіпјҢжң¬иҪ®еңЁе№ІеҮҖе·ҘдҪңеҢәзӣҙжҺҘж”№гҖӮ
- Baseline Status: SDD еҲӣе»әеүҚ `git status --short` cleanпјӣеҲӣе»әе№¶еҗҜеҠЁеҗҺеҸӘжңү SDD index/catalog е’Ңж–° SDD зӣ®еҪ•ж”№еҠЁгҖӮ
- Submodule Boundary: дёҚж¶үеҸҠжёёжҲҸд»“е’Ң submoduleгҖӮ
- Workflow: `NewFeature` / large SDD refactorгҖӮ
- Owner skills: `ecs-data`гҖҒ`data-authoring`пјӣе®һзҺ°еҸӘи§ҰеҸҠ Data runtimeпјҢдёҚж”№ DataOS schema / seed ж—¶дёҚиҝҗиЎҢз”ҹжҲҗеҷЁгҖӮ
- е·ІиҜ»дәӢе®һжәҗпјҡ
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Routes/NewFeature.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DesignCritic.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/Planner.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/TestDesigner.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Rules/ReviewGates.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Rules/Documentation.md`
  - `Workspace/SDD/docs/SDDFormat.md`
  - `Workspace/SDD/docs/CLI.md`
  - `Workspace/SDD/docs/ValidationRules.md`
  - `DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/Data/Dataзі»з»ҹиҜҙжҳҺ.md`
  - `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/ECSжЎҶжһ¶дјҳеҢ–/1.жӢҶз®ұиЈ…з®ұ+GCдјҳеҢ–/README.md`
  - `.../и®ҫи®Ў/00-жҖ»и§ҲдёҺAI-firstиЈҒеҶі.md`
  - `.../и®ҫи®Ў/01-DataиҝҗиЎҢж—¶objectеҺ»йҷӨи®ҫи®Ў.md`
  - `.../й—®йўҳ/01-DataSlotз»“жһ„еҢ–иЈ…з®ұ.md`
  - `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/*.cs`
  - `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/*.cs`

### Problem Shape

еҪ“еүҚ Data е·Іе®ҢжҲҗ descriptor-first / snapshot-first / generated `DataKey<T>`пјҢдҪҶ storage д»ҚеңЁзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„дёўеӨұжіӣеһӢдҝЎжҒҜпјҡ

- `DataRuntimeStorage.TrySet<T>` и°ғ `TrySetUntyped(key.StableKey, value, ...)`пјҢеҖјзұ»еһӢеҶҷе…Ҙдјҡиҝӣе…Ҙ `object?` еҸӮж•°гҖӮ
- `DataSlot.Value object?` дҝқеӯҳжүҖжңүиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ
- `DataSlot.GetEffectiveValue(): object?` е’Ң `DataValueConverter.ConvertForRead(object?)` и®©иҜ»еҸ–з»§з»ӯиө°еҠЁжҖҒиҪ¬жҚўгҖӮ
- `DataSlot.ApplyModifiers(object?)` жҠҠж•°еҖјжӢҶжҲҗ `double` еҗҺеҶҚжҢү descriptor иЈ…еӣһ `object`гҖӮ
- `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>` дҝқеӯҳ computed иҫ“еҮәгҖӮ
- `DataChangeRecord` е’Ң `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged` д»ҚжүҝиҪҪ `object?` old/newпјҢдҪҶиҝҷжҳҜ Event/diagnostic иҫ№з•ҢпјҢжң¬иҪ®дёҚејәиЎҢж”№ Event еҚҸи®®гҖӮ

### Main Risks

- **иҢғеӣҙиҶЁиғҖ**пјҡеҰӮжһңжң¬иҪ®еҗҢж—¶еҲ йҷӨ `PropertyChanged(object?)` жҲ–ж”№ Feature/Ability contextпјҢдјҡи·ЁеҲ° Event/Capability SDDгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡеҸӘеңЁ Data runtime еҶ…йғЁ typed еҢ–пјҢе…¬е…ұдәӢд»¶еҚҸи®®жҡӮз•ҷгҖӮ
- **loader е…је®№иҫ№з•Ң**пјҡsnapshot loader еҪ“еүҚеҸӘиғҪдј  untyped еҖјгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡдҝқз•ҷ `SetUntyped`пјҢдҪҶи®©е®ғеҸӘдҪңдёәиҫ№з•Ң APIпјҢеҶ…йғЁиҪ¬жҚўеҗҺеҶҷ typed slotгҖӮ
- **computed resolver иҝҒз§»жҲҗжң¬**пјҡдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§жҠҠжүҖжңү resolver ж”№жҲҗ `IDataComputeResolver<T>` дјҡзүөеҠЁ Feature test е’Ң registryгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡжң¬иҪ®е…Ҳи®© computed slot/cache typed еҢ–пјҢresolver иҝ”еӣһ object еҸӘдҪңдёә registry иҫ№з•Ңпјӣе®Ңж•ҙ `IDataComputeResolver<T>` еҸҜд»ҘеҗҺз»ӯзӢ¬з«Ӣж”¶еҸЈгҖӮ
- **жөӢиҜ•иҜҒжҚ®дёҚи¶і**пјҡDataOS Godot scene еҸӘиғҪиҜҒжҳҺиЎҢдёәпјҢдёҚзӣҙжҺҘиҜҒжҳҺж— иЈ…з®ұгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡж–°еўһ runtime contract жөӢиҜ•жЈҖжҹҘ slot еҪўжҖҒе’Ң typed API дёҚиө° untyped counterпјҢеҶҚз”Ё grep gate жЈҖжҹҘдё»й“ҫи·ҜгҖӮ

## Design

### Options

1. **жҺЁиҚҗпјҡжёҗиҝӣ hard cutover еҲ° `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot`**
   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡз¬ҰеҗҲйЎ№зӣ®зә§иЈҒеҶіпјӣдҝқз•ҷ dictionary з®ЎзҗҶиҫ№з•ҢпјӣиЎҢдёәйЈҺйҷ©еҸҜз”ұзҺ°жңү DataRuntimeTestScene иҰҶзӣ–гҖӮ
   - д»Јд»·пјҡйңҖиҰҒеңЁ `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` еҶ…жӢҶеҮә typed slotгҖҒtyped converter/policy е’Ң computed typed helperгҖӮ

2. **дёҖж¬ЎжҖ§е®Ңе…Ёж”№ `IDataComputeResolver<T>`гҖҒtyped `DataChanged<T>` е’Ң public untyped еҲ йҷӨ**
   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡжӣҙжҺҘиҝ‘йЎ№зӣ®зә§жңҖз»ҲеҪўжҖҒгҖӮ
   - д»Јд»·пјҡдјҡи·Ё Event/Feature/Ability/TestSystem и°ғз”ЁзӮ№пјҢиҝқиғҢвҖңе…Ҳж”№ dataпјҢе…¶д»–дёҚеҠЁвҖқгҖӮ

3. **еҸӘеҠ жіЁйҮҠе’Ң grep gateпјҢдёҚйҮҚжһ„ storage**
   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡдҪҺйЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ
   - д»Јд»·пјҡдёҚиғҪи§ЈеҶі `DataSlot.Value object?` е’Ң `Data.Get/Set<T>` зғӯи·Ҝеҫ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ

### Recommendation

йҮҮз”Ёж–№жЎҲ 1гҖӮжң¬ SDD еҒҡ Data еҶ…йғЁзЎ¬еҲҮпјҡ`DataSlot<T>` еӯҳеӮЁдёҡеҠЎеҖјпјҢ`IDataSlot` еҸӘжҡҙйңІ metadataгҖҒmodifier ж“ҚдҪңгҖҒdiagnostic dump е’Ңиҫ№з•ҢеҶҷе…Ҙпјӣ`Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>` дҪңдёәи·Ёзұ»еһӢз®ЎзҗҶиҫ№з•ҢеҸҜдҝқз•ҷгҖӮе…¬е…ұ Event payloadгҖҒFeature/Ability context е’Ң TestSystem UI еұ•зӨәз•ҷз»ҷеҗҺз»ӯ SDDгҖӮ

### Target Shape

- `IDataSlot`
  - жҡҙйңІ `DataDefinition Definition`гҖҒ`Type ValueClrType`гҖҒ`bool HasValue`гҖӮ
  - жҸҗдҫӣ `GetEffectiveValueAsObjectForDiagnostics()` е’Ң `GetStoredValueAsObjectForDiagnostics()`пјҢеҸӘдҫӣдәӢд»¶/diagnostic/dump иҫ№з•ҢдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ
  - дёҚжҸҗдҫӣ `object? Value` дҪңдёәдёҡеҠЎеҖје…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
- `DataSlot<T>`
  - дҝқеӯҳ `T?` жҲ– `T` + `HasValue`гҖӮ
  - `GetEffectiveValue()` иҝ”еӣһ `T`гҖӮ
  - `SetValue(T value)` з”Ё `EqualityComparer<T>.Default` еҲӨзӯүгҖӮ
  - `TrySetFromBoundary(object? raw, ...)` е…Ҳиө° converter/policyпјҢеҶҚеҶҷ typed valueгҖӮ
- `NumericDataSlot<T>`
  - еҸӘз”ЁдәҺ `int/float/double` descriptorгҖӮ
  - modifier з®ЎзәҝеҶ…йғЁз”Ё double и®Ўз®—пјҢдҪҶеҶҷеӣһ typed `T`пјҢslot/cache дёҚдҝқеӯҳ `object?`гҖӮ
- `ComputedDataSlot<T>`
  - зј“еӯҳ `T _cachedValue` + dirty зҠ¶жҖҒгҖӮ
  - resolver иҫ№з•Ңиҝ”еӣһ object еҗҺз«ӢеҚіиҪ¬жҚўжҲҗ `T`гҖӮ
- `DataRuntimeStorage`
  - `_slots: Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>`гҖӮ
  - `TrySet<T>(DataKey<T>, T, ...)` зӣҙжҺҘи§Јжһҗ definition -> `DataSlot<T>` -> typed policy -> `SetValue(T)`гҖӮ
  - `Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` зӣҙжҺҘеҸ– `DataSlot<T>.GetEffectiveValue()`гҖӮ
  - `SetUntyped` дҝқз•ҷдёә loader/debug/TestSystem иҫ№з•ҢпјҢжіЁйҮҠж ҮжҳҺеҖјзұ»еһӢдјҡиЈ…з®ұпјҢдёҚжҺЁиҚҗдёҡеҠЎи°ғз”ЁгҖӮ

### Must Confirm

- noneгҖӮжң¬иҪ®з”ЁжҲ·е·ІжҳҺзЎ®вҖңжҢүз…§ Data зҡ„ж–№жЎҲз”ҹжҲҗ SDD е№¶жү§иЎҢпјҢе…Ҳж”№ dataпјҢе…¶д»–дёҚеҠЁвҖқгҖӮдёәйҒҝе…Қйҳ»еЎһжү§иЎҢпјҢжң¬ SDD йҮҮз”Ё Data-only й»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫжҺЁиҝӣгҖӮ

### Should Confirm

- еҗҺз»ӯжҳҜеҗҰеҲӣе»әзӢ¬з«Ӣ Event SDD еҲ йҷӨ `PropertyChanged(object?)` е’Ң Event dynamic objectгҖӮ
- еҗҺз»ӯжҳҜеҗҰеҲӣе»әзӢ¬з«Ӣ Feature/Ability SDD еҲ йҷӨ `ActivationData/ExecuteResult object?`гҖӮ

### Defaults I Will Use

- `SetUntyped`гҖҒ`TrySetUntyped` е’Ң `GetAll` жҡӮз•ҷ Data boundaryпјҢдёҚдҪңдёәдёҡеҠЎзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ
- `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged(string, object?, object?)` жң¬иҪ®дёҚж”№пјҢеҸӘд»Һ typed slot еңЁйҖҡзҹҘиҫ№з•Ңз”ҹжҲҗ old/new objectгҖӮ
- `IDataComputeResolver` е…¬е…ұжҺҘеҸЈжң¬иҪ®дёҚж”№пјҢcomputed slot еҶ…йғЁ typed cache е…ҲиҗҪең°гҖӮ
- дёҚж”№ DataOS schemaгҖҒsnapshotгҖҒgenerated DataKeyпјҢйҷӨйқһзј–иҜ‘жҲ–жөӢиҜ•жҡҙйңІеҝ…йЎ»еҗҢжӯҘгҖӮ
- дёҚж”№жёёжҲҸд»“е’Ң BrotatoLike submoduleгҖӮ

### Not Recommended

- дёҚеј•е…Ҙ `DataRuntimeValue` еӨҡеӯ—ж®ө unionгҖӮйЎ№зӣ®зә§и®ҫи®Ўе·ІиЈҒеҶіиҜҘж–№жЎҲеҶ—дҪҷпјҢдјҡеӨҚеҲ¶ descriptor зұ»еһӢдҝЎжҒҜе№¶еҲ¶йҖ ж–°еҠЁжҖҒеҲҶеҸ‘еұӮгҖӮ
- дёҚз”ЁеӨҡеӯ—е…ё `Dictionary<string, float/int/bool>` дҪңдёәжң¬иҪ®й»ҳи®Өж–№жЎҲпјӣе®ғж— жі•иҮӘз„¶иҰҶзӣ– ResourceRefгҖҒstring arrayгҖҒmodifier listгҖҒcomputed е’Ң diagnosticsгҖӮ
- дёҚеңЁжң¬ SDD еҲ йҷӨ Event/Feature object APIпјӣйӮЈдјҡи·ЁеҮәз”ЁжҲ·жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„ Data-only иҢғеӣҙгҖӮ

## Verification

### Standard Answer

- expectedInputs: Data descriptor definitions for float/int/double/bool/string/string_array/object_ref/modifier_list/computed; typed `DataKey<T>` set/get; loader `SetUntyped`; modifier changes; computed dependency dirty.
- expectedObservations: typed set/get creates `DataSlot<T>` or numeric typed slot; typed path does not increment untyped boundary counter; modifier and computed effective values match previous behavior; loader/debug untyped still converts and reports structured errors.
- passCriteria: DataRuntimeTestScene covers typed slot contract, modifier pipeline, computed cache, diagnostics and existing DataOS behavior; grep gate shows `DataSlot.Value object?` and `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>` removed from Data runtime.
- failCriteria: typed `DataKey<T>` write still calls `TrySetUntyped`; slot exposes business `object? Value`; modifier/computed behavior regresses; DataOS validator or build fails.
- artifactPath: `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataRuntimeTestScene.cs` plus command outputs recorded in `progress.md`.

### Commands

```bash
dotnet build Brotato_my.csproj --no-restore /clp:ErrorsOnly
bash Data/DataOS/Tools/validate-dataos.sh Data/DataOS/Authoring/slimeainew.authoring.db
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate SDD-0031
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all
bash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh
bash Workspace/SystemAgent/Tools/skill-test/lint.sh static all --no-fail --summary-only
rg -n "class DataSlot\\b|object\\? Value|Dictionary<string, object\\?> _computedCache|TrySetUntyped\\(key\\.StableKey, value" Src/ECS/Runtime/Data
```

еҰӮжһң Godot CLI еҸҜз”ЁпјҢиҝҪеҠ пјҡ

```bash
GODOT=/home/slime/Code/Godot/GodotEngine/4.x/Godot_v4.6.2-stable_mono_linux_x86_64/Godot_v4.6.2-stable_mono_linux.x86_64
$GODOT --headless --path . --scene res://Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataRuntimeTestScene.tscn
```

````

Data(Bootstrap.Catalog);\n         AssertTrue(\"typed write accepted\", data.Set(GeneratedDataKey.BaseHp, 20f));\n         AssertEqual(\"typed read after write\", 20f, data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.BaseHp));\n     }\n+\n+    private void Data_TypedHotPath_ShouldCreateGenericSlot()\n+    {\n+        var storage = CreateRuntimeStorage(Definition(\"Attribute.BaseHp\", DataValueType.Float, 10f));\n+        var key = new DataKey<float>(\"Attribute.BaseHp\");\n+\n+        AssertTrue(\"typed storage write accepted\", storage.Set(key, 20f));\n+\n+        var slot = GetRuntimeSlot(storage, \"Attribute.BaseHp\");\n+        var slotType = slot.GetType();\n+        AssertTrue(\"typed slot is generic\", slotType.IsGenericType);\n+        AssertEqual(\"typed slot generic argument\", typeof(float), slotType.GenericTypeArguments[0]);\n+\n+        var valueClrType = slotType.GetProperty(\"ValueClrType\", BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Instance)?.GetValue(slot);\n+        AssertEqual(\"typed slot reports value clr type\", typeof(float), valueClrType);\n+    }\n@@\n     private void Data_ComputedDirty_ShouldPropagateTransitively()\n@@\n         AssertEqual(\"transitive recomputed value\", 20f, data.Get<float>(\"C\"));\n     }\n+\n+    private static object GetRuntimeSlot(DataRuntimeStorage storage, string stableKey)\n+    {\n+        var field = typeof(DataRuntimeStorage).GetField(\"_slots\", BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance)\n+                    ?? throw new InvalidOperationException(\"DataRuntimeStorage._slots field not found\");\n+        var slots = field.GetValue(storage) as IDictionary\n+                    ?? throw new InvalidOperationException(\"DataRuntimeStorage._slots is not an IDictionary\");\n+        return slots[stableKey] ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Data slot not found: {stableKey}\");\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"

    10	/// <summary>
    11	/// йӘҢиҜҒ descriptor-first Data runtime policyгҖӮ
    12	/// </summary>
    13	public partial class DataRuntimeTestScene : DataSceneTestBase
    14	{
    15	    protected override void RunTests()
    16	    {
    17	        Data_Get_ShouldReturnDescriptorDefault();
    18	        Data_Set_ShouldWriteTypedValue();
    19	        Data_TypedHotPath_ShouldCreateGenericSlot();
    20	        Data_Set_ShouldRejectUnknownKey();
    21	        Data_Set_ShouldRejectWrongType();
    22	        Data_WriteDiagnostics_ShouldReportFailureCodes();
    23	        Data_ReferenceAndArrayContracts_ShouldNormalizeRuntimeTypes();
    24	        Data_Set_ShouldRespectWritePolicy();
    25	        Data_Set_ShouldApplyRangePolicy();
    26	        Data_Set_ShouldRespectAllowedValues();
    27	        Data_RemoveAndClear_ShouldReturnDescriptorDefault();
    28	        Data_Set_ShouldPublishPropertyChanged();
    29	        Data_AddModifier_ShouldRespectModifierPolicy();
    30	        Data_AddModifier_ShouldRejectUnknownTarget();
    31	        Data_AddModifier_ShouldApplyModifierPipeline();
    32	        Data_RemoveModifiersBySource_ShouldOnlyRemoveMatchingSource();
    33	        Data_ModifierChange_ShouldPublishChangeAndDirtyDependents();
    34	        Data_GetComputed_ShouldUseResolverDependenciesAndComputeParams();
    35	        Data_GetComputed_ShouldCacheUntilDependencyChanges();
    36	        Data_ComputedDirty_ShouldPropagateTransitively();
    37	    }
    38	
    39	    private void Data_Get_ShouldReturnDescriptorDefault()
    40	    {
    41	        var data = new Data(Bootstrap.Catalog);
    42	        AssertEqual("descriptor default", 10f, data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.BaseHp));
    43	    }
    44	
    45	    private void Data_Set_ShouldWriteTypedValue()
    46	    {
    47	        var data = new Data(Bootstrap.Catalog);
    48	        AssertTrue("typed write accepted", data.Set(GeneratedDataKey.BaseHp, 20f));
    49	        AssertEqual("typed read after write", 20f, data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.BaseHp));
    50	    }
    51	
    52	    private void Data_TypedHotPath_ShouldCreateGenericSlot()
    53	    {
    54	        var storage = CreateRuntimeStorage(Definition("Attribute.BaseHp", DataValueType.Float, 10f));
    55	        var key = new DataKey<float>("Attribute.BaseHp");
    56	
    57	        AssertTrue("typed storage write accepted", storage.Set(key, 20f));
    58	
    59	        var slot = GetRuntimeSlot(storage, "Attribute.BaseHp");
    60	        var slotType = slot.GetType();
    61	        AssertTrue("typed slot is generic", slotType.IsGenericType);
    62	        AssertEqual("typed slot generic argument", typeof(float), slotType.GenericTypeArguments[0]);
    63	
    64	        var valueClrType = slotType.GetProperty("ValueClrType", BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Instance)?.GetValue(slot);
    65	        AssertEqual("typed slot reports value clr type", typeof(float), valueClrType);
    66	    }
    67	
    68	    private void Data_Set_ShouldRejectUnknownKey()
    69	    {
    70	        var data = new Data(Bootstrap.Catalog);
    71	        AssertThrows<KeyNotFoundException>("unknown key rejected", () => data.Set("MissingDataKey", 1));
    72	        AssertFalse("unknown key not created", data.Has("MissingDataKey"));
    73	    }
    74	
    75	    private void Data_Set_ShouldRejectWrongType()
    76	    {
    77	        var data = new Data(Bootstrap.Catalog);
    78	        AssertFalse("wrong type rejected", data.SetUntyped("BaseHp", "not-float", DataWriteSource.Runtime));
    79	        AssertEqual("default after wrong type", 10f, data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.BaseHp));
    80	    }
    81	
    82	    private void Data_WriteDiagnostics_ShouldReportFailureCodes()
    83	    {
    84	        var storage = CreateRuntimeStorage(
    85	            Definition("Attribute.BaseHp", DataValueType.Float, 10f),
    86	            Definition("Attribute.LoaderOnly", DataValueType.Float, 0f, writePolicy: DataWritePolicy.LoaderOnly),
    87	            Definition("Attribute.RejectRange", DataValueType.Float, 0f, minValue: 0f, maxValue: 100f, rangePolicy: DataRangePolicy.RejectRuntime),
    88	            Definition("Attribute.Computed", DataValueType.Float, 0f, writePolicy: DataWritePolicy.ComputedReadonly),
    89	            Definition("Unit.Name", DataValueType.String, "Slime"));
    90	
   352	        AssertEqual("recomputed after dependency set", 300f, data.Get<float>("Attribute.FinalAttack"));
   353	        AssertEqual("dirty resolver count", 2, resolver.ComputeCount);
   354	    }
   355	
   356	    private void Data_ComputedDirty_ShouldPropagateTransitively()
   357	    {
   358	        var registry = CreateRegistry(new ParametricAddResolver(), new CountingAttributeBonusResolver());
   359	        var data = CreateRuntimeDataFromDescriptors(registry, new[]
   360	        {
   361	            Descriptor("A", "float", "10"),
   362	            Descriptor("B", "float", "0") with
   363	            {
   364	                StoragePolicy = "computed",
   365	                WritePolicy = "computed_readonly",
   366	                ComputeId = "ParametricAdd",
   367	                Dependencies = new List<string> { "A" }
   368	            },
   369	            Descriptor("C", "float", "0") with
   370	            {
   371	                StoragePolicy = "computed",
   372	                WritePolicy = "computed_readonly",
   373	                ComputeId = "CountingAttributeBonus",
   374	                Dependencies = new List<string> { "B" }
   375	            }
   376	        });
   377	
   378	        AssertEqual("initial transitive computed", 10f, data.Get<float>("C"));
   379	        data.SetUntyped("A", 20f, DataWriteSource.Runtime);
   380	        AssertEqual("transitive recomputed value", 20f, data.Get<float>("C"));
   381	    }
   382	
   383	    private static object GetRuntimeSlot(DataRuntimeStorage storage, string stableKey)
   384	    {
   385	        var field = typeof(DataRuntimeStorage).GetField("_slots", BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance)
   386	                    ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("DataRuntimeStorage._slots field not found");
   387	        var slots = field.GetValue(storage) as IDictionary
   388	                    ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("DataRuntimeStorage._slots is not an IDictionary");
   389	        return slots[stableKey] ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data slot not found: {stableKey}");
   390	    }
   391	}

GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();\n+\n+    /// <summary>\n+    /// иҫ№з•ҢиҜҠж–ӯз”ЁпјҡиҜ»еҸ–е·ІеҶҷе…ҘеҹәзЎҖеҖјпјҢдјҡеңЁеҖјзұ»еһӢеӯ—ж®өдёҠеҸ‘з”ҹиЈ…з®ұгҖӮ\n+    /// </summary>\n+    object? GetStoredValueForDiagnostics();\n+\n+    /// <summary>\n+    /// д»Һ loader/debug/TestSystem иҫ№з•ҢеҶҷе…Ҙе·ІйҖҡиҝҮзӯ–з•Ҙж ЎйӘҢзҡ„еҖјгҖӮ\n+    /// </summary>\n+    bool SetValueFromBoundary(object? value);\n+\n+    bool ClearValue();\n+\n+    bool AddModifier(DataModifier modifier);\n+\n+    bool RemoveModifier(string modifierId);\n+\n+    int RemoveModifiersBySource(object source);\n+\n+    bool ClearModifiers();\n+\n+    List<DataModifier> GetModifiers();\n+}\n+\n+/// <summary>\n+/// еҚ•дёӘ descriptor еӯ—ж®өзҡ„жіӣеһӢиҝҗиЎҢж—¶ж§ҪдҪҚгҖӮ\n+/// </summary>\n+/// <typeparam name=\"T\">ж§ҪдҪҚдҝқеӯҳзҡ„ CLR еҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</typeparam>\n+public sealed class DataSlot<T> : IDataSlot\n+{\n+    private readonly List<DataModifier> _modifiers = new();\n+    private T _value = default!;\n+\n+    /// <summary>\n+    /// еҲӣе»әжіӣеһӢиҝҗиЎҢж—¶ж§ҪдҪҚгҖӮ\n+    /// </summary>\n+    /// <param name=\"definition\">еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ</param>\n+    public DataSlot(DataDefinition definition)\n+    {\n+        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(definition);\n+        Definition = definition; // descriptor е®ҡд№ү\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public DataDefinition Definition { get; }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public Type ValueClrType => typeof(T);\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public bool HasValue { get; private set; }\n+\n+    /// <summary>\n+    /// иҺ·еҸ–еҪ“еүҚ typed жңүж•ҲеҖјпјӣжңӘеҶҷе…Ҙж—¶еӣһйҖҖеҲ° descriptor defaultгҖӮ\n+    /// </summary>\n+    public T GetEffectiveValue()\n+    {\n+        var baseValue = HasValue ? _value : ConvertToSlotValue(Definition.DefaultValue);\n+        return _modifiers.Count == 0 ? baseValue : ApplyModifiers(baseValue);\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <summary>\n+    /// еҶҷе…Ҙ typed иҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ\n+    /// </summary>\n+    /// <param name=\"value\">е·ІиҪ¬жҚўе№¶йҖҡиҝҮзӯ–з•Ҙж ЎйӘҢзҡ„еҖјгҖӮ</param>\n+    public bool SetValue(T value)\n+    {\n+        if (HasValue && EqualityComparer<T>.Default.Equals(_value, value))\n+        {\n+            return false;\n+        }\n+\n+        _value = value;\n+        HasValue = true;\n+        return true;\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public bool SetValueFromBoundary(object? value)\n+    {\n+        return SetValue(ConvertToSlotValue(value));\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public bool ClearValue()\n+    {\n+        if (!HasValue)\n+        {\n+            return false;\n+        }\n+\n+        _value = default!;\n+        HasValue = false;\n+        return true;\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public bool AddModifier(DataModifier modifier)\n+    {\n+        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(modifier);\n+        for (var i = 0; i < _modifiers.Count; i++)\n+        {\n+            if (string.Equals(_modifiers[i].Id, modifier.Id, StringComparison.Ordinal))\n+            {\n+                return false;\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        var insertIndex = _modifiers.BinarySearch(modifier, ModifierPriorityComparer.Instance);\n+        if (insertIndex < 0)\n+        {\n+            insertIndex = ~insertIndex;\n+        }\n+\n+        _modifiers.Insert(insertIndex, modifier);\n+        return true;\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public bool RemoveModifier(string modifierId)\n+    {\n+        return _modifiers.RemoveAll(modifier => string.Equals(modifier.Id, modifierId, StringComparison.Ordinal)) > 0;\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public int RemoveModifiersBySource(object source)\n+    {\n+        return _modifiers.RemoveAll(modifier => Equals(modifier.Source, source));\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public bool ClearModifiers()\n+    {\n+        if (_modifiers.Count == 0)\n+        {\n+            return false;\n+        }\n+\n+        _modifiers.Clear();\n+        return true;\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public List<DataModifier> GetModifiers()\n+    {\n+        return new List<DataModifier>(_modifiers);\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public object? GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()\n+    {\n+        return GetEffectiveValue();\n+    }\n+\n+    /// <inheritdoc />\n+    public object? GetStoredValueForDiagnostics()\n+    {\n+        return HasValue ? _value : null;\n+    }\n+\n+    private T ApplyModifiers(T baseValue)\n+    {\n+        if (!TryGetNumeric(baseValue, out var numericBase))\n+        {\n+            return baseValue;\n+        }\n+\n+        var additive = 0d;\n+        var multiplicative = 1d;\n+        var finalAdditive = 0d;\n+        double? overrideValue = null;\n+        double? cap = null;\n+        for (var i = 0; i < _modifiers.Count; i++)\n+        {\n+            var modifier = _modifiers[i];\n+            switch (modifier.Type)\n+            {\n+                case ModifierType.Additive:\n+                    additive += modifier.Value;\n+                    break;\n+                case ModifierType.Multiplicative:\n+                    multiplicative *= modifier.Value;\n+                    break;\n+                case ModifierType.FinalAdditive:\n+                    finalAdditive += modifier.Value;\n+                    break;\n+                case ModifierType.Override:\n+                    overrideValue ??= modifier.Value;\n+                    break;\n+                case ModifierType.Cap:\n+                    cap = cap.HasValue ? Math.Min(cap.Value, modifier.Value) : modifier.Value;\n+                    break;\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        var effective = overrideValue ?? ((numericBase + additive) * multiplicative + finalAdditive);\n+        if (cap.HasValue)\n+        {\n+            effective = Math.Min(effective, cap.Value);\n+        }\n+\n+        if (Definition.MinValue.HasValue && effective < Definition.MinValue.Value)\n+        {\n+            effective = Definition.MinValue.Value;\n+        }\n+\n+        if (Definition.MaxValue.HasValue && effective > Definition.MaxValue.Value)\n+        {\n+            effective = Definition.MaxValue.Value;\n+        }\n+\n+        return ConvertNumericToSlotType(effective);\n+    }\n+\n+    private T ConvertToSlotValue(object? value)\n+    {\n+        var converted = DataValueConverter.ConvertForRead(value, typeof(T), Definition.ValueType);\n+        return converted == null ? default! : (T)converted;\n+    }\n+\n+    private static bool TryGetNumeric(T value, out double numericValue)\n+    {\n+        var targetType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(typeof(T)) ?? typeof(T);\n+        if (targetType == typeof(int))\n+        {\n+            numericValue = Convert.ToInt32(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);\n+            return true;\n+        }\n+\n+        if (targetType == typeof(float))\n+        {\n+            numericValue = Convert.ToSingle(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);\n+            return true;\n+        }\n+\n+        if (targetType == typeof(double))\n+        {\n+            numericValue = Convert.ToDouble(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);\n+            return true;\n+        }\n+\n+        numericValue = 0d;\n+        return false;\n+    }\n+\n+    private static T ConvertNumericToSlotType(double value)\n+    {\n+        var targetType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(typeof(T)) ?? typeof(T);\n+        object typedValue;\n+        if (targetType == typeof(int))\n+        {\n+            typedValue = (int)value;\n+        }\n+        else if (targetType == typeof(float))\n+        {\n+            typedValue = (float)value;\n+        }\n+        else\n+        {\n+            typedValue = value;\n+        }\n+\n+        return (T)typedValue;\n+    }\n+\n+    private sealed class ModifierPriorityComparer : IComparer<DataModifier>\n+    {\n+        public static readonly ModifierPriorityComparer Instance = new();\n+\n+        public int Compare(DataModifier? x, DataModifier? y)\n+        {\n+            if (x == null && y == null) return 0;\n+            if (x == null) return -1;\n+            if (y == null) return 1;\n+            return x.Priority.CompareTo(y.Priority);\n+        }\n+    }\n+}\n*** End Patch\n"
}

### 000382 agent_message `commentary`

   142	/// <summary>
   143	/// еҚ•дёӘ descriptor еӯ—ж®өзҡ„жіӣеһӢиҝҗиЎҢж—¶ж§ҪдҪҚгҖӮ
   144	/// </summary>
   145	/// <typeparam name="T">ж§ҪдҪҚдҝқеӯҳзҡ„ CLR еҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</typeparam>
   146	public sealed class DataSlot<T> : IDataSlot
   147	{
   148	    private readonly List<DataModifier> _modifiers = new();
   149	    private T _value = default!;
   150	
   151	    /// <summary>
   152	    /// еҲӣе»әжіӣеһӢиҝҗиЎҢж—¶ж§ҪдҪҚгҖӮ
   153	    /// </summary>
   154	    /// <param name="definition">еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ</param>
   155	    public DataSlot(DataDefinition definition)
   156	    {
   157	        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(definition);
   158	        Definition = definition; // descriptor е®ҡд№ү
   159	    }
   160	
   161	    /// <inheritdoc />
   162	    public DataDefinition Definition { get; }
   163	
   164	    /// <inheritdoc />
   165	    public Type ValueClrType => typeof(T);
   166	
   167	    /// <inheritdoc />
   168	    public bool HasValue { get; private set; }
   169	
   170	    /// <summary>
   171	    /// иҺ·еҸ–еҪ“еүҚ typed жңүж•ҲеҖјпјӣжңӘеҶҷе…Ҙж—¶еӣһйҖҖеҲ° descriptor defaultгҖӮ
   172	    /// </summary>
   173	    public T GetEffectiveValue()
   174	    {
   175	        var baseValue = HasValue ? _value : ConvertToSlotValue(Definition.DefaultValue);
   176	        return _modifiers.Count == 0 ? baseValue : ApplyModifiers(baseValue);
   177	    }
   178	
   179	    /// <summary>
   180	    /// еҶҷе…Ҙ typed иҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ
   181	    /// </summary>
   182	    /// <param name="value">е·ІиҪ¬жҚўе№¶йҖҡиҝҮзӯ–з•Ҙж ЎйӘҢзҡ„еҖјгҖӮ</param>
   183	    public bool SetValue(T value)
   184	    {
   185	        if (HasValue && EqualityComparer<T>.Default.Equals(_value, value))
   186	        {
   187	            return false;
   188	        }
   189	
   190	        _value = value;
   191	        HasValue = true;
   192	        return true;
   193	    }
   194	
   195	    /// <inheritdoc />
   196	    public bool SetValueFromBoundary(object? value)
   197	    {
   198	        return SetValue(ConvertToSlotValue(value));
   199	    }
   200	
   201	    /// <inheritdoc />
   202	    public bool ClearValue()
   203	    {
   204	        if (!HasValue)
   205	        {
   206	            return false;
   207	        }
   208	
   209	        _value = default!;
   210	        HasValue = false;
   211	        return true;
   212	    }
   213	
   214	    /// <inheritdoc />
   215	    public bool AddModifier(DataModifier modifier)
   216	    {
   217	        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(modifier);
   218	        for (var i = 0; i < _modifiers.Count; i++)
   219	        {
   220	            if (string.Equals(_modifiers[i].Id, modifier.Id, StringComparison.Ordinal))
   221	            {
   222	                return false;
   223	            }
   224	        }
   225	
   226	        var insertIndex = _modifiers.BinarySearch(modifier, ModifierPriorityComparer.Instance);
   227	        if (insertIndex < 0)
   228	        {
   229	            insertIndex = ~insertIndex;
   230	        }
   231	
   232	        _modifiers.Insert(insertIndex, modifier);
   233	        return true;
   234	    }
   235	
   236	    /// <inheritdoc />
   237	    public bool RemoveModifier(string modifierId)
   238	    {
   239	        return _modifiers.RemoveAll(modifier => string.Equals(modifier.Id, modifierId, StringComparison.Ordinal)) > 0;
   240	    }
   241	
   242	    /// <inheritdoc />
   243	    public int RemoveModifiersBySource(object source)
   244	    {
   245	        return _modifiers.RemoveAll(modifier => Equals(modifier.Source, source));
   246	    }
   247	
   248	    /// <inheritdoc />
   249	    public bool ClearModifiers()
   250	    {
   251	        if (_modifiers.Count == 0)
   252	        {
   253	            return false;
   254	        }
   255	
   256	        _modifiers.Clear();
   257	        return true;
   258	    }
   259	
   260	    /// <inheritdoc />
   261	    public List<DataModifier> GetModifiers()
   262	    {
   263	        return new List<DataModifier>(_modifiers);
   264	    }
   265	
   266	    /// <inheritdoc />
   267	    public object? GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()
   268	    {
   269	        return GetEffectiveValue();
   270	    }
   271	
   272	    /// <inheritdoc />
   273	    public object? GetStoredValueForDiagnostics()
   274	    {
   275	        return HasValue ? _value : null;
   276	    }
   277	
   278	    private T ApplyModifiers(T baseValue)
   279	    {
   280	        if (!TryGetNumeric(baseValue, out var numericBase))
   281	        {
   282	            return baseValue;
   283	        }
   284	
   285	        var additive = 0d;
   286	        var multiplicative = 1d;
   287	        var finalAdditive = 0d;
   288	        double? overrideValue = null;
   289	        double? cap = null;
   290	        for (var i = 0; i < _modifiers.Count; i++)
   291	        {
   292	            var modifier = _modifiers[i];
   293	            switch (modifier.Type)
   294	            {
   295	                case ModifierType.Additive:
   296	                    additive += modifier.Value;
   297	                    break;
   298	                case ModifierType.Multiplicative:
   299	                    multiplicative *= modifier.Value;
   300	                    break;
   301	                case ModifierType.FinalAdditive:
   302	                    finalAdditive += modifier.Value;
   303	                    break;
   304	                case ModifierType.Override:
   305	                    overrideValue ??= modifier.Value;
   306	                    break;
   307	                case ModifierType.Cap:
   308	                    cap = cap.HasValue ? Math.Min(cap.Value, modifier.Value) : modifier.Value;
   309	                    break;
   310	            }
   311	        }
   312	
   313	        var effective = overrideValue ?? ((numericBase + additive) * multiplicative + finalAdditive);
   314	        if (cap.HasValue)
   315	        {
   316	            effective = Math.Min(effective, cap.Value);
   317	        }
   318	
   319	        if (Definition.MinValue.HasValue && effective < Definition.MinValue.Value)
   320	        {
   321	            effective = Definition.MinValue.Value;
   322	        }
   323	
   324	        if (Definition.MaxValue.HasValue && effective > Definition.MaxValue.Value)
   325	        {
   326	            effective = Definition.MaxValue.Value;
   327	        }
   328	
   329	        return ConvertNumericToSlotType(effective);
   330	    }
   331	
   332	    private T ConvertToSlotValue(object? value)
   333	    {
   334	        var converted = DataValueConverter.ConvertForRead(value, typeof(T), Definition.ValueType);
   335	        return converted == null ? default! : (T)converted;
   336	    }
   337	
   338	    private static bool TryGetNumeric(T value, out double numericValue)
   339	    {
   340	        var targetType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(typeof(T)) ?? typeof(T);
   341	        if (targetType == typeof(int))
   342	        {
   343	            numericValue = Convert.ToInt32(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
   344	            return true;
   345	        }
   346	
   347	        if (targetType == typeof(float))
   348	        {
   349	            numericValue = Convert.ToSingle(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
   350	            return true;
   351	        }
   352	
   353	        if (targetType == typeof(double))
   354	        {
   355	            numericValue = Convert.ToDouble(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
   356	            return true;
   357	        }
   358	
   359	        numericValue = 0d;
   360	        return false;

```

  1175	    /// жҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁе·ІеҶҷе…ҘеҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ
  1176	    /// </summary>
  1177	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1178	    public bool HasValue(string stableKey)
  1179	    {
  1180	        return _slots.TryGetValue(stableKey, out var slot) && slot.HasValue;
  1181	    }
  1182	
  1183	    /// <summary>
  1184	    /// жЈҖжҹҘ stable key жҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁдәҺ catalogгҖӮ
  1185	    /// </summary>
  1186	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1187	    public bool HasDefinition(string stableKey)
  1188	    {
  1189	        return _catalog.TryGet(stableKey, out _);
  1190	    }
  1191	
  1192	    /// <summary>
  1193	    /// иҜ»еҸ–зұ»еһӢе®үе…Ёеӯ—ж®өеҖјгҖӮ
  1194	    /// </summary>
  1195	    /// <typeparam name="T">еӯ—ж®өеҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</typeparam>
  1196	    /// <param name="key">еӯ—ж®ө stable key еҸҘжҹ„гҖӮ</param>
  1197	    public T Get<T>(DataKey<T> key)
  1198	    {
  1199	        return Get<T>(key.StableKey);
  1200	    }
  1201	
  1202	    /// <summary>
  1203	    /// иҜ»еҸ–еӯ—ж®өеҖјпјӣжңӘеҶҷе…Ҙж—¶иҝ”еӣһ descriptor defaultгҖӮ
  1204	    /// </summary>
  1205	    /// <typeparam name="T">еӯ—ж®өеҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</typeparam>
  1206	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1207	    public T Get<T>(string stableKey)
  1208	    {
  1209	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1210	        if (!DataValueConverter.IsCompatible<T>(definition.ValueType))
  1211	        {
  1212	            throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data.Get зұ»еһӢдёҚеҢ№й…Қпјҡ{stableKey} expected={definition.ValueType}, actual={typeof(T).Name}");
  1213	        }
  1214	
  1215	        var value = definition.IsComputed
  1216	            ? GetComputedValue(definition)
  1217	            : GetOrCreateSlot(definition).GetEffectiveValue();
  1218	        return (T)DataValueConverter.ConvertForRead(value, typeof(T), definition.ValueType)!;
  1219	    }
  1220	
  1221	    /// <summary>
  1222	    /// еҶҷе…Ҙзұ»еһӢе®үе…Ёеӯ—ж®өеҖјгҖӮ
  1223	    /// </summary>
  1224	    /// <typeparam name="T">еӯ—ж®өеҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</typeparam>
  1225	    /// <param name="key">еӯ—ж®ө stable key еҸҘжҹ„гҖӮ</param>
  1226	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1227	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1228	    public bool Set<T>(DataKey<T> key, T value, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1229	    {
  1230	        return TrySet(key, value, out _, source);
  1231	    }
  1232	
  1233	    /// <summary>
  1234	    /// еҶҷе…Ҙзұ»еһӢе®үе…Ёеӯ—ж®өеҖјпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ–иҜҠж–ӯгҖӮ
  1235	    /// </summary>
  1236	    /// <typeparam name="T">еӯ—ж®өеҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</typeparam>
  1237	    /// <param name="key">еӯ—ж®ө stable key еҸҘжҹ„гҖӮ</param>
  1238	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1239	    /// <param name="report">еҶҷе…ҘиҜҠж–ӯжҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ</param>
  1240	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1241	    public bool TrySet<T>(DataKey<T> key, T value, out DataWriteReport report, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1242	    {
  1243	        return TrySetUntyped(key.StableKey, value, source, out report);
  1244	    }
  1245	
  1246	    /// <summary>
  1247	    /// еҶҷе…Ҙеӯ—ж®өеҖјгҖӮ
  1248	    /// </summary>
  1249	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1250	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1251	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1252	    public bool SetUntyped(string stableKey, object? value, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1253	    {
  1254	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1255	        return SetUntyped(definition, value, source);
  1256	    }
  1257	
  1258	    /// <summary>
  1259	    /// еҶҷе…Ҙеӯ—ж®өеҖјпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ–иҜҠж–ӯгҖӮ
  1260	    /// </summary>
  1261	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1262	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1263	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1264	    /// <param name="report">еҶҷе…ҘиҜҠж–ӯжҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ</param>
  1265	    public bool TrySetUntyped(string stableKey, object? value, DataWriteSource source, out DataWriteReport report)
  1266	    {
  1267	        report = new DataWriteReport(stableKey, source);
  1268	        if (!_catalog.TryGet(stableKey, out var definition))
  1269	        {
  1270	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1271	                "unknown_key",
  1272	                stableKey,
  1273	                $"жңӘжіЁеҶҢ DataDefinitionпјҡ{stableKey}",
  1274	                source,
  1275	                string.Empty,
  1276	                value?.GetType().Name,
  1277	                null,
  1278	                value?.ToString()));
  1279	            return false;
  1280	        }
  1281	
  1282	        return TrySetUntyped(definition, value, source, out report);
  1283	    }
  1284	
  1285	    /// <summary>
  1286	    /// дҪҝз”Ёе·Іи§Јжһҗ definition еҶҷе…Ҙеӯ—ж®өеҖјгҖӮ
  1287	    /// </summary>
  1288	    /// <param name="definition">еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ</param>
  1289	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1290	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1291	    public bool SetUntyped(DataDefinition definition, object? value, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1292	    {
  1293	        return TrySetUntyped(definition, value, source, out _);
  1294	    }
  1295	
  1296	    /// <summary>
  1297	    /// дҪҝз”Ёе·Іи§Јжһҗ definition еҶҷе…Ҙеӯ—ж®өеҖјпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ–иҜҠж–ӯгҖӮ
  1298	    /// </summary>
  1299	    /// <param name="definition">еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ</param>
  1300	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1301	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1302	    /// <param name="report">еҶҷе…ҘиҜҠж–ӯжҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ</param>
  1303	    public bool TrySetUntyped(DataDefinition definition, object? value, DataWriteSource source, out DataWriteReport report)
  1304	    {
  1305	        report = new DataWriteReport(definition.StableKey, source);
  1306	        if (!DataValueConverter.TryApplyWritePoliciesWithReport(definition, value, source, out var finalValue, out var error))
  1307	        {
  1308	            if (error != null)
  1309	            {
  1310	                report.AddError(error);
  1311	            }
  1312	
  1313	            return false;
  1314	        }
  1315	
  1316	        var slot = GetOrCreateSlot(definition);
  1317	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValue();
  1318	        if (!slot.SetValue(finalValue))
  1319	        {
  1320	            return false;
  1321	        }
  1322	
  1323	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(definition.StableKey);
  1324	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(definition.StableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValue()));
  1325	        return true;
  1326	    }
  1327	
  1328	    /// <summary>
  1329	    /// ж·»еҠ еӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1330	    /// </summary>
  1331	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1332	    /// <param name="modifier">дҝ®ж”№еҷЁе®һдҫӢгҖӮ</param>
  1333	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1334	    public bool AddModifier(string stableKey, DataModifier modifier, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1335	    {
  1336	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1337	        return TryAddModifierResolved(definition, stableKey, modifier, source, out _);
  1338	    }
  1339	
  1340	    /// <summary>
  1341	    /// ж·»еҠ еӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ–иҜҠж–ӯгҖӮ
  1342	    /// </summary>
  1343	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1344	    /// <param name="modifier">дҝ®ж”№еҷЁе®һдҫӢгҖӮ</param>
  1345	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1346	    /// <param name="report">еҶҷе…ҘиҜҠж–ӯжҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ</param>
  1347	    public bool TryAddModifier(string stableKey, DataModifier modifier, DataWriteSource source, out DataWriteReport report)
  1348	    {
  1349	        report = new DataWriteReport(stableKey, source);
  1350	        if (!_catalog.TryGet(stableKey, out var definition))
  1351	        {
  1352	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1353	                "unknown_key",
  1354	                stableKey,
  1355	                $"жңӘжіЁеҶҢ DataDefinitionпјҡ{stableKey}",
  1356	                source,
  1357	                string.Empty,
  1358	                modifier.GetType().Name,
  1359	                null,
  1360	                modifier.ToString()));
  1361	            return false;
  1362	        }
  1363	
  1364	        return TryAddModifierResolved(definition, stableKey, modifier, source, out report);
  1365	    }
  1366	
  1367	    private bool TryAddModifierResolved(
  1368	        DataDefinition definition,
  1369	        string stableKey,
  1370	        DataModifier modifier,
  1371	        DataWriteSource source,
  1372	        out DataWriteReport report)
  1373	    {
  1374	        report = new DataWriteReport(stableKey, source);
  1375	        if (!CanApplyModifier(definition, source))
  1376	        {
  1377	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1378	                "modifier_policy_rejected",
  1379	                stableKey,
  1380	                $"Data modifier policy жӢ’з»қеҶҷе…Ҙпјҡ{stableKey} ({definition.ModifierPolicy}, source={source})",
  1381	                source,
  1382	                definition.ValueType.ToString(),
  1383	                modifier.GetType().Name,
  1384	                definition.ModifierPolicy.ToString(),
  1385	                modifier.Value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)));
  1386	            return false;
  1387	        }
  1388	
  1389	        var slot = GetOrCreateSlot(definition);
  1390	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValue();
  1391	        if (!slot.AddModifier(modifier))
  1392	        {
  1393	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1394	                "duplicate_modifier",
  1395	                stableKey,
  1396	                $"Data modifier id йҮҚеӨҚпјҡ{stableKey} id={modifier.Id}",
  1397	                source,
  1398	                definition.ValueType.ToString(),
  1399	                modifier.GetType().Name,
  1400	                definition.ModifierPolicy.ToString(),
  1401	                modifier.Value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)));
  1402	            return false;
  1403	        }
  1404	
  1405	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(stableKey);
  1406	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(stableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValue()));
  1407	        return true;
  1408	    }
  1409	
  1410	    /// <summary>
  1411	    /// з§»йҷӨеӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1412	    /// </summary>
  1413	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1414	    /// <param name="modifierId">дҝ®ж”№еҷЁ idгҖӮ</param>
  1415	    public bool RemoveModifier(string stableKey, string modifierId)
  1416	    {
  1417	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1418	        var slot = GetOrCreateSlot(definition);
  1419	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValue();
  1420	        if (!slot.RemoveModifier(modifierId))
  1421	        {
  1422	            return false;
  1423	        }
  1424	
  1425	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(stableKey);
  1426	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(stableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValue()));
  1427	        return true;
  1428	    }
  1429	
  1430	    /// <summary>
  1431	    /// жҢүжқҘжәҗз§»йҷӨжүҖжңүеӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1432	    /// </summary>
  1433	    /// <param name="source">дҝ®ж”№еҷЁжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1434	    public int RemoveModifiersBySource(object? source)
  1435	    {
  1436	        if (source == null)
  1437	        {
  1438	            return 0;
  1439	        }
  1440	
  1441	        var removedTotal = 0;
  1442	        foreach (var pair in _slots)
  1443	        {
  1444	            var oldValue = pair.Value.GetEffectiveValue();
  1445	            var removed = pair.Value.RemoveModifiersBySource(source);
  1446	            if (removed == 0)
  1447	            {
  1448	                continue;
  1449	            }
  1450	
  1451	            removedTotal += removed;
  1452	            MarkDependentComputedDirty(pair.Key);
  1453	            Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(pair.Key, oldValue, pair.Value.GetEffectiveValue()));
  1454	        }
  1455	
  1456	        return removedTotal;
  1457	    }
  1458	
  1459	    /// <summary>
  1460	    /// жҢү id з§»йҷӨжүҖжңүеӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1461	    /// </summary>
  1462	    /// <param name="modifierId">дҝ®ж”№еҷЁ idгҖӮ</param>
  1463	    public int RemoveModifierById(string modifierId)
  1464	    {
  1465	        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(modifierId))
  1466	        {
  1467	            return 0;
  1468	        }
  1469	
  1470	        var removedTotal = 0;
  1471	        foreach (var pair in _slots)
  1472	        {
  1473	            var oldValue = pair.Value.GetEffectiveValue();
  1474	            var removed = pair.Value.RemoveModifier(modifierId) ? 1 : 0;
  1475	            if (removed == 0)
  1476	            {
  1477	                continue;
  1478	            }
  1479	
  1480	            removedTotal += removed;
  1481	            MarkDependentComputedDirty(pair.Key);
  1482	            Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(pair.Key, oldValue, pair.Value.GetEffectiveValue()));
  1483	        }
  1484	
  1485	        return removedTotal;
  1486	    }
  1487	
  1488	    /// <summary>
  1489	    /// иҺ·еҸ–еӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁеүҜжң¬гҖӮ
  1490	    /// </summary>
  1491	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1492	    public List<DataModifier> GetModifiers(string stableKey)
  1493	    {
  1494	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1495	        return GetOrCreateSlot(definition).GetModifiers();
  1496	    }
  1497	
  1498	    /// <summary>
  1499	    /// жё…йҷӨеӯ—ж®өжүҖжңүдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1500	    /// </summary>
  1501	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1502	    public bool ClearModifiers(string stableKey)
  1503	    {
  1504	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1505	        var slot = GetOrCreateSlot(definition);
  1506	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValue();
  1507	        if (!slot.ClearModifiers())
  1508	        {
  1509	            return false;
  1510	        }
  1511	
  1512	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(stableKey);
  1513	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(stableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValue()));
  1514	        return true;
  1515	    }
  1516	
  1517	    /// <summary>
  1518	    /// жё…йҷӨжүҖжңүеӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1519	    /// </summary>
  1520	    public int ClearAllModifiers()
  1521	    {
  1522	        var clearedTotal = 0;
  1523	        foreach (var pair in _slots)
  1524	        {
  1525	            var oldValue = pair.Value.GetEffectiveValue();
  1526	            if (!pair.Value.ClearModifiers())
  1527	            {
  1528	                continue;
  1529	            }
  1530	
  1531	            clearedTotal++;
  1532	            MarkDependentComputedDirty(pair.Key);
  1533	            Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(pair.Key, oldValue, pair.Value.GetEffectiveValue()));
  1534	        }
  1535	
  1536	        return clearedTotal;
  1537	    }
  1538	
  1539	    /// <summary>
  1540	    /// з§»йҷӨеӯ—ж®өиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјпјҢеҗҺз»ӯиҜ»еҸ–еӣһйҖҖ descriptor defaultгҖӮ
  1541	    /// </summary>
  1542	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1543	    public bool Remove(string stableKey)
  1544	    {
  1545	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1546	        var slot = GetOrCreateSlot(definition);
  1547	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValue();
  1548	        var valueChanged = slot.ClearValue();
  1549	        var modifiersChanged = slot.ClearModifiers();
  1550	        if (!valueChanged && !modifiersChanged)
  1551	        {
  1552	            return false;
  1553	        }
  1554	
  1555	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(stableKey);
  1556	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(stableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValue()));
  1557	        return true;
  1558	    }
  1559	
  1560	    /// <summary>
  1561	    /// жё…з©әжүҖжңүе·ІеҶҷе…ҘиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ
  1562	    /// </summary>
  1563	    public void Clear()
  1564	    {
  1565	        foreach (var pair in _slots)
  1566	        {
  1567	            var oldValue = pair.Value.GetEffectiveValue();
  1568	            var valueChanged = pair.Value.ClearValue();
  1569	            var modifiersChanged = pair.Value.ClearModifiers();
  1570	            if (valueChanged || modifiersChanged)
  1571	            {
  1572	                MarkDependentComputedDirty(pair.Key);
  1573	                Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(pair.Key, oldValue, pair.Value.GetEffectiveValue()));
  1574	            }
  1575	        }
  1576	
  1577	        _computedCache.Clear();
  1578	        _dirtyComputedKeys.Clear();
  1579	    }
  1580	
  1581	    /// <summary>
  1582	    /// иҺ·еҸ–еҪ“еүҚе·ІеҶҷе…ҘеҹәзЎҖеҖјеүҜжң¬гҖӮ
  1583	    /// </summary>
  1584	    public Dictionary<string, object?> GetAllValues()
  1585	    {
  1586	        var values = new Dictionary<string, object?>(StringComparer.Ordinal);
  1587	        foreach (var pair in _slots)
  1588	        {
  1589	            if (pair.Value.HasValue)
  1590	            {
  1591	                values[pair.Key] = pair.Value.Value;
  1592	            }
  1593	        }
  1594	
  1595	        return values;
  1596	    }
  1597	
  1598	    /// <summary>
  1599	    /// жЈҖжҹҘ computed еӯ—ж®өжҳҜеҗҰиў«дҫқиө–еҶҷе…Ҙж Үи„ҸгҖӮ
  1600	    /// </summary>
  1601	    /// <param name="stableKey">computed еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1602	    public bool IsComputedDirty(string stableKey)
  1603	    {
  1604	        return _dirtyComputedKeys.Contains(stableKey);
  1605	    }
  1606	
  1607	    private DataSlot GetOrCreateSlot(DataDefinition definition)
  1608	    {
  1609	        if (_slots.TryGetValue(definition.StableKey, out var slot))
  1610	        {
  1611	            return slot;
  1612	        }
  1613	
  1614	        slot = new DataSlot(definition);
  1615	        _slots[definition.StableKey] = slot;
  1616	        return slot;
  1617	    }
  1618	
  1619	    private object? GetComputedValue(DataDefinition definition)
  1620	    {
