  1208	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1209	        if (!DataValueConverter.IsCompatible<T>(definition.ValueType))
  1210	        {
  1211	            throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data.Get зұ»еһӢдёҚеҢ№й…Қпјҡ{stableKey} expected={definition.ValueType}, actual={typeof(T).Name}");
  1212	        }
  1213	
  1214	        return definition.IsComputed
  1215	            ? GetComputedValue<T>(definition)
  1216	            : GetOrCreateTypedSlot<T>(definition).GetEffectiveValue();
  1217	    }
  1218	
  1219	    /// <summary>
  1220	    /// еҶҷе…Ҙзұ»еһӢе®үе…Ёеӯ—ж®өеҖјгҖӮ
  1221	    /// </summary>
  1222	    /// <typeparam name="T">еӯ—ж®өеҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</typeparam>
  1223	    /// <param name="key">еӯ—ж®ө stable key еҸҘжҹ„гҖӮ</param>
  1224	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1225	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1226	    public bool Set<T>(DataKey<T> key, T value, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1227	    {
  1228	        return TrySet(key, value, out _, source);
  1229	    }
  1230	
  1231	    /// <summary>
  1232	    /// еҶҷе…Ҙзұ»еһӢе®үе…Ёеӯ—ж®өеҖјпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ–иҜҠж–ӯгҖӮ
  1233	    /// </summary>
  1234	    /// <typeparam name="T">еӯ—ж®өеҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</typeparam>
  1235	    /// <param name="key">еӯ—ж®ө stable key еҸҘжҹ„гҖӮ</param>
  1236	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1237	    /// <param name="report">еҶҷе…ҘиҜҠж–ӯжҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ</param>
  1238	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1239	    public bool TrySet<T>(DataKey<T> key, T value, out DataWriteReport report, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1240	    {
  1241	        report = new DataWriteReport(key.StableKey, source);
  1242	        if (!_catalog.TryGet(key.StableKey, out var definition))
  1243	        {
  1244	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1245	                "unknown_key",
  1246	                key.StableKey,
  1247	                $"жңӘжіЁеҶҢ DataDefinitionпјҡ{key.StableKey}",
  1248	                source,
  1249	                string.Empty,
  1250	                typeof(T).Name,
  1251	                null,
  1252	                value?.ToString()));
  1253	            return false;
  1254	        }
  1255	
  1256	        if (!DataValueConverter.IsCompatible<T>(definition.ValueType))
  1257	        {
  1258	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1259	                "wrong_clr_type",
  1260	                key.StableKey,
  1261	                $"Data value type дёҚеҢ№й…Қпјҡ{key.StableKey} ({definition.ValueType})",
  1262	                source,
  1263	                definition.ValueType.ToString(),
  1264	                typeof(T).Name,
  1265	                null,
  1266	                value?.ToString()));
  1267	            return false;
  1268	        }
  1269	
  1270	        if (!DataValueConverter.TryApplyWritePoliciesWithReport(definition, value, source, out var finalValue, out var error))
  1271	        {
  1272	            if (error != null)
  1273	            {
  1274	                report.AddError(error);
  1275	            }
  1276	
  1277	            return false;
  1278	        }
  1279	
  1280	        var slot = GetOrCreateTypedSlot<T>(definition);
  1281	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1282	        if (!slot.SetValueFromBoundary(finalValue))
  1283	        {
  1284	            return false;
  1285	        }
  1286	
  1287	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(definition.StableKey);
  1288	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(definition.StableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1289	        return true;
  1290	    }
  1291	
  1292	    /// <summary>
  1293	    /// еҶҷе…Ҙеӯ—ж®өеҖјгҖӮ
  1294	    /// </summary>
  1295	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1296	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1297	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1298	    public bool SetUntyped(string stableKey, object? value, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1299	    {
  1300	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1301	        return SetUntyped(definition, value, source);
  1302	    }
  1303	
  1304	    /// <summary>
  1305	    /// еҶҷе…Ҙеӯ—ж®өеҖјпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ–иҜҠж–ӯгҖӮ
  1306	    /// </summary>
  1307	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1308	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1309	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1310	    /// <param name="report">еҶҷе…ҘиҜҠж–ӯжҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ</param>
  1311	    public bool TrySetUntyped(string stableKey, object? value, DataWriteSource source, out DataWriteReport report)
  1312	    {
  1313	        report = new DataWriteReport(stableKey, source);
  1314	        if (!_catalog.TryGet(stableKey, out var definition))
  1315	        {
  1316	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1317	                "unknown_key",
  1318	                stableKey,
  1319	                $"жңӘжіЁеҶҢ DataDefinitionпјҡ{stableKey}",
  1320	                source,
  1321	                string.Empty,
  1322	                value?.GetType().Name,
  1323	                null,
  1324	                value?.ToString()));
  1325	            return false;
  1326	        }
  1327	
  1328	        return TrySetUntyped(definition, value, source, out report);
  1329	    }
  1330	
  1331	    /// <summary>
  1332	    /// дҪҝз”Ёе·Іи§Јжһҗ definition еҶҷе…Ҙеӯ—ж®өеҖјгҖӮ
  1333	    /// </summary>
  1334	    /// <param name="definition">еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ</param>
  1335	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1336	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1337	    public bool SetUntyped(DataDefinition definition, object? value, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1338	    {
  1339	        return TrySetUntyped(definition, value, source, out _);
  1340	    }
  1341	
  1342	    /// <summary>
  1343	    /// дҪҝз”Ёе·Іи§Јжһҗ definition еҶҷе…Ҙеӯ—ж®өеҖјпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ–иҜҠж–ӯгҖӮ
  1344	    /// </summary>
  1345	    /// <param name="definition">еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ</param>
  1346	    /// <param name="value">ж–°еҖјгҖӮ</param>
  1347	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1348	    /// <param name="report">еҶҷе…ҘиҜҠж–ӯжҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ</param>
  1349	    public bool TrySetUntyped(DataDefinition definition, object? value, DataWriteSource source, out DataWriteReport report)
  1350	    {
  1351	        report = new DataWriteReport(definition.StableKey, source);
  1352	        if (!DataValueConverter.TryApplyWritePoliciesWithReport(definition, value, source, out var finalValue, out var error))
  1353	        {
  1354	            if (error != null)
  1355	            {
  1356	                report.AddError(error);
  1357	            }
  1358	
  1359	            return false;
  1360	        }
  1361	
  1362	        var slot = GetOrCreateBoundarySlot(definition, finalValue);
  1363	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1364	        if (!slot.SetValueFromBoundary(finalValue))
  1365	        {
  1366	            return false;
  1367	        }
  1368	
  1369	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(definition.StableKey);
  1370	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(definition.StableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1371	        return true;
  1372	    }
  1373	
  1374	    /// <summary>
  1375	    /// ж·»еҠ еӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1376	    /// </summary>
  1377	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1378	    /// <param name="modifier">дҝ®ж”№еҷЁе®һдҫӢгҖӮ</param>
  1379	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1380	    public bool AddModifier(string stableKey, DataModifier modifier, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1381	    {
  1382	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1383	        return TryAddModifierResolved(definition, stableKey, modifier, source, out _);
  1384	    }
  1385	
  1386	    /// <summary>
  1387	    /// ж·»еҠ еӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ–иҜҠж–ӯгҖӮ
  1388	    /// </summary>
  1389	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1390	    /// <param name="modifier">дҝ®ж”№еҷЁе®һдҫӢгҖӮ</param>
  1391	    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1392	    /// <param name="report">еҶҷе…ҘиҜҠж–ӯжҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ</param>
  1393	    public bool TryAddModifier(string stableKey, DataModifier modifier, DataWriteSource source, out DataWriteReport report)
  1394	    {
  1395	        report = new DataWriteReport(stableKey, source);
  1396	        if (!_catalog.TryGet(stableKey, out var definition))
  1397	        {
  1398	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1399	                "unknown_key",
  1400	                stableKey,
  1401	                $"жңӘжіЁеҶҢ DataDefinitionпјҡ{stableKey}",
  1402	                source,
  1403	                string.Empty,
  1404	                modifier.GetType().Name,
  1405	                null,
  1406	                modifier.ToString()));
  1407	            return false;
  1408	        }
  1409	
  1410	        return TryAddModifierResolved(definition, stableKey, modifier, source, out report);
  1411	    }
  1412	
  1413	    private bool TryAddModifierResolved(
  1414	        DataDefinition definition,
  1415	        string stableKey,
  1416	        DataModifier modifier,
  1417	        DataWriteSource source,
  1418	        out DataWriteReport report)
  1419	    {
  1420	        report = new DataWriteReport(stableKey, source);
  1421	        if (!CanApplyModifier(definition, source))
  1422	        {
  1423	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1424	                "modifier_policy_rejected",
  1425	                stableKey,
  1426	                $"Data modifier policy жӢ’з»қеҶҷе…Ҙпјҡ{stableKey} ({definition.ModifierPolicy}, source={source})",
  1427	                source,
  1428	                definition.ValueType.ToString(),
  1429	                modifier.GetType().Name,
  1430	                definition.ModifierPolicy.ToString(),
  1431	                modifier.Value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)));
  1432	            return false;
  1433	        }
  1434	
  1435	        var slot = GetOrCreateBoundarySlot(definition);
  1436	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1437	        if (!slot.AddModifier(modifier))
  1438	        {
  1439	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1440	                "duplicate_modifier",
  1441	                stableKey,
  1442	                $"Data modifier id йҮҚеӨҚпјҡ{stableKey} id={modifier.Id}",
  1443	                source,
  1444	                definition.ValueType.ToString(),
  1445	                modifier.GetType().Name,
  1446	                definition.ModifierPolicy.ToString(),
  1447	                modifier.Value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)));
  1448	            return false;
  1449	        }
  1450	
  1451	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(stableKey);
  1452	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(stableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1453	        return true;
  1454	    }
  1455	
  1456	    /// <summary>
  1457	    /// з§»йҷӨеӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1458	    /// </summary>
  1459	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1460	    /// <param name="modifierId">дҝ®ж”№еҷЁ idгҖӮ</param>
  1461	    public bool RemoveModifier(string stableKey, string modifierId)
  1462	    {
  1463	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1464	        var slot = GetOrCreateBoundarySlot(definition);
  1465	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1466	        if (!slot.RemoveModifier(modifierId))
  1467	        {
  1468	            return false;
  1469	        }
  1470	
  1471	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(stableKey);
  1472	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(stableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1473	        return true;
  1474	    }
  1475	
  1476	    /// <summary>
  1477	    /// жҢүжқҘжәҗз§»йҷӨжүҖжңүеӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1478	    /// </summary>
  1479	    /// <param name="source">дҝ®ж”№еҷЁжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
  1480	    public int RemoveModifiersBySource(object? source)
  1481	    {
  1482	        if (source == null)
  1483	        {
  1484	            return 0;
  1485	        }
  1486	
  1487	        var removedTotal = 0;
  1488	        foreach (var pair in _slots)
  1489	        {
  1490	            var oldValue = pair.Value.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1491	            var removed = pair.Value.RemoveModifiersBySource(source);
  1492	            if (removed == 0)
  1493	            {
  1494	                continue;
  1495	            }
  1496	
  1497	            removedTotal += removed;
  1498	            MarkDependentComputedDirty(pair.Key);
  1499	            Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(pair.Key, oldValue, pair.Value.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1500	        }
  1501	
  1502	        return removedTotal;
  1503	    }
  1504	
  1505	    /// <summary>
  1506	    /// жҢү id з§»йҷӨжүҖжңүеӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1507	    /// </summary>
  1508	    /// <param name="modifierId">дҝ®ж”№еҷЁ idгҖӮ</param>
  1509	    public int RemoveModifierById(string modifierId)
  1510	    {
  1511	        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(modifierId))
  1512	        {
  1513	            return 0;
  1514	        }
  1515	
  1516	        var removedTotal = 0;
  1517	        foreach (var pair in _slots)
  1518	        {
  1519	            var oldValue = pair.Value.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1520	            var removed = pair.Value.RemoveModifier(modifierId) ? 1 : 0;
  1521	            if (removed == 0)
  1522	            {
  1523	                continue;
  1524	            }
  1525	
  1526	            removedTotal += removed;
  1527	            MarkDependentComputedDirty(pair.Key);
  1528	            Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(pair.Key, oldValue, pair.Value.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1529	        }
  1530	
  1531	        return removedTotal;
  1532	    }
  1533	
  1534	    /// <summary>
  1535	    /// иҺ·еҸ–еӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁеүҜжң¬гҖӮ
  1536	    /// </summary>
  1537	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1538	    public List<DataModifier> GetModifiers(string stableKey)
  1539	    {
  1540	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1541	        return GetOrCreateBoundarySlot(definition).GetModifiers();
  1542	    }
  1543	
  1544	    /// <summary>
  1545	    /// жё…йҷӨеӯ—ж®өжүҖжңүдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1546	    /// </summary>
  1547	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1548	    public bool ClearModifiers(string stableKey)
  1549	    {
  1550	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1551	        var slot = GetOrCreateBoundarySlot(definition);
  1552	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1553	        if (!slot.ClearModifiers())
  1554	        {
  1555	            return false;
  1556	        }
  1557	
  1558	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(stableKey);
  1559	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(stableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1560	        return true;
  1561	    }
  1562	
  1563	    /// <summary>
  1564	    /// жё…йҷӨжүҖжңүеӯ—ж®өдҝ®ж”№еҷЁгҖӮ
  1565	    /// </summary>
  1566	    public int ClearAllModifiers()
  1567	    {
  1568	        var clearedTotal = 0;
  1569	        foreach (var pair in _slots)
  1570	        {
  1571	            var oldValue = pair.Value.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1572	            if (!pair.Value.ClearModifiers())
  1573	            {
  1574	                continue;
  1575	            }
  1576	
  1577	            clearedTotal++;
  1578	            MarkDependentComputedDirty(pair.Key);
  1579	            Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(pair.Key, oldValue, pair.Value.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1580	        }
  1581	
  1582	        return clearedTotal;
  1583	    }
  1584	
  1585	    /// <summary>
  1586	    /// з§»йҷӨеӯ—ж®өиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјпјҢеҗҺз»ӯиҜ»еҸ–еӣһйҖҖ descriptor defaultгҖӮ
  1587	    /// </summary>
  1588	    /// <param name="stableKey">еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1589	    public bool Remove(string stableKey)
  1590	    {
  1591	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1592	        var slot = GetOrCreateBoundarySlot(definition);
  1593	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1594	        var valueChanged = slot.ClearValue();
  1595	        var modifiersChanged = slot.ClearModifiers();
  1596	        if (!valueChanged && !modifiersChanged)
  1597	        {
  1598	            return false;
  1599	        }
  1600	
  1601	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(stableKey);
  1602	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(stableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1603	        return true;
  1604	    }
  1605	
  1606	    /// <summary>
  1607	    /// жё…з©әжүҖжңүе·ІеҶҷе…ҘиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ
  1608	    /// </summary>
  1609	    public void Clear()
  1610	    {
  1611	        foreach (var pair in _slots)
  1612	        {
  1613	            var oldValue = pair.Value.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1614	            var valueChanged = pair.Value.ClearValue();
  1615	            var modifiersChanged = pair.Value.ClearModifiers();
  1616	            if (valueChanged || modifiersChanged)
  1617	            {
  1618	                MarkDependentComputedDirty(pair.Key);
  1619	                Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(pair.Key, oldValue, pair.Value.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1620	            }
  1621	        }
  1622	
  1623	        _dirtyComputedKeys.Clear();
  1624	    }
  1625	
  1626	    /// <summary>
  1627	    /// иҺ·еҸ–еҪ“еүҚе·ІеҶҷе…ҘеҹәзЎҖеҖјеүҜжң¬гҖӮ
  1628	    /// </summary>
  1629	    public Dictionary<string, object?> GetAllValues()
  1630	    {
  1631	        var values = new Dictionary<string, object?>(StringComparer.Ordinal);
  1632	        foreach (var pair in _slots)
  1633	        {
  1634	            if (pair.Value.HasValue)
  1635	            {
  1636	                values[pair.Key] = pair.Value.GetStoredValueForDiagnostics();
  1637	            }
  1638	        }
  1639	
  1640	        return values;
  1641	    }
  1642	
  1643	    /// <summary>
  1644	    /// жЈҖжҹҘ computed еӯ—ж®өжҳҜеҗҰиў«дҫқиө–еҶҷе…Ҙж Үи„ҸгҖӮ
  1645	    /// </summary>
  1646	    /// <param name="stableKey">computed еӯ—ж®ө stable keyгҖӮ</param>
  1647	    public bool IsComputedDirty(string stableKey)
  1648	    {
  1649	        return _dirtyComputedKeys.Contains(stableKey);
  1650	    }
  1651	
  1652	    private DataSlot<T> GetOrCreateTypedSlot<T>(DataDefinition definition)
  1653	    {
  1654	        if (_slots.TryGetValue(definition.StableKey, out var existing))
  1655	        {
  1656	            if (existing is DataSlot<T> typedSlot)
  1657	            {
  1658	                return typedSlot;
  1659	            }
  1660	
  1661	            return ReplaceSlot<T>(definition, existing);
  1662	        }
  1663	
  1664	        var slot = new DataSlot<T>(definition);
  1665	        _slots[definition.StableKey] = slot;
  1666	        return slot;
  1667	    }
  1668	
  1669	    private IDataSlot GetOrCreateBoundarySlot(DataDefinition definition, object? value = null)
  1670	    {
  1671	        if (_slots.TryGetValue(definition.StableKey, out var slot))
  1672	        {
  1673	            return slot;
  1674	        }
  1675	
  1676	        slot = CreateSlot(ResolveBoundarySlotType(definition, value), definition);
  1677	        _slots[definition.StableKey] = slot;
  1678	        return slot;
  1679	    }
  1680	
  1681	    private T GetComputedValue<T>(DataDefinition definition)
  1682	    {
  1683	        var slot = GetOrCreateTypedSlot<T>(definition);
  1684	        if (!_dirtyComputedKeys.Contains(definition.StableKey) && slot.HasValue)
  1685	        {
  1686	            return slot.GetEffectiveValue();
  1687	        }
  1688	
  1689	        if (_computeContext == null)
  1690	        {
  1691	            throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data computed resolver зјәе°‘ Data дёҠдёӢж–Үпјҡ{definition.StableKey}");
  1692	        }
  1693	
  1694	        var resolver = _catalog.ComputeRegistry.GetRequired(definition.ComputeId);
  1695	        var rawValue = resolver.Compute(_computeContext, definition);
  1696	        if (!DataValueConverter.TryConvert(rawValue, definition.ValueType, out var computedValue, out var error))
  1697	        {
  1698	            throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data computed resolver иҝ”еӣһеҖјзұ»еһӢдёҚеҢ№й…Қпјҡ{definition.StableKey} ({definition.ValueType}) {error}");
  1699	        }
  1700	
  1701	        slot.SetValueFromBoundary(computedValue);
  1702	        _dirtyComputedKeys.Remove(definition.StableKey);
  1703	        return slot.GetEffectiveValue();
  1704	    }
  1705	
  1706	    private DataSlot<T> ReplaceSlot<T>(DataDefinition definition, IDataSlot existing)
  1707	    {
  1708	        var replacement = new DataSlot<T>(definition);
  1709	        if (existing.HasValue)
  1710	        {
  1711	            replacement.SetValueFromBoundary(existing.GetStoredValueForDiagnostics());
  1712	        }
  1713	
  1714	        var modifiers = existing.GetModifiers();
  1715	        for (var i = 0; i < modifiers.Count; i++)
  1716	        {
  1717	            replacement.AddModifier(modifiers[i]);
  1718	        }
  1719	
  1720	        _slots[definition.StableKey] = replacement;
  1721	        return replacement;
  1722	    }
  1723	
  1724	    private static IDataSlot CreateSlot(Type valueType, DataDefinition definition)
  1725	    {
  1726	        return (IDataSlot)Activator.CreateInstance(typeof(DataSlot<>).MakeGenericType(valueType), definition)!;
  1727	    }
  1728	
  1729	    private static Type ResolveBoundarySlotType(DataDefinition definition, object? value)
  1730	    {
  1731	        if (definition.ValueType == DataValueType.ObjectRef
  1732	            && value != null
  1733	            && value is not ResourceRef
  1734	            && !value.GetType().IsValueType)
  1735	        {
  1736	            return value.GetType();
  1737	        }
  1738

If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.\n</skills_instructions>"

жіЁйҮҠиҰҒз”Ёдёӯж–Ү\n- дёҚзЎ®е®ҡе°ұиҜҙжҳҺпјҢдёҚиҰҒзҢңгҖӮ\n- еӨ§д»»еҠЎе…Ҳи®ЎеҲ’пјҢеҶҚжү§иЎҢгҖӮ\n- ж”№ж–Үд»¶еүҚе…ҲиҜ»зӣёе…іж–Үд»¶пјҢж”№е®ҢжҖ»з»“ж”№еҠЁе’ҢйӘҢиҜҒз»“жһңгҖӮ\n- еӯҗд»ЈзҗҶй…ҚзҪ®гҖӮз”Ёжі•пјҡ`semble search \"<query>\" [path]`пјҢ`semble find-related <file> <line> [path]`гҖӮ\n- Godot C# жһ„е»әдјҳе…Ҳ `dotnet build`пјҢеҝ…иҰҒж—¶ `godot --headless --build-solutions иҫ№з•ҢпјҲе·ҘдҪңеҢәж № / SlimeAI/ / Games/<Game>/пјүеҲҶеҲ« commitгҖӮ\n- **й»ҳи®ӨдёҚиҰҒ `git push`**гҖӮpush еҝ…йЎ»з”ЁжҲ·жҳҺзЎ®зЎ®и®ӨжҲ–еңЁиҮӘеҠЁеҢ–д»»еҠЎзҡ„ `--push` жҳҫејҸж Үи®°дёӢжү§иЎҢгҖӮ\n- зҰҒжӯў `git push --force`гҖҒ`git reset --hard <remote>`гҖҒ`git rebase --onto`гҖҒ`git filter-branch` зӯүж”№еҶҷеҺҶеҸІзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңпјҢйҷӨйқһз”ЁжҲ·жҳҺзЎ®иҰҒжұӮе№¶иҜҙжҳҺеӣһж»ҡйў„жЎҲгҖӮ\n- зҰҒжӯўи·Ёд»“еә“жҠҠдёҖдёӘ git иҫ№з•Ңзҡ„ж”№еҠЁ add еҲ°еҸҰдёҖдёӘд»“еә“гҖӮ\n- е®ҢжҲҗ OpenSpec change ж—¶пјҢ**archive + baseline еҗҲе…Ҙ + commit жҳҜй»ҳи®ӨеҠЁдҪң**пјҢдёҚеҶҚиҰҒжұӮз”ЁжҲ·еҚ•зӢ¬жҺҲжқғгҖӮpush д»ҚйңҖзЎ®и®ӨгҖӮ\n\n## Safety\n\n- еҚұйҷ©е‘Ҫд»Өеҝ…йЎ»е…ҲзЎ®и®Өпјҡ`rm -rf`, `git reset --hard`, `git clean -fd`, `git push --force`, еҲ йҷӨеӨ§йҮҸж–Үд»¶, иҰҶзӣ–й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶гҖӮ\n- еҰӮжһң sandbox / bwrap еҜјиҮҙе‘Ҫд»ӨеӨұиҙҘпјҢдёҚиҰҒеҸҚеӨҚйҮҚиҜ•еҗҢдёҖе‘Ҫд»ӨпјӣжҚўеҹәзЎҖе‘Ҫд»ӨжҲ–иҜҙжҳҺйңҖиҰҒжҺҲжқғгҖӮ\n\n<!-- context7 -->\nUse the `ctx7` CLI to fetch current documentation whenever the user asks about a library, framework, SDK, API, CLI tool, or cloud service -- even well-known ones like React, Next.js, Prisma, Express, Tailwind, Django, or Spring Boot. This includes API syntax, configuration, version migration, library-specific debugging, setup instructions, and CLI tool usage. Use even when you think you know the answer -- your training data may not reflect recent changes. Prefer this over web search for library docs.\n\nDo not use for: refactoring, writing scripts from scratch, debugging business logic, code review, or general programming concepts.\n\n## Steps\n\n1. Resolve library: `npx ctx7@latest library <name> \"<user's question>\"` вҖ” use the official library name with proper punctuation (e.g., \"Next.js\" not \"nextjs\", \"Customer.io\" not \"customerio\", \"Three.js\" not \"threejs\")\n2. Pick the best match (ID format: `/org/project`) by: exact name match, description relevance, code snippet count, source reputation (High/Medium preferred), and benchmark score (higher is better). If results don't look right, try alternate names or queries (e.g., \"next.js\" not \"nextjs\", or rephrase the question)\n3. Fetch docs: `npx ctx7@latest docs <libraryId> \"<user's question>\"`\n4. Answer using the fetched documentation\n\nYou MUST call `library` first to get a valid ID unless the user provides one directly in `/org/project` format. Use the user's full question as the query -- specific and detailed queries return better results than vague single words. Do not run more than 3 commands per question. Do not include sensitive information (API keys, passwords, credentials) in queries.\n\nFor version-specific docs, use `/org/project/version` from the `library` output (e.g., `/vercel/next.js/v14.3.0`).\n\nIf a command fails with a quota error, inform the user and suggest `npx ctx7@latest login` or setting `CONTEXT7_API_KEY` env var for higher limits. Do not silently fall back to training data.\nRun Context7 CLI requests outside Codex's default sandbox. If a Context7 CLI command fails with DNS or network errors such as ENOTFOUND, host resolution failures, or fetch failed, rerun it outside the sandbox instead of retrying inside the sandbox.\n<!-- жЁЎеқ—дәӢе®һжәҗпјҡRuntime owner иҜ» `DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/<Entity|Data|Event|System>/`пјӣеҠҹиғҪ owner иҜ» `DocsAI/ECS/Capabilities/<owner>/`пјӣе·Ҙе…·е’Ң UI иҜ» `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/<owner>/`гҖҒ`DocsAI/ECS/UI/`гҖӮ\n- Data еҪ“еүҚиҜҙжҳҺпјҡ`DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/Data/Dataзі»з»ҹиҜҙжҳҺ.md`\n- и®ҫи®ЎжҖқиҖғпјҡ`DocsAI/жҖқиҖғ/`\n- жөҒзЁӢе·Ҙе…·пјҡ`Workspace/SystemAgent/README.md`\n- Godot еңәжҷҜжөӢиҜ•пјҡ`Src/ECS/Test/**` жөӢиҜ•жәҗз ҒгҖҒ`Games/BrotatoLike/Tools/run-godot-scene.sh`\n\n## дәӢе®һжәҗиҫ№з•Ң\n\n- `DocsAI/`пјҡжЎҶжһ¶ж–ҮжЎЈз»ҹдёҖе…ҘеҸЈпјҢAI-first и®ҫи®ЎгҖӮй»ҳи®ӨжҢү `Runtime / Capabilities / Tools / UI` иҒҡеҗҲпјӣowner ж–ҮжЎЈдјҳе…Ҳжңүжё…жҷ° `README.md` жҲ–е®Ңж•ҙдәӢе®һжәҗж–ҮжЎЈпјҢConcept / Usage / Tests / InputMap зӯүеҸӘжҳҜеҸҜйҖүеҲҶеұӮпјҢдёҚејәеҲ¶жӢҶеҲҶгҖӮж—§ `System/`гҖҒ`Component/`гҖҒ`Entity/`гҖҒ`Data/`гҖҒ`Event/` еҸӘдҪңдёәиҝҒз§»иҝҪжәҜпјҢдёҚдҪңдёәж–°д»»еҠЎе…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ\n- `SDD/`пјҡдёӯеӨ§еһӢд»»еҠЎи®ҫи®ЎгҖҒиҝӣеәҰгҖҒжү§иЎҢи®°еҝҶгҖӮйЎ№зӣ®зә§ SDD еңЁ `SDD/project/projects/`гҖӮ\n- `Src/ECS/**`пјҡжәҗз Ғе…ҘеҸЈпјӣжЎҶжһ¶ Markdown ж–ҮжЎЈз»ҹдёҖз”ұ `DocsAI/ECS/` з®ЎзҗҶпјҢ`Src/ECS` дёҚдҝқз•ҷжЎҶжһ¶ж–ҮжЎЈгҖӮ\n- `.ai-config/skills/*`пјҡе”ҜдёҖеҸҜз»ҙжҠӨ skill жәҗпјҢдҝқеӯҳ skill и·Ҝз”ұгҖҒе‘Ҫд»ӨгҖҒreference е’Ңи„ҡжң¬е…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ\n- `.ai-config/rules/rules.md`пјҡrule жәҗгҖӮ\n- `.claude/.codex.devin.trae/skills`гҖҒ`AGENTS.md`гҖҒ`CLAUDE.md`гҖҒ`.devin/rules/devinrules.md`пјҡеҗҢжӯҘеүҜжң¬пјҢдёҚзӣҙжҺҘз»ҙжҠӨгҖӮ\n- `.claude/settings.json`гҖҒ`.claude/agents/`гҖҒ`.codex/hooks.json`гҖҒ`.codex/agents/`гҖҒ`.codex/config.toml`пјҡhook/subagent иҝҗиЎҢй…ҚзҪ®пјҢзӣҙжҺҘз»ҙжҠӨпјҢдёҚиө° `.ai-config` еҗҢжӯҘгҖӮ\n- `Workspace/SystemAgent/`пјҡжөҒзЁӢгҖҒи§’иүІгҖҒgateгҖҒhookгҖҒskill-test е·Ҙе…·гҖӮ\n- `Workspace/SDD/`пјҡSDD CLIгҖҒжЁЎжқҝе’Ңж ЎйӘҢи§„еҲҷгҖӮ\n- `Workspace/DocsAI/`пјҡе·ҘдҪңеҢәзә§ж–ҮжЎЈпјҲGit submoduleгҖҒеӨҡжёёжҲҸжһ¶жһ„гҖҒAI жөҒзЁӢпјүпјҢдёҺжЎҶжһ¶ж–ҮжЎЈеҲҶзҰ»гҖӮ\n- `openspec/`пјҡд»…дҝқз•ҷеҺҶеҸІиө„дә§е’ҢжҳҫејҸе…је®№з»ҙжҠӨе…ҘеҸЈпјҢдёҚдҪңдёәй»ҳи®Өи®ЎеҲ’жҲ–жү§иЎҢе…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ\n\n## дҝ®ж”№и§„еҲҷ\n\n- й»ҳи®Өдёӯж–Үеӣһзӯ”пјӣе‘Ҫд»ӨгҖҒд»Јз ҒгҖҒй”ҷиҜҜдҝЎжҒҜдҝқз•ҷеҺҹж–ҮгҖӮ\n- ж”№ж–Үд»¶еүҚе…ҲиҜ»зӣёе…іж–Үд»¶пјӣж¶үеҸҠж–Үд»¶дҝ®ж”№ж—¶еүҚеҗҺиҝҗиЎҢ `git status --short`гҖӮ\n- еӨ§еһӢеҠҹиғҪгҖҒжһ¶жһ„еҸҳжӣҙгҖҒи·ЁжЁЎеқ—йҮҚжһ„гҖҒй•ҝжңҹи®ҫи®ЎеҶізӯ–дјҳе…ҲдҪҝз”Ё SDDгҖӮ\n- дёҚиҰҒжҠҠ BrotatoLike дё“еұһзҺ©жі•гҖҒUIгҖҒиө„дә§и·Ҝеҫ„дёҠжҸҗдёәжЎҶжһ¶й»ҳи®ӨгҖӮ\n- дёҚйҡҸж„ҸеҠ дҫқиө–гҖҒеӨ§йҮҚжһ„гҖӮAI еҸҜиҮӘеҠЁ commitпјҲйңҖе…Ҳ `git status --short` + жҳҺзЎ® messageпјүпјӣpush йңҖзЎ®и®ӨгҖӮ\n- дёҚиҰҶзӣ–гҖҒеӣһж»ҡгҖҒеҲ йҷӨз”ЁжҲ·е·Іжңүж”№еҠЁгҖӮ\n\n## Git ж“ҚдҪңзәҰжқҹ\n\n- жү§иЎҢд»»дҪ• git ж“ҚдҪңеүҚпјҢе…ҲзЎ®и®ӨеҪ“еүҚ Git иҫ№з•ҢгҖӮ\n- жӣҙж–°жёёжҲҸд»“зҡ„ SlimeAI submoduleпјҡдјҳе…ҲдҪҝз”Ё VSCode Task `update: BrotatoLike SlimeAI Submodule`гҖӮ\n- жүӢеҠЁжӣҙж–°ж—¶пјҡ\n  1. `cd Games/<Game>`пјҲдёҚжҳҜжЎҶжһ¶д»“пјү\n  2. `git submodule update --remote SlimeAI`\n  3. еҰӮжҠҘй”ҷ\"жңӘи·ҹиёӘж–Үд»¶е°Ҷиў«иҰҶзӣ–\"пјҡе…ҲеңЁ `SlimeAI/` зӣ®еҪ•еҶ…еӨ„зҗҶпјҲжҸҗдәӨеҲ°жЎҶжһ¶д»“жҲ– `git clean -fd`пјү\n  4. жңҖеҗҺеңЁжёёжҲҸд»“ `git add SlimeAI && git commit`\n- зҰҒжӯўеңЁжёёжҲҸд»“зҡ„ `SlimeAI/` зӣ®еҪ•еҶ…зӣҙжҺҘеҒҡдёҡеҠЎж”№еҠЁгҖӮ\n- `**/*.uid` е·ІеңЁжЎҶжһ¶д»“ `.gitignore` дёӯе…ЁеұҖеҝҪз•ҘпјӣеҰӮеҸ‘зҺ°жңӘи·ҹиёӘ `.uid` ж–Үд»¶пјҢе…ҲзЎ®и®Ө `.gitignore` жҳҜеҗҰз”ҹж•ҲгҖӮ\n\n## е·ҘдҪңеҢәи§ҶйҮҺзәҰжқҹ\n\n- ж—ҘеёёејҖеҸ‘е…іжіЁпјҡеҪ“еүҚд»“пјҲ`Src/`гҖҒ`SDD/`гҖҒ`DocsAI/`гҖҒ`.ai-config/`пјүгҖҒ`Games/BrotatoLike/`\n- `Resources/Engine/` вҖ”вҖ” еј•ж“Һжәҗз ҒдёҺжЎҶжһ¶еҲҶжһҗжҠҘе‘ҠпјҢз ”з©¶еҸӮиҖғж—¶жҹҘйҳ…\n- `Resources/Games/` вҖ”вҖ” з ҙи§ЈжёёжҲҸйҖҶеҗ‘зҙ жқҗдёҺеҲҶжһҗж–ҮжЎЈпјҢжёёжҲҸжңәеҲ¶еҸӮиҖғж—¶жҹҘйҳ…\n- `Resources/Agent/` вҖ”вҖ” еӨ–йғЁ AI йЎ№зӣ®еҲҶжһҗпјҢagent е·ҘдҪңжөҒеҸӮиҖғж—¶жҹҘйҳ…\n- `Resources/Else/` вҖ”вҖ” ж—§жЎҶжһ¶д»Јз ҒпјҢд»…иҝҒз§»еҜ№з…§пјҢзҰҒжӯўдҪңдёәдәӢе®һжәҗ\n\n## AI й…ҚзҪ®з»ҹдёҖжәҗ\n\nжң¬д»“еҗҢж—¶з»ҙжҠӨ ClaudeгҖҒCodexгҖҒDevinгҖҒTrae зҡ„ skillгҖҒruleгҖҒcommandгҖҒhook е’Ң subagentгҖӮ**skill/rule/command дҪҝз”Ё `.ai-config` з»ҹдёҖжәҗпјӣhook/subagent зӣҙжҺҘеҶҷе·Ҙе…·йЎ№зӣ®й…ҚзҪ®гҖӮ**\n\n| зұ»еһӢ | з»ҙжҠӨдҪҚзҪ® | еүҜжң¬дҪҚзҪ® | еҗҢжӯҘж–№ејҸ |\n| ---- | ------ | -------- | -------- |\n| Skill | `.ai-config/skills/<category>/<name>/SKILL.md` | `.codex/skills/`гҖҒ`.claude/skills/`гҖҒ`.devin/skills/`гҖҒ`.trae/skills/`пјҲжү“е№іпјү | `bash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh` |\n| Rule | `.ai-config/rules/rules.md` | `AGENTS.md`гҖҒ`CLAUDE.md`гҖҒ`.devin/rules/devinrules.md`пјҲTrae е…ұз”Ё AGENTS.mdпјү | еҗҢдёҠпјҲDevin еүҜжң¬з”ұи„ҡжң¬иҮӘеҠЁиҝҪеҠ  frontmatterпјү |\n| Command | `.ai-config/skills/<category>/<name>/SKILL.md` | `.claude/commands/opsx/*.md`пјҲд»…е…је®№е‘Ҫд»ӨйңҖиҰҒж—¶з”ҹжҲҗпјү | еҗҢдёҠпјҲи„ҡжң¬иҮӘеҠЁиҪ¬жҚўж јејҸпјү |\n| Claude hook | `.claude/settings.json` | ж— еүҜжң¬ | зӣҙжҺҘз»ҙжҠӨ |\n| Claude subagent | `.claude/agents/*.md` | ж— еүҜжң¬ | зӣҙжҺҘз»ҙжҠӨ |\n| Codex hook | `.codex/hooks.json` | ж— еүҜжң¬ | зӣҙжҺҘз»ҙжҠӨ |\n| Codex subagent | `.codex/agents/*.toml`гҖҒ`.codex/config.toml` | ж— еүҜжң¬ | зӣҙжҺҘз»ҙжҠӨ |\n\n**skill/rule/command еҸӘж”№ `.ai-config/`пјҢдёҚж”№еүҜжң¬**гҖӮи„ҡжң¬йҖҡиҝҮйҒҚеҺҶе®һзҺ°пјҢдёҚзЎ¬зј–з ҒеҲҶзұ»еҗҚпјӣ`.ai-config/skills/` дёӢдёҖеұӮзӣ®еҪ•дҪңдёәеҲҶзұ»пјҢskill зӣ®еҪ•еңЁеҲҶзұ»дёӢпјҢеҗҢжӯҘж—¶иҮӘеҠЁжү“е№іеҲ°еҗ„е·Ҙе…·йЎ¶еұӮгҖӮ\n\n**зҰҒжӯўзӣҙжҺҘдҝ®ж”№еҗҢжӯҘеүҜжң¬**пјҡ`.codex/skills/`гҖҒ`.claude/skills/`гҖҒ`.devin/skills/`гҖҒ`.trae/skills/`гҖҒ`.claude/commands/opsx/`гҖҒ`AGENTS.md`гҖҒ`CLAUDE.md`гҖҒ`.devin/rules/devinrules.md`гҖӮ\nж”№е®ҢеҗҺ**еҝ…йЎ»**иҝҗиЎҢ `bash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh`пјҢеҗҰеҲҷеүҜжң¬дјҡиў«дёӢж¬ЎеҗҢжӯҘиҰҶзӣ–гҖӮ\n\n**е…Ғи®ёзӣҙжҺҘдҝ®ж”№йЎ№зӣ®иҝҗиЎҢй…ҚзҪ®**пјҡ`.claude/settings.json`гҖҒ`.claude/agents/`гҖҒ`.codex/hooks.json`гҖҒ`.codex/agents/`гҖҒ`.codex/config.toml`гҖӮиҝҷдәӣдёҚжҳҜ `.ai-config` еҗҢжӯҘеүҜжң¬гҖӮ\n\n## SDD е·ҘдҪңжөҒ\n\n- SDD жҳҜдёӯеӨ§еһӢд»»еҠЎзҡ„й»ҳи®Өи®ЎеҲ’гҖҒжү§иЎҢи®°еҝҶе’ҢжҒўеӨҚдәӢе®һжәҗпјӣж јејҸдёҺ CLI д»Ҙ `Workspace/SDD/` дёәеҮҶгҖӮ\n- еӨ§еһӢеҠҹиғҪгҖҒжһ¶жһ„еҸҳжӣҙгҖҒи·ЁжЁЎеқ—йҮҚжһ„гҖҒй•ҝжңҹи®ҫи®ЎеҶізӯ–гҖҒиҝҒз§»иҙҰжң¬е’Ңи·Ёзӣ®еҪ•ж–ҮжЎЈжІ»зҗҶпјҢдјҳе…Ҳиҝӣе…Ҙ `SDD/project/projects/`гҖӮ\n- жҺўзҙўйҳ¶ж®өеҸҜжҷ®йҖҡеҲҶжһҗпјҢеҸӘиҜ»д»Јз Ғе’Ңж–ҮжЎЈпјҢдёҚзӣҙжҺҘж”№е®һзҺ°пјӣж·ұеәҰжҖқиҖғ / йңҖжұӮзЎ®и®ӨдҪҝз”Ё `systemagent-deepthink`гҖӮеҸӘжңүйңҖиҰҒд»»еҠЎиҗҪзӣҳгҖҒи·ЁдјҡиҜқжҒўеӨҚжҲ–жӯЈејҸжү§иЎҢи®°еҝҶж—¶пјҢжүҚиҝӣе…Ҙ `sdd-workflow` / `sdd-management`гҖӮ\n- еҲӣе»әе’Ңз®ЎзҗҶд»»еҠЎдҪҝз”Ё `sdd-workflow` / `sdd-management`пјҢе№¶з»ҙжҠӨ `README.md`гҖҒ`design/`гҖҒ`tasks.md`гҖҒ`progress.md`гҖҒ`bdd.md`гҖӮ\n- жү§иЎҢдёӯжҜҸе®ҢжҲҗдёҖжү№д»»еҠЎпјҢеҸҠж—¶жӣҙж–°еҜ№еә” `tasks.md` checkbox е’Ң `progress.md` Latest ResumeпјҢе№¶еҗҢжӯҘеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„ `DocsAI/ECS/`гҖҒSDD design жҲ–жёёжҲҸдҫ§зҠ¶жҖҒж–ҮжЎЈгҖӮ\n- е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺжҢүеҪұе“ҚйқўиҝҗиЎҢйӘҢиҜҒпјӣж–ҮжЎЈзұ»иҮіе°‘жЈҖжҹҘ `python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate <sdd-id>` е’Ңзӣ®ж Үж–Үд»¶жё…еҚ•пјҢд»Јз Ғзұ»жҢүдёӢж–№йӘҢиҜҒе…ҘеҸЈжү§иЎҢгҖӮ\n- жһҒе°Ҹдҝ®еӨҚгҖҒжӢјеҶҷгҖҒй“ҫжҺҘгҖҒжіЁйҮҠгҖҒдёҙж—¶жҺ’жҹҘе’ҢдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§и„ҡжң¬дёҚејәеҲ¶дҪҝз”Ё SDDпјӣеҝ…иҰҒж—¶д»Қжӣҙж–°зӣёе…ізҠ¶жҖҒж–ҮжЎЈгҖӮ\n\n## ECS жһ¶жһ„зәўзәҝ\n\n**Entity з”ҹе‘Ҫе‘Ёжңҹ**\n- вқҢ зӣҙжҺҘ `new Entity()` вҶ’ еҝ…йЎ» `EntityManager.Spawn/Register`\n- вқҢ зӣҙжҺҘ `entity.QueueFree()` вҶ’ еҝ…йЎ» `EntityManager.Destroy`\n\n**ж•°жҚ®еӯҳеӮЁ**\n- вқҢ Component з§ҒжңүдёҡеҠЎзҠ¶жҖҒеӯ—ж®өпјҲ`_currentHp`гҖҒ`_moveSpeed`пјүвҶ’ еӯҳ `Data`\n- вқҢ `Data.On()` зӣ‘еҗ¬ж•°жҚ®еҸҳеҢ– вҶ’ з”Ё `Entity.Events`\n- вқҢ еӯ—з¬ҰдёІеӯ—йқўйҮҸи®ҝй—® DataпјҲ`\"CurrentHp\"`пјүвҶ’ з”Ё descriptor з”ҹжҲҗзҡ„ typed `DataKey<T>`\n- вқҢ ж–°еўһ `const string` / `DataMeta` DataKey вҶ’ е…ҲеҶҷ DataOS descriptorпјҢеҶҚз”ҹжҲҗ typed handle\n\n**Data и§„еҲҷпјҲSDD-0022 еҗҺзҠ¶жҖҒпјү**\n- ж–°еўһ DataKey е…ҲеҶҷ DataOS descriptorгҖӮ\n- runtime snapshot жҳҜиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еӯ—ж®өе®ҡд№үдёҺ records зҡ„жқҘжәҗгҖӮ\n- generated handle жҳҜдёҡеҠЎи®ҝй—®е…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ\n- дёҚжҒўеӨҚж—§ `DataMeta` / `DataRegistry` / `DataKey_Compatibility` дҪңдёәдәӢе®һжәҗгҖӮ\n\n**йҖҡдҝЎ**\n- вқҢ Godot Signal еӨ„зҗҶж ёеҝғйҖ»иҫ‘ вҶ’ з”Ё `EventBus`\n- вқҢ зӣҙжҺҘи°ғз”Ёе…¶д»– Component ж–№жі• вҶ’ з”Ё `Entity.Events`\n\n**иө„жәҗеҠ иҪҪ**\n- вқҢ `GD.Load<T>(\"res://...\")` / `ResourceLoader.Load(...)` вҶ’ з”Ё `ResourceManagement.Load`\n\n**зі»з»ҹи°ғз”Ё**\n- вқҢ `new Timer()` / `GetTree().CreateTimer()` вҶ’ з”Ё `TimerManager`\n- вқҢ `GetTree().GetNodesInGroup()` / жүӢеҶҷи·қзҰ»и®Ўз®— вҶ’ з”Ё `TargetSelector`\n- вқҢ зӣҙжҺҘдҝ®ж”№ `CurrentHp` вҶ’ з”Ё `DamageService.Instance.Process()`\n- вқҢ жүӢеҶҷжҡҙеҮ»/й—ӘйҒҝ/еҶ·еҚҙ/е……иғҪ/иҢғеӣҙжЈҖжөӢ вҶ’ з”ЁеҜ№еә”зі»з»ҹз»„д»¶\n- вқҢ жүӢеҠЁ `new` + `QueueFree()` й«ҳйў‘еҜ№иұЎ вҶ’ з”ЁеҜ№иұЎжұ \n- вқҢ `_Process` дёӯзҰҒжӯў `new` еҜ№иұЎе’Ң LINQ\n\n## дәӨдә’и§„еҲҷ\n\n- еҝ…йЎ»дҪҝз”Ёдёӯж–ҮеӣһеӨҚ\n- йҒҝе…ҚеҲ йҷӨеҶҚеҲӣе»әж–Үд»¶пјҢе°ҪйҮҸдҝ®ж”№ж–Үд»¶\n- # sdd-workflow

## и§ҰеҸ‘жқЎд»¶

- з”ЁжҲ·жҳҺзЎ®иҜҙвҖңз”Ё SDDвҖқгҖҒвҖңеҲӣе»ә SDDвҖқгҖҒвҖңз»§з»ӯ SDDвҖқгҖҒвҖңжҢү SDD жөҒзЁӢжү§иЎҢвҖқгҖӮ
- д»»еҠЎжҳҜдёӯеӨ§еһӢи®ҫи®ЎгҖҒйҮҚжһ„гҖҒиҝҒз§»гҖҒAI й…ҚзҪ®жІ»зҗҶжҲ–и·ЁжЁЎеқ—е®һж–ҪгҖӮ
- д»»еҠЎйңҖиҰҒй•ҝжңҹжҒўеӨҚдёҠдёӢж–ҮгҖҒд»»еҠЎзҠ¶жҖҒгҖҒйӘҢиҜҒиҜҒжҚ®жҲ–и®ҫи®ЎеҪ’жЎЈгҖӮ
- з”ЁжҲ·иҰҒжұӮвҖңж·ұеәҰжҖқиҖғвҖқдё”еҗҺз»ӯйңҖиҰҒиҗҪең°жү§иЎҢгҖӮ

## еҝ…иҜ»

- `Workspace/SDD/README.md`
- `Workspace/SDD/docs/SDDFormat.md`
- `Workspace/SDD/docs/CLI.md`
- `Workspace/SDD/docs/ValidationRules.md`
- `Workspace/SystemAgent/README.md`
- `Workspace/SystemAgent/README.md`

## жөҒзЁӢ

1. еҲӨж–ӯд»»еҠЎжҳҜеҗҰйңҖиҰҒ SDDпјӣе°Ҹдҝ®гҖҒжӢјеҶҷгҖҒдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§жҺ’жҹҘдёҚејәеҲ¶еҲӣе»әгҖӮ
2. иҜ»еҸ–жҲ–еҲӣе»әеҢ№й…Қзҡ„йЎ№зӣ® / SDD е®һдҫӢпјӣдјҳе…ҲдҪҝз”Ё `project-list`гҖҒ`list`гҖҒ`project-show` е’Ң `show` жҒўеӨҚдёҠдёӢж–ҮгҖӮ
3. иӢҘд»»еҠЎе°ҡж— и®ҫи®ЎпјҢе…Ҳи°ғз”Ё `systemagent-deepthink` еҪўжҲҗзӣ®ж ҮгҖҒзәҰжқҹгҖҒж–№жЎҲгҖҒйЈҺйҷ©е’ҢзЎ®и®ӨеҢ…пјӣзЎ®и®ӨеҗҺеҶҚжҠҠе…ій”®з»“и®әиҗҪе…ҘеҪ“еүҚ SDD artifactгҖӮ
4. йЎ№зӣ®зә§е…ұдә«и®ҫи®ЎеҶҷе…ҘйЎ№зӣ® `design/`пјӣд»»еҠЎзә§и®ҫи®ЎгҖҒд»»еҠЎгҖҒиҝӣеәҰгҖҒBDD е’ҢйӘҢиҜҒиҰҒжұӮеҶҷе…ҘеҪ“еүҚ SDDгҖӮ
5. е®һзҺ°еүҚжЈҖжҹҘ readinessпјҡзӣ®ж Үе’Ңиҫ№з•ҢжҳҺзЎ®гҖҒdesign йқһжЁЎжқҝгҖҒtasks еҸҜжү§иЎҢгҖҒBDD жңүеңәжҷҜжҲ–дёҚйҖӮз”ЁеҺҹеӣ гҖҒLatest Resume жңүжҒўеӨҚд»·еҖјгҖҒзӣ®ж Ү SDD validate ж—  errorгҖӮ
6. е®һж–Ҫж—¶жҢү `tasks.md` е°ҸжӯҘжҺЁиҝӣпјҢе№¶еңЁжҜҸдёӘд»»еҠЎз»„еҗҺеҸӘи®°еҪ•е…ій”®з»“и®әгҖҒж ёеҝғеҪұе“Қйқўе’ҢйӘҢиҜҒж‘ҳиҰҒгҖӮ
7. е®ҢжҲҗеүҚиҝҗиЎҢж–°йІңйӘҢиҜҒиҜҒжҚ®пјҢдҫӢеҰӮ `python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all` жҲ–зӣ®ж Ү SDD ж ЎйӘҢгҖӮ
8. е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺж №жҚ®йӘҢиҜҒз»“жһңеҶіе®ҡжҳҜеҗҰиҝҗиЎҢ `done`пјҢжҲ–дҝқз•ҷ `active/blocked` зҠ¶жҖҒпјӣйЎ№зӣ®е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺдҪҝз”Ё `project-archive` еҪ’жЎЈгҖӮ

## дҝЎжҒҜиҙЁйҮҸи§„еҲҷ

- дёҚжҠҠ SDD еҶҷжҲҗжөҒж°ҙиҙҰпјҢдёҚеӨҚеҲ¶е®Ңж•ҙе‘Ҫд»Өиҫ“еҮәгҖҒе…ЁйҮҸ diff жҲ–еҗҢжӯҘеүҜжң¬жё…еҚ•гҖӮ
- `progress.md` дҝқеӯҳе…ій”®еҸ‘зҺ°гҖҒеҶізӯ–гҖҒйӘҢиҜҒж‘ҳиҰҒе’ҢдёӢдёҖжӯҘпјҢдёҚдҝқеӯҳжҜҸдёӘдёҙж—¶ж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ
- `README.md` жҳҜдәәе·ҘеҸҜз»ҙжҠӨе…ҘеҸЈеҚЎзүҮпјӣзҠ¶жҖҒжөҒиҪ¬еҸӘиғҪжӣҙж–° CLI жӢҘжңүеӯ—ж®өгҖӮ
- SDD е’ҢйЎ№зӣ®зңҹе®һзҠ¶жҖҒжқҘиҮӘ `sdd.json.status` / `project.json.status`пјҢзӣ®еҪ•еҸӘиЎЁиҫҫз»„з»ҮжҲ–еҪ’жЎЈдҪҚзҪ®гҖӮ
- `Key Files` еҸӘеҲ—ж”№еҸҳзі»з»ҹиЎҢдёәгҖҒдәӢе®һжәҗгҖҒй—ЁзҰҒгҖҒе…¬е…ұжҺҘеҸЈжҲ–йӘҢиҜҒж–№ејҸзҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјӣи¶…иҝҮ 8 дёӘж—¶ж”№еҶҷ `Key Areas`гҖӮ
- `done` еә”дҝқз•ҷжңүд»·еҖјзҡ„ Latest Resumeпјӣеҝ…иҰҒж—¶дҪҝз”Ё `--conclusion` е’Ң `--next-action` жҳҺзЎ®жңҖз»Ҳз»“и®әгҖӮ

## CLI е…ҘеҸЈ

```bash
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py list
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py project-list
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py project-show PRJ-0001
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py show SDD-0001
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py index
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py new "Task Title" --project PRJ-0001
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py done SDD-0001 --validation "..." --conclusion "..." --next-action "..."
```

## иҫ“еҮәиҰҒжұӮ

- еҪ“еүҚ SDD IDгҖҒзҠ¶жҖҒгҖҒи·Ҝеҫ„е’Ң Latest ResumeгҖӮ
- жң¬иҪ®д»»еҠЎеҲ—иЎЁгҖҒе·Іе®ҢжҲҗйЎ№гҖҒйҳ»еЎһйЎ№е’ҢдёӢдёҖжӯҘгҖӮ
- дҝ®ж”№ж–Үд»¶иҢғеӣҙе’ҢйӘҢиҜҒе‘Ҫд»Өз»“жһңгҖӮ
- иӢҘж”№еҠЁ `.ai-config/skills/`пјҢеҝ…йЎ»еҗҢжӯҘе№¶жҠҘе‘Ҡ skill-test з»“жһңгҖӮ

## зҰҒжӯў

- дёҚжҠҠ SDD е®һдҫӢж”ҫе…Ҙ `Workspace/SystemAgent/`гҖӮ
- дёҚжҠҠ SDD и®ҫи®Ўж–ҮжЎЈдәӨз»ҷ SystemAgent еҪ’жЎЈгҖӮ
- дёҚзӣҙжҺҘдҝ®ж”№ `.codex/skills/`гҖҒ`.claude/skills/`гҖҒ`.windsurf/skills/` дҪңдёәжәҗгҖӮ
- дёҚеҲ йҷӨ OpenSpecпјӣе·Іжңү OpenSpec change д»ҚжҢүе…је®№жөҒзЁӢж”¶е°ҫгҖӮ

````

# Runtime Data е…ҘеҸЈ

## еҝ…иҜ»е…ҘеҸЈ

- `DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/Data/Dataзі»з»ҹиҜҙжҳҺ.md` вҖ” Data зі»з»ҹеҪ“еүҚе®һзҺ°иҜҙжҳҺ
- `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/` вҖ” Data йҮҚжһ„и®ҫи®ЎеҢ…
- `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/` вҖ” еҪ“еүҚ Data runtime е®һзҺ°жәҗз Ғ
- `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/` вҖ” DataOS еңәжҷҜжөӢиҜ•

## жәҗз ҒдҪҚзҪ®

- `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/`
- `Data/DataOS/`
- `Data/DataKey/`
- `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Events/`
- `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/`
- Data йҮҚжһ„дәӢе®һжәҗпјҡ`SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/2.Dataзі»з»ҹдјҳеҢ–/`

## и§„еҲҷ

- `Data` еҸӘеӯҳиҝҗиЎҢж—¶зҠ¶жҖҒпјҢдёҚжүҝжӢ… authoring иЎЁиҒҢиҙЈгҖӮ
- ж–° DataKey е…ҲеҶҷ DataOS descriptorпјҢеҶҚз”ұ generated handle жҡҙйңІ typed `DataKey<T>`пјӣдёҚжҒўеӨҚж—§ `DataMeta` / `DataRegistry` дәӢе®һжәҗгҖӮ
- `Data` з»‘е®ҡ frozen `DataCatalog` е№¶дҪҝз”Ё typed slotпјӣдёҡеҠЎд»Јз ҒеҸӘз”Ё `Data.Get/Set/TryGet/Has/Remove(DataKey<T>)`гҖӮ
- Data еҸҳжӣҙйҖҡзҹҘйҖҡиҝҮ `IDataChangeSink` е’Ң `Entity.Events`пјҢдёҚиҰҒжҠҠдёҡеҠЎзӣ‘еҗ¬еҶҷиҝӣ `Data` е®№еҷЁгҖӮ
- DataOS SQLite еҸӘеңЁз”ҹжҲҗ / ж ЎйӘҢ / snapshot йҳ¶ж®өдҪҝз”ЁпјҢиҝҗиЎҢж—¶зғӯи·Ҝеҫ„иҜ»еҸ– `RuntimeDataSnapshot`пјӣsnapshot loader еҜ№ unknown keyгҖҒwrong typeгҖҒdescriptor drift еҝ…йЎ»жҠҘй”ҷгҖӮ
- Runtime Data еҸҳжӣҙиҮіе°‘иЎҘзәҜ C# Runtime testsпјӣиӢҘеҪұе“Қ Godot Node / еңәжҷҜеҠ иҪҪ / жёёжҲҸиғ¶ж°ҙпјҢиҝҪеҠ зӢ¬з«Ӣ Godot йӘҢиҜҒеңәжҷҜгҖӮ
- PRJ-0002 ж—§ ECS Data е®Ңж•ҙйҮҚжһ„жҢү `SDD-0012` вҶ’ `SDD-0019` йЎәеәҸжү§иЎҢпјӣ`runtime_snapshot.json.descriptors` жҳҜеӯ—ж®өе®ҡд№үдәӢе®һжәҗпјҢж—§ `DataMeta` / `DataRegistry` / жүӢеҶҷ `DataKey` еҸӘе…Ғи®ёдҪңдёәдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§е®Ўи®Ўиҫ“е…ҘпјҢдёҚж–°еўһй•ҝжңҹ adapter жҲ– runtime fallbackгҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `DataDefinitionCatalog` еҲҮзүҮеҸӘеҒҡ descriptor catalogгҖҒcompute resolver з»‘е®ҡж ЎйӘҢе’Ң `LegacyDataAuditReport`пјӣrecords applyгҖҒEntity bootstrapгҖҒFeature modifier bridge е’Ңж—§и·Ҝеҫ„еҲ йҷӨеҲҶеҲ«з•ҷз»ҷеҗҺз»ӯ SDDгҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `DataRuntimeStorage` еҲҮзүҮиҙҹиҙЈ descriptor defaultгҖҒtyped `DataKey<T>`гҖҒwrite/range/allowed values policyгҖҒunknown key fail-fast е’Ң Data changed дәӢд»¶жЎҘжҺҘпјӣжңӘз»‘е®ҡ catalog зҡ„ж—§ `Data()` и°ғз”ЁеҸӘдҪңдёәиҝҒз§»жңҹж—§и·Ҝеҫ„дҝқз•ҷпјҢдёҚдҪңдёәж–°еӯ—ж®өе…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `DataRuntimeStorage` modifier еҲҮзүҮиҙҹиҙЈ `modifier_policy` ж ЎйӘҢгҖҒAdditive/Multiplicative/FinalAdditive/Override/Cap pipelineгҖҒsource removal е’Ң dependent computed dirtyпјӣFeature еҸӘйҖҡиҝҮ Data modifier API жҺҲдәҲ/еӣһж»ҡиҫ“е…ҘпјҢдёҚи®Ўз®— computedгҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `DataRuntimeStorage` compute еҲҮзүҮиҙҹиҙЈ `IDataComputeResolver`гҖҒ`DataComputeRegistry`гҖҒcomputed cacheгҖҒдҫқиө–еҸҳеҢ–йҖ’еҪ’ dirty е’ҢеҹәзЎҖ resolver зӨәдҫӢпјӣFeature д»ҚеҸӘж”№иҫ“е…ҘпјҢcomputed иҫ“еҮәеҸӘз”ұ Data resolver и®Ўз®—гҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `RuntimeDataSnapshotLoader` record apply еҲҮзүҮиҙҹиҙЈ `RuntimeDataSnapshot` / `RuntimeDataRecordDto`гҖҒ`LoadFromJson`гҖҒ`DataApplyReport`гҖҒ`ApplyRecord` е’Ң `DataRuntimeBootstrap`пјӣrecord еҶҷе…Ҙеҝ…йЎ»е…ҲжҹҘ `DataDefinitionCatalog`пјҢunknown key / type mismatch / conversion failure / computed жҲ– runtime_only еҶҷе…Ҙеҝ…йЎ»з»“жһ„еҢ–жҠҘе‘ҠпјҢдёҚеӣһйҖҖеҲ° `DataRegistry.GetMeta`гҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `EntityManager.Spawn` descriptor-first жҺҘе…ҘеҸӘиғҪиө°жҳҫејҸ `EntitySpawnConfig.RuntimeDataBootstrap + RuntimeDataRecord` жҲ– `RuntimeDataRecordTable/RuntimeDataRecordId` еҲҶж”ҜпјӣжңӘжҳҫејҸдј е…Ҙж—¶дҝқз•ҷиҝҒз§»жңҹ `LoadFromConfig`пјҢйҒҝе…Қжү№йҮҸз ҙеқҸж—§ Entity жһ„йҖ и·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮrecord apply еӨұиҙҘж—¶еҝ…йЎ»йҳ»ж–ӯз”ҹжҲҗе№¶жё…зҗҶе®һдҪ“гҖӮ
- **Entity еј•з”Ё DataKey еҝ…йЎ»жҳҜ `DataKey<EntityId?>` жҲ– `DataKey<EntityIdList>`пјҲlist зұ»еһӢз”ұ P1 жҸҗдҫӣпјүпјҢдёҚе…Ғи®ё `DataKey<IEntity?>` жҲ– `DataKey<string>` иЎЁиҫҫ entity-id**гҖӮnullable й»ҳи®ӨеҖјз”Ё `null`пјӣйқһ nullable `DataKey<EntityId>` й»ҳи®ӨеҖјеҝ…йЎ»жҳҜйқҷжҖҒ `EntityId.Empty`пјҢзҰҒжӯў `new EntityId(string.Empty)` жҲ– `new EntityId("")` ad-hocгҖӮ
- еҶҷе…Ҙ typed `DataKey<EntityId?>` ж—¶жҳҫејҸжҸҗдҫӣзұ»еһӢеҸӮж•°пјҲ`Data.Set<EntityId?>(key, entity.EntityId)`пјүжҲ–жҳҫејҸ castпјҢйҒҝе…ҚжіӣеһӢжҺЁж–ӯжӯ§д№үгҖӮ

## йӘҢиҜҒ

```bash
cd /home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI
dotnet build Brotato_my.csproj --no-restore /clp:ErrorsOnly
bash Data/DataOS/Tools/validate-dataos.sh Data/DataOS/Authoring/slimeainew.authoring.db
GODOT=/home/slime/Code/Godot/GodotEngine/4.x/Godot_v4.6.2-stable_mono_linux_x86_64/Godot_v4.6.2-stable_mono_linux.x86_64
$GODOT --headless --path . --scene res://Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataCatalogTestScene.tscn
$GODOT --headless --path . --scene res://Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataRuntimeTestScene.tscn
$GODOT --headless --path . --scene res://Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataSnapshotApplyTestScene.tscn
$GODOT --headless --path . --scene res://Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataFeatureBridgeTestScene.tscn
```

````

# systemagent-deepthink

## е®ҡдҪҚ

иҝҷжҳҜ SystemAgent зҡ„ standalone capability skillпјҢдёҚжҳҜ SDD workflowпјҢд№ҹдёҚжҳҜ workflow entry wrapperгҖӮ

е®ғеҗёж”¶ `superpowers:brainstorming` зҡ„ж ёеҝғд»·еҖјпјҡе…ҲиҜ»дёҠдёӢж–ҮгҖҒиҜҶеҲ«иҢғеӣҙгҖҒжҸҗеҮә 2-3 дёӘж–№жЎҲгҖҒиҜҙжҳҺжҺЁиҚҗгҖҒжҡҙйңІзЎ®и®ӨзӮ№пјӣдҪҶдёҚз…§жҗ¬ hook ејәеҲ¶и§ҰеҸ‘гҖҒйҖҗй—®йҖҗзӯ”гҖҒй»ҳи®ӨеҶҷ `docs/superpowers/specs/` жҲ–и®ҫи®Ўйҳ¶ж®өиҮӘеҠЁ commitгҖӮ

## и§ҰеҸ‘жқЎд»¶

- з”ЁжҲ·иҰҒжұӮж·ұеәҰжҖқиҖғгҖҒж–№жЎҲи®ҫи®ЎгҖҒи®ҫи®ЎзЎ®и®ӨжҲ–дёҚиҰҒзӣҙжҺҘе®һзҺ°гҖӮ
- з”ЁжҲ·жҸҗдҫӣзҡ„еҶ…е®№йӣ¶ж•ЈгҖҒзӣ®ж Ү/иҫ№з•Ң/жҲҗеҠҹж ҮеҮҶдёҚжё…пјҢз»§з»ӯе®һзҺ°е®№жҳ“иө°й”ҷж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ
- ж–°еҠҹиғҪгҖҒйҮҚжһ„гҖҒиҝҒз§»гҖҒworkflow/skill/rule/gate/policy ж”№еҠЁиҝӣе…Ҙи®ЎеҲ’жҲ– SDD еүҚйңҖиҰҒеҶ»з»“ж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ
- е®һж–ҪдёӯеҸ‘зҺ°и®ҫи®ЎзҹӣзӣҫгҖҒиҢғеӣҙиҝҮеӨ§гҖҒйЈҺйҷ©жңӘеӨ„зҗҶгҖҒйӘҢж”¶з©әжҙһжҲ–дёҠдёӢж–ҮдёҚи¶ігҖӮ

## еҝ…иҜ»

- `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md`
- `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DesignCritic.md`пјҲlarge жҲ–й«ҳйЈҺйҷ© medium ж—¶пјү
- зӣёе…і routeгҖҒowner skillгҖҒDocsAI жҲ– SystemAgent fact sourceпјҢжҢүеҪ“еүҚд»»еҠЎжңҖе°ҸиҜ»еҸ–гҖӮ
- еҸӘжңүд»»еҠЎдҪҝз”ЁжӯЈејҸ SDDгҖҒйңҖиҰҒи·ЁдјҡиҜқжҒўеӨҚжҲ–йңҖиҰҒиҗҪзӣҳж—¶пјҢжүҚиҜ»еҸ– `Workspace/SDD/docs/SDDFormat.md`гҖҒ`Workspace/SDD/docs/CLI.md` е’ҢеҪ“еүҚ SDD зҡ„ `README.md`гҖҒ`design/INDEX.md`гҖҒ`tasks.md`гҖҒ`progress.md`гҖҒ`bdd.md`гҖӮ

## иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„

йҒөеҫӘ `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md` зҡ„зЎ®и®ӨеҢ…еӯ—ж®өпјҡ

1. Goalпјҡжң¬д»»еҠЎиҰҒи§ЈеҶід»Җд№Ҳй—®йўҳе’Ңйқһзӣ®ж ҮгҖӮ
2. Context Readпјҡе·ІиҜ»еҸ–зҡ„дәӢе®һжәҗгҖҒжңӘиҜ»дёҠдёӢж–Үе’Ң git boundaryгҖӮ
3. Problem ShapeпјҡйңҖжұӮзјәеҸЈгҖҒйҡҗи—ҸеҒҮи®ҫе’ҢеҸҜиғҪиҜҜи§ЈгҖӮ
4. Main Risksпјҡе®һж–ҪгҖҒз»ҙжҠӨгҖҒйӘҢиҜҒе’Ңиҫ№з•ҢйЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ
5. Optionsпјҡ2-3 дёӘеҸҜйҖүж–№жЎҲеҸҠеҸ–иҲҚгҖӮ
6. RecommendationпјҡжҺЁиҚҗж–№жЎҲе’ҢеҺҹеӣ гҖӮ
7. Must ConfirmпјҡдёҚзЎ®и®Өе°ұдёҚиғҪе®үе…ЁжҺЁиҝӣзҡ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ
8. Should Confirmпјҡе»әи®®зЎ®и®ӨдҪҶеҸҜз”Ёй»ҳи®ӨеҖјжҺЁиҝӣзҡ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ
9. Defaults I Will Useпјҡз”ЁжҲ·дёҚиЎҘе……ж—¶йҮҮз”Ёзҡ„й»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫгҖӮ
10. Not RecommendedпјҡдёҚе»әи®®ж–№еҗ‘е’ҢеҺҹеӣ гҖӮ
11. Artifact UpdatesпјҡйңҖиҰҒеҶҷе…Ҙзҡ„ designгҖҒtasksгҖҒbddгҖҒprogressгҖҒnotes жҲ–ж— йңҖиҗҪзӣҳзҡ„еҺҹеӣ гҖӮ

## зЎ®и®Өй—®йўҳиҗҪзӮ№

- дёҚдҪҝз”Ё SDD ж—¶пјҡжңҖз»ҲеӣһеӨҚеҝ…йЎ»жңүйҶ’зӣ®зҡ„ `йңҖиҰҒзЎ®и®Ө` е°ҸиҠӮпјҢеҲ—еҮә Must ConfirmпјӣиӢҘиғҪз”Ёй»ҳи®ӨеҖјжҺЁиҝӣпјҢд№ҹеҲ—еҮә `й»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫ`гҖӮ
- дҪҝз”Ё SDD жҲ–е·Іжңүи®ҫи®Ўж–ҮжЎЈж—¶пјҡжҠҠй—®йўҳеҶҷеңЁи®ҫи®Ўж–ҮжЎЈеҶ…зҡ„ `## Must Confirm`гҖҒ`## Should Confirm`гҖҒ`## Defaults I Will Use` ж ҮйўҳдёӢпјҢдёҚеҚ•зӢ¬еҲӣе»әй—®йўҳж–ҮжЎЈгҖӮ
- з”ЁжҲ·жңҖз»ҲиЈҒеҶігҖҒйҮҮз”Ёзҡ„й»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫе’ҢжҒўеӨҚзӮ№еҶҷе…Ҙ `progress.md`пјӣеҸҜжү§иЎҢдәӢйЎ№еҶҷе…Ҙ `tasks.md`пјӣиЎҢдёәйў„жңҹеҶҷе…Ҙ `bdd.md`пјӣеҸӮиҖғжқҘжәҗе’ҢејҖж”ҫй—®йўҳеҶҷе…Ҙ `notes.md`гҖӮ
- `Artifact Updates` еҝ…йЎ»иҜҙжҳҺжң¬иҪ®еҶҷе…ҘдҪҚзҪ®пјҢжҲ–иҜҙжҳҺдёәд»Җд№ҲеҸӘеңЁиҒҠеӨ©дёӯиҫ“еҮәгҖӮ

## е®һж–Ҫй—ЁзҰҒ

- `Must Confirm` жңӘи§ЈеҶіж—¶пјҢдёҚиҝӣе…Ҙе®һзҺ°гҖӮ
- з”ЁжҲ·еӣһеӨҚвҖңжҢүдҪ зҡ„е»әи®®жү§иЎҢвҖқж—¶пјҢеҸҜйҮҮз”Ё `Recommendation` е’Ң `Defaults I Will Use`пјҢдҪҶеҝ…йЎ»жҠҠй»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫеҶҷе…ҘжңҖз»ҲеӣһеӨҚпјӣдҪҝз”Ё SDD ж—¶иҝҳиҰҒеҶҷе…Ҙ `progress.md`гҖӮ
- small д»»еҠЎеҸҜеҺӢзј©дёә 3-5 иЎҢиҮӘжЈҖпјҢдёҚејәеҲ¶е®Ңж•ҙзЎ®и®ӨеҢ…гҖӮ

## зҰҒжӯў

- дёҚејәеҲ¶жүҖжңүе°Ҹд»»еҠЎйғҪеҲӣе»ә SDDгҖӮ
- дёҚжҠҠи®ҫи®Ўж–ҮжЎЈж•ЈиҗҪеҲ°дёҙж—¶ Idea зӣ®еҪ•дҪңдёәй•ҝжңҹдәӢе®һжәҗгҖӮ
- дёҚеңЁи®ҫи®ЎжңӘжё…жҘҡж—¶зӣІзӣ®е®һж–ҪеӨ§ж”№гҖӮ
- дёҚж–°еўһ brainstorming hookпјҢдёҚйҖҗй—®йҖҗзӯ”йҳ»еЎһз”ЁжҲ·гҖӮ
- дёҚеӨҚеҲ¶ `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md` жҲ– `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DesignCritic.md` жӯЈж–Үпјӣskill еҸӘеҒҡе…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ

# sdd-workflow

## и§ҰеҸ‘жқЎд»¶

- з”ЁжҲ·жҳҺзЎ®иҜҙвҖңз”Ё SDDвҖқгҖҒвҖңеҲӣе»ә SDDвҖқгҖҒвҖңз»§з»ӯ SDDвҖқгҖҒвҖңжҢү SDD жөҒзЁӢжү§иЎҢвҖқгҖӮ
- д»»еҠЎжҳҜдёӯеӨ§еһӢи®ҫи®ЎгҖҒйҮҚжһ„гҖҒиҝҒз§»гҖҒAI й…ҚзҪ®жІ»зҗҶжҲ–и·ЁжЁЎеқ—е®һж–ҪгҖӮ
- д»»еҠЎйңҖиҰҒй•ҝжңҹжҒўеӨҚдёҠдёӢж–ҮгҖҒд»»еҠЎзҠ¶жҖҒгҖҒйӘҢиҜҒиҜҒжҚ®жҲ–и®ҫи®ЎеҪ’жЎЈгҖӮ
- з”ЁжҲ·иҰҒжұӮвҖңж·ұеәҰжҖқиҖғвҖқдё”еҗҺз»ӯйңҖиҰҒиҗҪең°жү§иЎҢгҖӮ

## еҝ…иҜ»

- `Workspace/SDD/README.md`
- `Workspace/SDD/docs/SDDFormat.md`
- `Workspace/SDD/docs/CLI.md`
- `Workspace/SDD/docs/ValidationRules.md`
- `Workspace/SystemAgent/README.md`
- `Workspace/SystemAgent/README.md`

## жөҒзЁӢ

1. еҲӨж–ӯд»»еҠЎжҳҜеҗҰйңҖиҰҒ SDDпјӣе°Ҹдҝ®гҖҒжӢјеҶҷгҖҒдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§жҺ’жҹҘдёҚејәеҲ¶еҲӣе»әгҖӮ
2. иҜ»еҸ–жҲ–еҲӣе»әеҢ№й…Қзҡ„йЎ№зӣ® / SDD е®һдҫӢпјӣдјҳе…ҲдҪҝз”Ё `project-list`гҖҒ`list`гҖҒ`project-show` е’Ң `show` жҒўеӨҚдёҠдёӢж–ҮгҖӮ
3. иӢҘд»»еҠЎе°ҡж— и®ҫи®ЎпјҢе…Ҳи°ғз”Ё `systemagent-deepthink` еҪўжҲҗзӣ®ж ҮгҖҒзәҰжқҹгҖҒж–№жЎҲгҖҒйЈҺйҷ©е’ҢзЎ®и®ӨеҢ…пјӣзЎ®и®ӨеҗҺеҶҚжҠҠе…ій”®з»“и®әиҗҪе…ҘеҪ“еүҚ SDD artifactгҖӮ
4. йЎ№зӣ®зә§е…ұдә«и®ҫи®ЎеҶҷе…ҘйЎ№зӣ® `design/`пјӣд»»еҠЎзә§и®ҫи®ЎгҖҒд»»еҠЎгҖҒиҝӣеәҰгҖҒBDD е’ҢйӘҢиҜҒиҰҒжұӮеҶҷе…ҘеҪ“еүҚ SDDгҖӮ
5. е®һзҺ°еүҚжЈҖжҹҘ readinessпјҡзӣ®ж Үе’Ңиҫ№з•ҢжҳҺзЎ®гҖҒdesign йқһжЁЎжқҝгҖҒtasks еҸҜжү§иЎҢгҖҒBDD жңүеңәжҷҜжҲ–дёҚйҖӮз”ЁеҺҹеӣ гҖҒLatest Resume жңүжҒўеӨҚд»·еҖјгҖҒзӣ®ж Ү SDD validate ж—  errorгҖӮ
6. е®һж–Ҫж—¶жҢү `tasks.md` е°ҸжӯҘжҺЁиҝӣпјҢе№¶еңЁжҜҸдёӘд»»еҠЎз»„еҗҺеҸӘи®°еҪ•е…ій”®з»“и®әгҖҒж ёеҝғеҪұе“Қйқўе’ҢйӘҢиҜҒж‘ҳиҰҒгҖӮ
7. е®ҢжҲҗеүҚиҝҗиЎҢж–°йІңйӘҢиҜҒиҜҒжҚ®пјҢдҫӢеҰӮ `python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all` жҲ–зӣ®ж Ү SDD ж ЎйӘҢгҖӮ
8. е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺж №жҚ®йӘҢиҜҒз»“жһңеҶіе®ҡжҳҜеҗҰиҝҗиЎҢ `done`пјҢжҲ–дҝқз•ҷ `active/blocked` зҠ¶жҖҒпјӣйЎ№зӣ®е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺдҪҝз”Ё `project-archive` еҪ’жЎЈгҖӮ

## дҝЎжҒҜиҙЁйҮҸи§„еҲҷ

- дёҚжҠҠ SDD еҶҷжҲҗжөҒж°ҙиҙҰпјҢдёҚеӨҚеҲ¶е®Ңж•ҙе‘Ҫд»Өиҫ“еҮәгҖҒе…ЁйҮҸ diff жҲ–еҗҢжӯҘеүҜжң¬жё…еҚ•гҖӮ
- `progress.md` дҝқеӯҳе…ій”®еҸ‘зҺ°гҖҒеҶізӯ–гҖҒйӘҢиҜҒж‘ҳиҰҒе’ҢдёӢдёҖжӯҘпјҢдёҚдҝқеӯҳжҜҸдёӘдёҙж—¶ж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ
- `README.md` жҳҜдәәе·ҘеҸҜз»ҙжҠӨе…ҘеҸЈеҚЎзүҮпјӣзҠ¶жҖҒжөҒиҪ¬еҸӘиғҪжӣҙж–° CLI жӢҘжңүеӯ—ж®өгҖӮ
- SDD е’ҢйЎ№зӣ®зңҹе®һзҠ¶жҖҒжқҘиҮӘ `sdd.json.status` / `project.json.status`пјҢзӣ®еҪ•еҸӘиЎЁиҫҫз»„з»ҮжҲ–еҪ’жЎЈдҪҚзҪ®гҖӮ
- `Key Files` еҸӘеҲ—ж”№еҸҳзі»з»ҹиЎҢдёәгҖҒдәӢе®һжәҗгҖҒй—ЁзҰҒгҖҒе…¬е…ұжҺҘеҸЈжҲ–йӘҢиҜҒж–№ејҸзҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјӣи¶…иҝҮ 8 дёӘж—¶ж”№еҶҷ `Key Areas`гҖӮ
- `done` еә”дҝқз•ҷжңүд»·еҖјзҡ„ Latest Resumeпјӣеҝ…иҰҒж—¶дҪҝз”Ё `--conclusion` е’Ң `--next-action` жҳҺзЎ®жңҖз»Ҳз»“и®әгҖӮ

## CLI е…ҘеҸЈ

```bash
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py list
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py project-list
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py project-show PRJ-0001
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py show SDD-0001
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py index
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py new "Task Title" --project PRJ-0001
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py done SDD-0001 --validation "..." --conclusion "..." --next-action "..."
```

## иҫ“еҮәиҰҒжұӮ

- еҪ“еүҚ SDD IDгҖҒзҠ¶жҖҒгҖҒи·Ҝеҫ„е’Ң Latest ResumeгҖӮ
- жң¬иҪ®д»»еҠЎеҲ—иЎЁгҖҒе·Іе®ҢжҲҗйЎ№гҖҒйҳ»еЎһйЎ№е’ҢдёӢдёҖжӯҘгҖӮ

- иӢҘж”№еҠЁ `.ai-config/skills/`пјҢеҝ…йЎ»еҗҢжӯҘе№¶жҠҘе‘Ҡ skill-test з»“жһңгҖӮ

## зҰҒжӯў

- дёҚжҠҠ SDD е®һдҫӢж”ҫе…Ҙ `Workspace/SystemAgent/`гҖӮ
- дёҚжҠҠ SDD и®ҫи®Ўж–ҮжЎЈдәӨз»ҷ SystemAgent еҪ’жЎЈгҖӮ
- дёҚзӣҙжҺҘдҝ®ж”№ `.codex/skills/`гҖҒ`.claude/skills/`гҖҒ`.windsurf/skills/` дҪңдёәжәҗгҖӮ

# Runtime Data е…ҘеҸЈ

## еҝ…иҜ»е…ҘеҸЈ

## жәҗз ҒдҪҚзҪ®

- `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/`

## и§„еҲҷ

- `Data` еҸӘеӯҳиҝҗиЎҢж—¶зҠ¶жҖҒпјҢдёҚжүҝжӢ… authoring иЎЁиҒҢиҙЈгҖӮ
- ж–° DataKey е…ҲеҶҷ DataOS descriptorпјҢеҶҚз”ұ generated handle жҡҙйңІ typed `DataKey<T>`пјӣдёҚжҒўеӨҚж—§ `DataMeta` / `DataRegistry` дәӢе®һжәҗгҖӮ
- `Data` з»‘е®ҡ frozen `DataCatalog` е№¶дҪҝз”Ё typed slotпјӣдёҡеҠЎд»Јз ҒеҸӘз”Ё `Data.Get/Set/TryGet/Has/Remove(DataKey<T>)`гҖӮ
- Data еҸҳжӣҙйҖҡзҹҘйҖҡиҝҮ `IDataChangeSink` е’Ң `Entity.Events`пјҢдёҚиҰҒжҠҠдёҡеҠЎзӣ‘еҗ¬еҶҷиҝӣ `Data` е®№еҷЁгҖӮ
- DataOS SQLite еҸӘеңЁз”ҹжҲҗ / ж ЎйӘҢ / snapshot йҳ¶ж®өдҪҝз”ЁпјҢиҝҗиЎҢж—¶зғӯи·Ҝеҫ„иҜ»еҸ– `RuntimeDataSnapshot`пјӣsnapshot loader еҜ№ unknown keyгҖҒwrong typeгҖҒdescriptor drift еҝ…йЎ»жҠҘй”ҷгҖӮ
- Runtime Data еҸҳжӣҙиҮіе°‘иЎҘзәҜ C# Runtime testsпјӣиӢҘеҪұе“Қ Godot Node / еңәжҷҜеҠ иҪҪ / жёёжҲҸиғ¶ж°ҙпјҢиҝҪеҠ зӢ¬з«Ӣ Godot йӘҢиҜҒеңәжҷҜгҖӮ
- PRJ-0002 ж—§ ECS Data е®Ңж•ҙйҮҚжһ„жҢү `SDD-0012` вҶ’ `SDD-0019` йЎәеәҸжү§иЎҢпјӣ`runtime_snapshot.json.descriptors` жҳҜеӯ—ж®өе®ҡд№үдәӢе®һжәҗпјҢж—§ `DataMeta` / `DataRegistry` / жүӢеҶҷ `DataKey` еҸӘе…Ғи®ёдҪңдёәдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§е®Ўи®Ўиҫ“е…ҘпјҢдёҚж–°еўһй•ҝжңҹ adapter жҲ– runtime fallbackгҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `DataDefinitionCatalog` еҲҮзүҮеҸӘеҒҡ descriptor catalogгҖҒcompute resolver з»‘е®ҡж ЎйӘҢе’Ң `LegacyDataAuditReport`пјӣrecords applyгҖҒEntity bootstrapгҖҒFeature modifier bridge е’Ңж—§и·Ҝеҫ„еҲ йҷӨеҲҶеҲ«з•ҷз»ҷеҗҺз»ӯ SDDгҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `DataRuntimeStorage` еҲҮзүҮиҙҹиҙЈ descriptor defaultгҖҒtyped `DataKey<T>`гҖҒwrite/range/allowed values policyгҖҒunknown key fail-fast е’Ң Data changed дәӢд»¶жЎҘжҺҘпјӣжңӘз»‘е®ҡ catalog зҡ„ж—§ `Data()` и°ғз”ЁеҸӘдҪңдёәиҝҒз§»жңҹж—§и·Ҝеҫ„дҝқз•ҷпјҢдёҚдҪңдёәж–°еӯ—ж®өе…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `DataRuntimeStorage` modifier еҲҮзүҮиҙҹиҙЈ `modifier_policy` ж ЎйӘҢгҖҒAdditive/Multiplicative/FinalAdditive/Override/Cap pipelineгҖҒsource removal е’Ң dependent computed dirtyпјӣFeature еҸӘйҖҡиҝҮ Data modifier API жҺҲдәҲ/еӣһж»ҡиҫ“е…ҘпјҢдёҚи®Ўз®— computedгҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `DataRuntimeStorage` compute еҲҮзүҮиҙҹиҙЈ `IDataComputeResolver`гҖҒ`DataComputeRegistry`гҖҒcomputed cacheгҖҒдҫқиө–еҸҳеҢ–йҖ’еҪ’ dirty е’ҢеҹәзЎҖ resolver зӨәдҫӢпјӣFeature д»ҚеҸӘж”№иҫ“е…ҘпјҢcomputed иҫ“еҮәеҸӘз”ұ Data resolver и®Ўз®—гҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `RuntimeDataSnapshotLoader` record apply еҲҮзүҮиҙҹиҙЈ `RuntimeDataSnapshot` / `RuntimeDataRecordDto`гҖҒ`LoadFromJson`гҖҒ`DataApplyReport`гҖҒ`ApplyRecord` е’Ң `DataRuntimeBootstrap`пјӣrecord еҶҷе…Ҙеҝ…йЎ»е…ҲжҹҘ `DataDefinitionCatalog`пјҢunknown key / type mismatch / conversion failure / computed жҲ– runtime_only еҶҷе…Ҙеҝ…йЎ»з»“жһ„еҢ–жҠҘе‘ҠпјҢдёҚеӣһйҖҖеҲ° `DataRegistry.GetMeta`гҖӮ
- ж—§ ECS `EntityManager.Spawn` descriptor-first жҺҘе…ҘеҸӘиғҪиө°жҳҫејҸ `EntitySpawnConfig.RuntimeDataBootstrap + RuntimeDataRecord` жҲ– `RuntimeDataRecordTable/RuntimeDataRecordId` еҲҶж”ҜпјӣжңӘжҳҫејҸдј е…Ҙж—¶дҝқз•ҷиҝҒз§»жңҹ `LoadFromConfig`пјҢйҒҝе…Қжү№йҮҸз ҙеқҸж—§ Entity жһ„йҖ и·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮrecord apply еӨұиҙҘж—¶еҝ…йЎ»йҳ»ж–ӯз”ҹжҲҗе№¶жё…зҗҶе®һдҪ“гҖӮ
- **Entity еј•з”Ё DataKey еҝ…йЎ»жҳҜ `DataKey<EntityId?>` жҲ– `DataKey<EntityIdList>`пјҲlist зұ»еһӢз”ұ P1 жҸҗдҫӣпјүпјҢдёҚе…Ғи®ё `DataKey<IEntity?>` жҲ– `DataKey<string>` иЎЁиҫҫ entity-id**гҖӮnullable й»ҳи®ӨеҖјз”Ё `null`пјӣйқһ nullable `DataKey<EntityId>` й»ҳи®ӨеҖјеҝ…йЎ»жҳҜйқҷжҖҒ `EntityId.Empty`пјҢзҰҒжӯў `new EntityId(string.Empty)` жҲ– `new EntityId("")` ad-hocгҖӮ
- еҶҷе…Ҙ typed `DataKey<EntityId?>` ж—¶жҳҫејҸжҸҗдҫӣзұ»еһӢеҸӮж•°пјҲ`Data.Set<EntityId?>(key, entity.EntityId)`пјүжҲ–жҳҫејҸ castпјҢйҒҝе…ҚжіӣеһӢжҺЁж–ӯжӯ§д№үгҖӮ

# systemagent-deepthink

## е®ҡдҪҚ

иҝҷжҳҜ SystemAgent зҡ„ standalone capability skillпјҢдёҚжҳҜ SDD workflowпјҢд№ҹдёҚжҳҜ workflow entry wrapperгҖӮ

е®ғеҗёж”¶ `superpowers:brainstorming` зҡ„ж ёеҝғд»·еҖјпјҡе…ҲиҜ»дёҠдёӢж–ҮгҖҒиҜҶеҲ«иҢғеӣҙгҖҒжҸҗеҮә 2-3 дёӘж–№жЎҲгҖҒиҜҙжҳҺжҺЁиҚҗгҖҒжҡҙйңІзЎ®и®ӨзӮ№пјӣдҪҶдёҚз…§жҗ¬ hook ејәеҲ¶и§ҰеҸ‘гҖҒйҖҗй—®йҖҗзӯ”гҖҒй»ҳи®ӨеҶҷ `docs/superpowers/specs/` жҲ–и®ҫи®Ўйҳ¶ж®өиҮӘеҠЁ commitгҖӮ

## и§ҰеҸ‘жқЎд»¶

- з”ЁжҲ·иҰҒжұӮж·ұеәҰжҖқиҖғгҖҒж–№жЎҲи®ҫи®ЎгҖҒи®ҫи®ЎзЎ®и®ӨжҲ–дёҚиҰҒзӣҙжҺҘе®һзҺ°гҖӮ
- з”ЁжҲ·жҸҗдҫӣзҡ„еҶ…е®№йӣ¶ж•ЈгҖҒзӣ®ж Ү/иҫ№з•Ң/жҲҗеҠҹж ҮеҮҶдёҚжё…пјҢз»§з»ӯе®һзҺ°е®№жҳ“иө°й”ҷж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ
- ж–°еҠҹиғҪгҖҒйҮҚжһ„гҖҒиҝҒз§»гҖҒworkflow/skill/rule/gate/policy ж”№еҠЁиҝӣе…Ҙи®ЎеҲ’жҲ– SDD еүҚйңҖиҰҒеҶ»з»“ж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ
- е®һж–ҪдёӯеҸ‘зҺ°и®ҫи®ЎзҹӣзӣҫгҖҒиҢғеӣҙиҝҮеӨ§гҖҒйЈҺйҷ©жңӘеӨ„зҗҶгҖҒйӘҢж”¶з©әжҙһжҲ–дёҠдёӢж–ҮдёҚи¶ігҖӮ

## еҝ…иҜ»

- `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md`
- `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DesignCritic.md`пјҲlarge жҲ–й«ҳйЈҺйҷ© medium ж—¶пјү
- зӣёе…і routeгҖҒowner skillгҖҒDocsAI жҲ– SystemAgent fact sourceпјҢжҢүеҪ“еүҚд»»еҠЎжңҖе°ҸиҜ»еҸ–гҖӮ
- еҸӘжңүд»»еҠЎдҪҝз”ЁжӯЈејҸ SDDгҖҒйңҖиҰҒи·ЁдјҡиҜқжҒўеӨҚжҲ–йңҖиҰҒиҗҪзӣҳж—¶пјҢжүҚиҜ»еҸ– `Workspace/SDD/docs/SDDFormat.md`гҖҒ`Workspace/SDD/docs/CLI.md` е’ҢеҪ“еүҚ SDD зҡ„ `README.md`гҖҒ`design/INDEX.md`гҖҒ`tasks.md`гҖҒ`progress.md`гҖҒ`bdd.md`гҖӮ

## иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„

йҒөеҫӘ `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md` зҡ„зЎ®и®ӨеҢ…еӯ—ж®өпјҡ

1. Goalпјҡжң¬д»»еҠЎиҰҒи§ЈеҶід»Җд№Ҳй—®йўҳе’Ңйқһзӣ®ж ҮгҖӮ
2. Context Readпјҡе·ІиҜ»еҸ–зҡ„дәӢе®һжәҗгҖҒжңӘиҜ»дёҠдёӢж–Үе’Ң git boundaryгҖӮ
3. Problem ShapeпјҡйңҖжұӮзјәеҸЈгҖҒйҡҗи—ҸеҒҮи®ҫе’ҢеҸҜиғҪиҜҜи§ЈгҖӮ
4. Main Risksпјҡе®һж–ҪгҖҒз»ҙжҠӨгҖҒйӘҢиҜҒе’Ңиҫ№з•ҢйЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ
5. Optionsпјҡ2-3 дёӘеҸҜйҖүж–№жЎҲеҸҠеҸ–иҲҚгҖӮ
6. RecommendationпјҡжҺЁиҚҗж–№жЎҲе’ҢеҺҹеӣ гҖӮ
7. Must ConfirmпјҡдёҚзЎ®и®Өе°ұдёҚиғҪе®үе…ЁжҺЁиҝӣзҡ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ
8. Should Confirmпјҡе»әи®®зЎ®и®ӨдҪҶеҸҜз”Ёй»ҳи®ӨеҖјжҺЁиҝӣзҡ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ
9. Defaults I Will Useпјҡз”ЁжҲ·дёҚиЎҘе……ж—¶йҮҮз”Ёзҡ„й»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫгҖӮ
10. Not RecommendedпјҡдёҚе»әи®®ж–№еҗ‘е’ҢеҺҹеӣ гҖӮ
11. Artifact UpdatesпјҡйңҖиҰҒеҶҷе…Ҙзҡ„ designгҖҒtasksгҖҒbddгҖҒprogressгҖҒnotes жҲ–ж— йңҖиҗҪзӣҳзҡ„еҺҹеӣ гҖӮ

## зЎ®и®Өй—®йўҳиҗҪзӮ№

- дёҚдҪҝз”Ё SDD ж—¶пјҡжңҖз»ҲеӣһеӨҚеҝ…йЎ»жңүйҶ’зӣ®зҡ„ `йңҖиҰҒзЎ®и®Ө` е°ҸиҠӮпјҢеҲ—еҮә Must ConfirmпјӣиӢҘиғҪз”Ёй»ҳи®ӨеҖјжҺЁиҝӣпјҢд№ҹеҲ—еҮә `й»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫ`гҖӮ
- дҪҝз”Ё SDD жҲ–е·Іжңүи®ҫи®Ўж–ҮжЎЈж—¶пјҡжҠҠй—®йўҳеҶҷеңЁи®ҫи®Ўж–ҮжЎЈеҶ…зҡ„ `## Must Confirm`гҖҒ`## Should Confirm`гҖҒ`## Defaults I Will Use` ж ҮйўҳдёӢпјҢдёҚеҚ•зӢ¬еҲӣе»әй—®йўҳж–ҮжЎЈгҖӮ
- з”ЁжҲ·жңҖз»ҲиЈҒеҶігҖҒйҮҮз”Ёзҡ„й»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫе’ҢжҒўеӨҚзӮ№еҶҷе…Ҙ `progress.md`пјӣеҸҜжү§иЎҢдәӢйЎ№еҶҷе…Ҙ `tasks.md`пјӣиЎҢдёәйў„жңҹеҶҷе…Ҙ `bdd.md`пјӣеҸӮиҖғжқҘжәҗе’ҢејҖж”ҫй—®йўҳеҶҷе…Ҙ `notes.md`гҖӮ
- `Artifact Updates` еҝ…йЎ»иҜҙжҳҺжң¬иҪ®еҶҷе…ҘдҪҚзҪ®пјҢжҲ–иҜҙжҳҺдёәд»Җд№ҲеҸӘеңЁиҒҠеӨ©дёӯиҫ“еҮәгҖӮ

## е®һж–Ҫй—ЁзҰҒ

- `Must Confirm` жңӘи§ЈеҶіж—¶пјҢдёҚиҝӣе…Ҙе®һзҺ°гҖӮ
- з”ЁжҲ·еӣһеӨҚвҖңжҢүдҪ зҡ„е»әи®®жү§иЎҢвҖқж—¶пјҢеҸҜйҮҮз”Ё `Recommendation` е’Ң `Defaults I Will Use`пјҢдҪҶеҝ…йЎ»жҠҠй»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫеҶҷе…ҘжңҖз»ҲеӣһеӨҚпјӣдҪҝз”Ё SDD ж—¶иҝҳиҰҒеҶҷе…Ҙ `progress.md`гҖӮ
- small д»»еҠЎеҸҜеҺӢзј©дёә 3-5 иЎҢиҮӘжЈҖпјҢдёҚејәеҲ¶е®Ңж•ҙзЎ®и®ӨеҢ…гҖӮ

## зҰҒжӯў

- дёҚејәеҲ¶жүҖжңүе°Ҹд»»еҠЎйғҪеҲӣе»ә SDDгҖӮ
- дёҚжҠҠи®ҫи®Ўж–ҮжЎЈж•ЈиҗҪеҲ°дёҙж—¶ Idea зӣ®еҪ•дҪңдёәй•ҝжңҹдәӢе®һжәҗгҖӮ
- дёҚеңЁи®ҫи®ЎжңӘжё…жҘҡж—¶зӣІзӣ®е®һж–ҪеӨ§ж”№гҖӮ
- дёҚж–°еўһ brainstorming hookпјҢдёҚйҖҗй—®йҖҗзӯ”йҳ»еЎһз”ЁжҲ·гҖӮ

---
name: verification-before-completion
description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
---

# Verification Before Completion

## Overview

Claiming work is complete without verification is dishonesty, not efficiency.

**Core principle:** Evidence before claims, always.

**Violating the letter of this rule is violating the spirit of this rule.**

## The Iron Law

```
NO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE
```

If you haven't run the verification command in this message, you cannot claim it passes.

## The Gate Function

```
BEFORE claiming any status or expressing satisfaction:

1. IDENTIFY: What command proves this claim?
2. RUN: Execute the FULL command (fresh, complete)
3. READ: Full output, check exit code, count failures
4. VERIFY: Does output confirm the claim?
   - If NO: State actual status with evidence
   - If YES: State claim WITH evidence
5. ONLY THEN: Make the claim

Skip any step = lying, not verifying
```

## Common Failures

| Claim | Requires | Not Sufficient |
|-------|----------|----------------|
| Tests pass | Test command output: 0 failures | Previous run, "should pass" |
| Linter clean | Linter output: 0 errors | Partial check, extrapolation |
| Build succeeds | Build command: exit 0 | Linter passing, logs look good |
| Bug fixed | Test original symptom: passes | Code changed, assumed fixed |
| Regression test works | Red-green cycle verified | Test passes once |
| Agent completed | VCS diff shows changes | Agent reports "success" |
| Requirements met | Line-by-line checklist | Tests passing |

## Red Flags - STOP

- Using "should", "probably", "seems to"
- Expressing satisfaction before verification ("Great!", "Perfect!", "Done!", etc.)
- About to commit/push/PR without verification
- Trusting agent success reports
- Relying on partial verification
- Thinking "just this once"
- Tired and wanting work over
- **ANY wording implying success without having run verification**

## Rationalization Prevention

| Excuse | Reality |
|--------|---------|
| "Should work now" | RUN the verification |
| "I'm confident" | Confidence вү  evidence |
| "Just this once" | No exceptions |
| "Linter passed" | Linter вү  compiler |
| "Agent said success" | Verify independently |
| "I'm tired" | Exhaustion вү  excuse |
| "Partial check is enough" | Partial proves nothing |
| "Different words so rule doesn't apply" | Spirit over letter |

## Key Patterns

**Tests:**
```
вң… [Run test command] [See: 34/34 pass] "All tests pass"
вқҢ "Should pass now" / "Looks correct"
```

**Regression tests (TDD Red-Green):**
```
вң… Write вҶ’ Run (pass) вҶ’ Revert fix вҶ’ Run (MUST FAIL) вҶ’ Restore вҶ’ Run (pass)
вқҢ "I've written a regression test" (without red-green verification)
```

**Build:**
```
вң… [Run build] [See: exit 0] "Build passes"
вқҢ "Linter passed" (linter doesn't check compilation)
```

**Requirements:**
```
вң… Re-read plan вҶ’ Create checklist вҶ’ Verify each вҶ’ Report gaps or completion
вқҢ "Tests pass, phase complete"
```

**Agent delegation:**
```
вң… Agent reports success вҶ’ Check VCS diff вҶ’ Verify changes вҶ’ Report actual state
вқҢ Trust agent report
```

## Why This Matters

From 24 failure memories:
- your human partner said "I don't believe you" - trust broken
- Undefined functions shipped - would crash
- Missing requirements shipped - incomplete features
- Time wasted on false completion вҶ’ redirect вҶ’ rework
- Violates: "Honesty is a core value. If you lie, you'll be replaced."

## When To Apply

**ALWAYS before:**
- ANY variation of success/completion claims
- ANY expression of satisfaction
- ANY positive statement about work state
- Committing, PR creation, task completion
- Moving to next task
- Delegating to agents

**Rule applies to:**
- Exact phrases
- Paraphrases and synonyms
- Implications of success
- ANY communication suggesting completion/correctness

## The Bottom Line

**No shortcuts for verification.**

Run the command. Read the output. THEN claim the result.

This is non-negotiable.

````

/// Data еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗпјҢз”ЁдәҺжү§иЎҢ descriptor write policyгҖӮ

{
    /// <summary>
    /// еҲӣе»әеҶҷе…ҘиҜҠж–ӯжҠҘе‘ҠгҖӮ
    /// </summary>

    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>

        Source = source;

public sealed record DataWriteError(

/// <summary>
/// и·Ёзұ»еһӢж§ҪдҪҚз®ЎзҗҶиҫ№з•ҢпјӣдёҚжҡҙйңІдёҡеҠЎеҖјзҡ„ object еӯҳеӮЁе…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
/// </summary>
public interface IDataSlot
{
    /// <summary>
    /// еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    DataDefinition Definition { get; }

    /// <summary>
    /// ж§ҪдҪҚе®һйҷ…дҝқеӯҳзҡ„ CLR зұ»еһӢгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    Type ValueClrType { get; }

    /// <summary>
    /// жҳҜеҗҰе·ІжңүиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    bool HasValue { get; }

    /// <summary>
    /// иҫ№з•ҢиҜҠж–ӯз”ЁпјҡиҜ»еҸ–жңүж•ҲеҖјпјҢдјҡеңЁеҖјзұ»еһӢеӯ—ж®өдёҠеҸ‘з”ҹиЈ…з®ұгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    object? GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();

    /// <summary>
    /// иҫ№з•ҢиҜҠж–ӯз”ЁпјҡиҜ»еҸ–е·ІеҶҷе…ҘеҹәзЎҖеҖјпјҢдјҡеңЁеҖјзұ»еһӢеӯ—ж®өдёҠеҸ‘з”ҹиЈ…з®ұгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    object? GetStoredValueForDiagnostics();

    /// <summary>
    /// д»Һ loader/debug/TestSystem иҫ№з•ҢеҶҷе…Ҙе·ІйҖҡиҝҮзӯ–з•Ҙж ЎйӘҢзҡ„еҖјгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    bool SetValueFromBoundary(object? value);

    bool ClearValue();

    bool AddModifier(DataModifier modifier);

    bool RemoveModifier(string modifierId);

    int RemoveModifiersBySource(object source);

    bool ClearModifiers();

    List<DataModifier> GetModifiers();
}

/// <summary>
/// еҚ•дёӘ descriptor еӯ—ж®өзҡ„жіӣеһӢиҝҗиЎҢж—¶ж§ҪдҪҚгҖӮ
/// </summary>
/// <typeparam name="T">ж§ҪдҪҚдҝқеӯҳзҡ„ CLR еҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</typeparam>
public sealed class DataSlot<T> : IDataSlot
{
    private readonly List<DataModifier> _modifiers = new();
    private T _value = default!;

    /// <summary>
    /// еҲӣе»әжіӣеһӢиҝҗиЎҢж—¶ж§ҪдҪҚгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="definition">еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ</param>
    public DataSlot(DataDefinition definition)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(definition);
        Definition = definition; // descriptor е®ҡд№ү
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public DataDefinition Definition { get; }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public Type ValueClrType => typeof(T);

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public bool HasValue { get; private set; }

    /// <summary>
    /// иҺ·еҸ–еҪ“еүҚ typed жңүж•ҲеҖјпјӣжңӘеҶҷе…Ҙж—¶еӣһйҖҖеҲ° descriptor defaultгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    public T GetEffectiveValue()
    {
        var baseValue = HasValue ? _value : ConvertToSlotValue(Definition.DefaultValue);
        return _modifiers.Count == 0 ? baseValue : ApplyModifiers(baseValue);
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// еҶҷе…Ҙ typed иҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="value">е·ІиҪ¬жҚўе№¶йҖҡиҝҮзӯ–з•Ҙж ЎйӘҢзҡ„еҖјгҖӮ</param>
    public bool SetValue(T value)
    {
        if (HasValue && EqualityComparer<T>.Default.Equals(_value, value))
        {
            return false;
        }

        _value = value;
        HasValue = true;
        return true;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public bool SetValueFromBoundary(object? value)
    {
        return SetValue(ConvertToSlotValue(value));
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public bool ClearValue()
    {
        if (!HasValue)
        {
            return false;
        }

        _value = default!;
        HasValue = false;
        return true;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public bool AddModifier(DataModifier modifier)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(modifier);
        for (var i = 0; i < _modifiers.Count; i++)
        {
            if (string.Equals(_modifiers[i].Id, modifier.Id, StringComparison.Ordinal))
            {
                return false;
            }
        }

        var insertIndex = _modifiers.BinarySearch(modifier, ModifierPriorityComparer.Instance);
        if (insertIndex < 0)
        {
            insertIndex = ~insertIndex;
        }

        _modifiers.Insert(insertIndex, modifier);
        return true;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public bool RemoveModifier(string modifierId)
    {
        return _modifiers.RemoveAll(modifier => string.Equals(modifier.Id, modifierId, StringComparison.Ordinal)) > 0;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public int RemoveModifiersBySource(object source)
    {
        return _modifiers.RemoveAll(modifier => Equals(modifier.Source, source));
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public bool ClearModifiers()
    {
        if (_modifiers.Count == 0)
        {
            return false;
        }

        _modifiers.Clear();
        return true;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />

```

**Output**

```text
Chunk ID: 6e3f37
Wall time: 0.0000 seconds
Process exited with code 0
Original token count: 3193
Output:
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public List<DataModifier> GetModifiers()
    {
        return new List<DataModifier>(_modifiers);
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public object? GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()
    {
        return GetEffectiveValue();
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public object? GetStoredValueForDiagnostics()
    {
        return HasValue ? _value : null;
    }

    private T ApplyModifiers(T baseValue)
    {
        if (!TryGetNumeric(baseValue, out var numericBase))
        {
            return baseValue;
        }

        var additive = 0d;
        var multiplicative = 1d;
        var finalAdditive = 0d;
        double? overrideValue = null;
        double? cap = null;
        for (var i = 0; i < _modifiers.Count; i++)
        {
            var modifier = _modifiers[i];
            switch (modifier.Type)
            {
                case ModifierType.Additive:
                    additive += modifier.Value;
                    break;
                case ModifierType.Multiplicative:
                    multiplicative *= modifier.Value;
                    break;
                case ModifierType.FinalAdditive:
                    finalAdditive += modifier.Value;
                    break;
                case ModifierType.Override:
                    overrideValue ??= modifier.Value;
                    break;
                case ModifierType.Cap:
                    cap = cap.HasValue ? Math.Min(cap.Value, modifier.Value) : modifier.Value;
                    break;
            }
        }

        var effective = overrideValue ?? ((numericBase + additive) * multiplicative + finalAdditive);
        if (cap.HasValue)
        {
            effective = Math.Min(effective, cap.Value);
        }

        if (Definition.MinValue.HasValue && effective < Definition.MinValue.Value)
        {
            effective = Definition.MinValue.Value;
        }

        if (Definition.MaxValue.HasValue && effective > Definition.MaxValue.Value)
        {
            effective = Definition.MaxValue.Value;
        }

        return ConvertNumericToSlotType(effective);
    }

    private T ConvertToSlotValue(object? value)
    {
        var converted = DataValueConverter.ConvertForRead(value, typeof(T), Definition.ValueType);
        return converted == null ? default! : (T)converted;
    }

    private static bool TryGetNumeric(T value, out double numericValue)
    {
        var targetType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(typeof(T)) ?? typeof(T);
        if (targetType == typeof(int))
        {
            numericValue = Convert.ToInt32(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
            return true;
        }

        if (targetType == typeof(float))
        {
            numericValue = Convert.ToSingle(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
            return true;
        }

        if (targetType == typeof(double))
        {
            numericValue = Convert.ToDouble(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
            return true;
        }

        numericValue = 0d;
        return false;
    }

    private static T ConvertNumericToSlotType(double value)
    {
        var targetType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(typeof(T)) ?? typeof(T);
        object typedValue;
        if (targetType == typeof(int))
        {
            typedValue = (int)value;
        }
        else if (targetType == typeof(float))
        {
            typedValue = (float)value;
        }
        else
        {
            typedValue = value;
        }

        return (T)typedValue;
    }

    private sealed class ModifierPriorityComparer : IComparer<DataModifier>
    {
        public static readonly ModifierPriorityComparer Instance = new();

        public int Compare(DataModifier? x, DataModifier? y)
        {
            if (x == null && y == null) return 0;
            if (x == null) return -1;
            if (y == null) return 1;
            return x.Priority.CompareTo(y.Priority);
        }
    }
}

/// <summary>
/// descriptor-first Data еҖјиҪ¬жҚўдёҺ runtime policy ж ЎйӘҢе·Ҙе…·гҖӮ
/// </summary>
public static class DataValueConverter
{
    private static readonly JsonSerializerOptions ModifierListJsonOptions = CreateModifierListJsonOptions();

    /// <summary>
    /// жЈҖжҹҘжіӣеһӢиҜ»еҸ–зұ»еһӢжҳҜеҗҰе…је®№ descriptor еҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="T">и°ғз”Ёж–№жңҹжңӣзҡ„ CLR зұ»еһӢгҖӮ</typeparam>
    /// <param name="valueType">descriptor еҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</param>
    public static bool IsCompatible<T>(DataValueType valueType)
    {
        return IsCompatible(typeof(T), valueType);
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// жЈҖжҹҘ CLR зұ»еһӢжҳҜеҗҰе…је®№ descriptor еҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="clrType">и°ғз”Ёж–№жңҹжңӣзҡ„ CLR зұ»еһӢгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="valueType">descriptor еҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</param>
    public static bool IsCompatible(Type clrType, DataValueType valueType)
    {
        var targetType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(clrType) ?? clrType;
        return valueType switch
        {
            DataValueType.String => targetType == typeof(string),
            DataValueType.StringArray => targetType == typeof(string[]),
            DataValueType.Int => targetType == typeof(int),
            DataValueType.Float => targetType == typeof(float),
            DataValueType.Double => targetType == typeof(double),
            DataValueType.Bool => targetType == typeof(bool),
            DataValueType.Vector2 => targetType == typeof(System.Numerics.Vector2) || IsGodotVector2Type(targetType),
            DataValueType.Enum => targetType == typeof(string) || targetType.IsEnum,
            DataValueType.ModifierList => targetType == typeof(FeatureModifierEntryData[]),
            DataValueType.ObjectRef => targetType == typeof(ResourceRef) || (!targetType.IsValueType && targetType != typeof(string)),
            _ => false
        };
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// жҢү descriptor еҖјзұ»еһӢдёҘж јиҪ¬жҚўиҫ“е…ҘеҖјгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="rawValue">еҺҹе§Ӣиҫ“е…ҘеҖјгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="valueType">descriptor еҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="convertedValue">иҪ¬жҚўеҗҺзҡ„еҖјгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="error">еӨұиҙҘеҺҹеӣ гҖӮ</param>
    public static bool TryConvert(object? rawValue, DataValueType valueType, out object? convertedValue, out string error)
    {
        convertedValue = null;
        error = string.Empty;
        if (rawValue == null)
        {
            return true;
        }

        try
        {
            convertedValue = valueType switch
            {
                DataValueType.String => ConvertString(rawValue),
                DataValueType.StringArray => ConvertStringArray(rawValue),
                DataValueType.Int => ConvertInt(rawValue),
                DataValueType.Float => ConvertFloat(rawValue),
                DataValueType.Double => ConvertDouble(rawValue),
                DataValueType.Bool => ConvertBool(rawValue),
                DataValueType.Vector2 => ConvertVector2(rawValue),
                DataValueType.Enum => ConvertEnum(rawValue),
                DataValueType.ModifierList => ConvertModifierList(rawValue),
                DataValueType.ObjectRef => ConvertObjectRef(rawValue),
                _ => throw new InvalidOperationException($"жңӘзҹҘ DataValueTypeпјҡ{valueType}")
            };
            return true;
        }
        catch (Exception ex) when (ex is FormatException or InvalidCastException or OverflowException or InvalidOperationException)
        {
            error = ex.Message;
            return false;
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// жү§иЎҢ write/range/allowed_values зӯ–з•Ҙе№¶иҫ“еҮәжңҖз»ҲеҶҷе…ҘеҖјгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="definition">еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="rawValue">еҺҹе§Ӣиҫ“е…ҘеҖјгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="finalValue">жңҖз»ҲеҶҷе…ҘеҖјгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="error">еӨұиҙҘеҺҹеӣ гҖӮ</param>
    public static bool TryApplyWritePolicies(
        DataDefinition definition,
        object? rawValue,
        DataWriteSource source,
        out object? finalValue,
        out string error)
    {
        var success = TryApplyWritePoliciesWithReport(definition, rawValue, source, out finalValue, out var writeError);
        error = writeError?.Message ?? string.Empty;
        return success;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// жү§иЎҢ write/range/allowed_values зӯ–з•ҘпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ–й”ҷиҜҜгҖӮ
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="definition">еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="rawValue">еҺҹе§Ӣиҫ“е…ҘеҖјгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="source">еҶҷе…ҘжқҘжәҗгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="finalValue">жңҖз»ҲеҶҷе…ҘеҖјгҖӮ</param>
    /// <param name="writeError">з»“жһ„еҢ–й”ҷиҜҜгҖӮ</param>
    public static bool TryApplyWritePoliciesWithReport(
        DataDefinition definition,
        object? rawValue,
        DataWriteSource source,
        out object? finalValue,
        out DataWriteError? writeError)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(definition);
        finalValue = null;
        writeError = null;
        if (!CanWrite(definition.WritePolicy, source))
        {
            writeError = CreateWriteError(
                definition,
                "write_policy_rejected",
                $"Data write policy жӢ’з»қеҶҷе…Ҙпјҡ{definition.StableKey} ({definition.WritePolicy}, source={source})",
                source,
                rawValue,
                definition.WritePolicy.ToString());
            return false;
        }

        if (RequiresRuntimeObjectReference(definition) && rawValue is string or ResourceRef)
        {
            writeError = CreateWriteError(
                definition,
                "wrong_clr_type",
                $"Data object_ref иҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҜ№иұЎеӯ—ж®өжӢ’з»қиө„жәҗеј•з”Ёпјҡ{definition.StableKey} expected={definition.RuntimeTypeId}",
                source,
                rawValue,
                null,
                definition.RuntimeTypeId);
            return false;
        }

        if (!TryConvert(rawValue, definition.ValueType, out var convertedValue, out var error))
        {
            writeError = CreateWriteError(
                definition,
                "wrong_clr_type",
                $"Data value type дёҚеҢ№й…Қпјҡ{definition.StableKey} ({definition.ValueType}) {error}",
                source,
                rawValue,
                null);
            return false;
        }

        if (RequiresRuntimeObjectReference(definition) && !MatchesRuntimeObjectReference(definition, convertedValue))
        {
            writeError = CreateWriteError(
                definition,
                "wrong_clr_type",
                $"Data object_ref иҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҜ№иұЎзұ»еһӢдёҚеҢ№й…Қпјҡ{definition.StableKey} expected={definition.RuntimeTypeId}",
                source,
                rawValue,
                null,
                definition.RuntimeTypeId);
            return false;
        }

        if (!IsAllowedValue(definition, convertedValue))
        {
            writeError = CreateWriteError(
                definition,
                "allowed_values_rejected",
                $"Data allowed_values жӢ’з»қеҶҷе…Ҙпјҡ{definition.StableKey} = {ToStableText(convertedValue)}",
                source,
                rawValue,
                "allowed_values");
            return false;
        }

        if (!TryApplyRangePolicy(definition, convertedValue, source, out finalValue, out var rangeError))
        {
            writeError = CreateWriteError(
                definition,
                "range_policy_rejected",
                rangeError,
                source,
                rawValue,
                definition.RangePolicy.ToString());
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    private static DataWriteError CreateWriteError(
        DataDefinition definition,
        string code,
        string message,
        DataWriteSource source,
        object? rawValue,
        string? policy,
        string? expectedTypeOverride = null)
    {
        return new DataWriteError(
            code,
            definition.StableKey,
            message,
            source,
            expectedTypeOverride ?? definition.ValueType.ToString(),
            rawValue?.GetType().Name,
            policy,
            ToStableText(rawValue));
    }

    private static bool CanWrite(DataWritePolicy policy, DataWriteSource source)
    {
        return policy switch
        {
            DataWritePolicy.ReadWrite => true,
            DataWritePolicy.LoaderOnly => source == DataWriteSource.Loader,
            DataWritePolicy.SystemOnly => source == DataWriteSource.System || source == DataWriteSource.Loader,

```
