Output:
# Data Runtime Generic Slot Hard Cutover

## Goal

жҠҠ Runtime Data дё»й“ҫи·Ҝд»Һ `object?` еҖјж§ҪеҲҮеҲ°жіӣеһӢж§ҪдҪҚпјҢйҷҚдҪҺ typed `DataKey<T>` иҜ»еҶҷгҖҒmodifierгҖҒcomputed cache зҡ„иЈ…з®ұжӢҶз®ұе’ҢеҠЁжҖҒиҪ¬жҚўйЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ

жң¬иҪ®зӣ®ж Үпјҡ

- `Data.Set<T>(DataKey<T>, T)` / `Data.Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` еҜ№йқһ computed еӯ—ж®өзӣҙжҺҘе‘Ҫдёӯ `DataSlot<T>`гҖӮ
- ж•°еҖј modifier зҡ„еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖҒжңүж•ҲеҖје’Ң slot cache д»Ҙ `T` дҝқеӯҳпјҢдёҚеҶҚйҖҡиҝҮ `object? -> double -> object?` дҪңдёәеӯҳеӮЁдё»й“ҫи·ҜгҖӮ
- computed д»Қе…је®№зҺ°жңү resolver жіЁеҶҢиЎЁпјҢдҪҶ runtime cache иҝӣе…Ҙ typed `DataSlot<T>`пјӣresolver иҝ”еӣһеҖјеҸӘеңЁиҫ№з•ҢиҪ¬жҚўдёҖж¬ЎгҖӮ
- `SetUntyped`гҖҒsnapshot loaderгҖҒdebug/TestSystem dump жҡӮз•ҷ Data иҫ№з•ҢпјҢе№¶жҳҺзЎ®ж ҮжіЁиЈ…з®ұ/GC йЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ
- еҸӘдҝ®ж”№ Data owner иҢғеӣҙпјӣEventгҖҒFeatureгҖҒAbilityгҖҒObjectPoolгҖҒTargetSelectorгҖҒLogger дёҚеңЁжң¬ SDD ж”№гҖӮ

## Context

### Context Read

- Git Boundary: `/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI`
- Worktree: noneгҖӮз”ЁжҲ·иҰҒжұӮеңЁеҪ“еүҚд»“жҢү Data ж–№жЎҲз»§з»ӯжү§иЎҢпјӣеҲӣе»әдёҙж—¶ worktree дјҡеўһеҠ  SDD/AI config еҗҢжӯҘеҷӘйҹіпјҢжң¬иҪ®еңЁе№ІеҮҖе·ҘдҪңеҢәзӣҙжҺҘж”№гҖӮ
- Baseline Status: SDD еҲӣе»әеүҚ `git status --short` cleanпјӣеҲӣе»әе№¶еҗҜеҠЁеҗҺеҸӘжңү SDD index/catalog е’Ңж–° SDD зӣ®еҪ•ж”№еҠЁгҖӮ
- Submodule Boundary: дёҚж¶үеҸҠжёёжҲҸд»“е’Ң submoduleгҖӮ
- Workflow: `NewFeature` / large SDD refactorгҖӮ
- Owner skills: `ecs-data`гҖҒ`data-authoring`пјӣе®һзҺ°еҸӘи§ҰеҸҠ Data runtimeпјҢдёҚж”№ DataOS schema / seed ж—¶дёҚиҝҗиЎҢз”ҹжҲҗеҷЁгҖӮ
- е·ІиҜ»дәӢе®һжәҗпјҡ
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Routes/NewFeature.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DesignCritic.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/Planner.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/TestDesigner.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Rules/ReviewGates.md`
  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Rules/Documentation.md`
  - `Workspace/SDD/docs/SDDFormat.md`
  - `Workspace/SDD/docs/CLI.md`
  - `Workspace/SDD/docs/ValidationRules.md`
  - `DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/Data/Dataзі»з»ҹиҜҙжҳҺ.md`
  - `design/00-жҖ»и§ҲдёҺAI-firstиЈҒеҶі.md`
  - `design/01-DataиҝҗиЎҢж—¶objectеҺ»йҷӨи®ҫи®Ў.md`
  - `design/01-DataSlotз»“жһ„еҢ–иЈ…з®ұ.md`
  - `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/*.cs`
  - `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/*.cs`

### Problem Shape

еҪ“еүҚ Data е·Іе®ҢжҲҗ descriptor-first / snapshot-first / generated `DataKey<T>`пјҢдҪҶ storage д»ҚеңЁзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„дёўеӨұжіӣеһӢдҝЎжҒҜпјҡ

- `DataRuntimeStorage.TrySet<T>` и°ғ `TrySetUntyped(key.StableKey, value, ...)`пјҢеҖјзұ»еһӢеҶҷе…Ҙдјҡиҝӣе…Ҙ `object?` еҸӮж•°гҖӮ
- `DataSlot.Value object?` дҝқеӯҳжүҖжңүиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҹәзЎҖеҖјгҖӮ
- `DataSlot.GetEffectiveValue(): object?` е’Ң `DataValueConverter.ConvertForRead(object?)` и®©иҜ»еҸ–з»§з»ӯиө°еҠЁжҖҒиҪ¬жҚўгҖӮ
- `DataSlot.ApplyModifiers(object?)` жҠҠж•°еҖјжӢҶжҲҗ `double` еҗҺеҶҚжҢү descriptor иЈ…еӣһ `object`гҖӮ
- `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>` дҝқеӯҳ computed иҫ“еҮәгҖӮ
- `DataChangeRecord` е’Ң `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged` д»ҚжүҝиҪҪ `object?` old/newпјҢдҪҶиҝҷжҳҜ Event/diagnostic иҫ№з•ҢпјҢжң¬иҪ®дёҚејәиЎҢж”№ Event еҚҸи®®гҖӮ

### Main Risks

- **иҢғеӣҙиҶЁиғҖ**пјҡеҰӮжһңжң¬иҪ®еҗҢж—¶еҲ йҷӨ `PropertyChanged(object?)` жҲ–ж”№ Feature/Ability contextпјҢдјҡи·ЁеҲ° Event/Capability SDDгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡеҸӘеңЁ Data runtime еҶ…йғЁ typed еҢ–пјҢе…¬е…ұдәӢд»¶еҚҸи®®жҡӮз•ҷгҖӮ
- **loader е…је®№иҫ№з•Ң**пјҡsnapshot loader еҪ“еүҚеҸӘиғҪдј  untyped еҖјгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡдҝқз•ҷ `SetUntyped`пјҢдҪҶи®©е®ғеҸӘдҪңдёәиҫ№з•Ң APIпјҢеҶ…йғЁиҪ¬жҚўеҗҺеҶҷ typed slotгҖӮ
- **computed resolver иҝҒз§»жҲҗжң¬**пјҡдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§жҠҠжүҖжңү resolver ж”№жҲҗ `IDataComputeResolver<T>` дјҡзүөеҠЁ Feature test е’Ң registryгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡжң¬иҪ®е…Ҳи®© computed slot/cache typed еҢ–пјҢresolver иҝ”еӣһ object еҸӘдҪңдёә registry иҫ№з•Ңпјӣе®Ңж•ҙ `IDataComputeResolver<T>` еҸҜд»ҘеҗҺз»ӯзӢ¬з«Ӣж”¶еҸЈгҖӮ
- **жөӢиҜ•иҜҒжҚ®дёҚи¶і**пјҡDataOS Godot scene еҸӘиғҪиҜҒжҳҺиЎҢдёәпјҢдёҚзӣҙжҺҘиҜҒжҳҺж— иЈ…з®ұгҖӮеӨ„зҗҶж–№ејҸпјҡж–°еўһ runtime contract жөӢиҜ•жЈҖжҹҘ slot еҪўжҖҒе’Ң typed API дёҚиө° untyped counterпјҢеҶҚз”Ё grep gate жЈҖжҹҘдё»й“ҫи·ҜгҖӮ

## Design

### Options

1. **жҺЁиҚҗпјҡжёҗиҝӣ hard cutover еҲ° `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot`**
   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡз¬ҰеҗҲйЎ№зӣ®зә§иЈҒеҶіпјӣдҝқз•ҷ dictionary з®ЎзҗҶиҫ№з•ҢпјӣиЎҢдёәйЈҺйҷ©еҸҜз”ұзҺ°жңү DataRuntimeTestScene иҰҶзӣ–гҖӮ
   - д»Јд»·пјҡйңҖиҰҒеңЁ `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` еҶ…жӢҶеҮә typed slotгҖҒtyped converter/policy е’Ң computed typed helperгҖӮ

2. **дёҖж¬ЎжҖ§е®Ңе…Ёж”№ `IDataComputeResolver<T>`гҖҒtyped `DataChanged<T>` е’Ң public untyped еҲ йҷӨ**
   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡжӣҙжҺҘиҝ‘йЎ№зӣ®зә§жңҖз»ҲеҪўжҖҒгҖӮ
   - д»Јд»·пјҡдјҡи·Ё Event/Feature/Ability/TestSystem и°ғз”ЁзӮ№пјҢиҝқиғҢвҖңе…Ҳж”№ dataпјҢе…¶д»–дёҚеҠЁвҖқгҖӮ

3. **еҸӘеҠ жіЁйҮҠе’Ң grep gateпјҢдёҚйҮҚжһ„ storage**
   - дјҳзӮ№пјҡдҪҺйЈҺйҷ©гҖӮ
   - д»Јд»·пјҡдёҚиғҪи§ЈеҶі `DataSlot.Value object?` е’Ң `Data.Get/Set<T>` зғӯи·Ҝеҫ„й—®йўҳгҖӮ

### Recommendation

йҮҮз”Ёж–№жЎҲ 1гҖӮжң¬ SDD еҒҡ Data еҶ…йғЁзЎ¬еҲҮпјҡ`DataSlot<T>` еӯҳеӮЁдёҡеҠЎеҖјпјҢ`IDataSlot` еҸӘжҡҙйңІ metadataгҖҒmodifier ж“ҚдҪңгҖҒdiagnostic dump е’Ңиҫ№з•ҢеҶҷе…Ҙпјӣ`Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>` дҪңдёәи·Ёзұ»еһӢз®ЎзҗҶиҫ№з•ҢеҸҜдҝқз•ҷгҖӮе…¬е…ұ Event payloadгҖҒFeature/Ability context е’Ң TestSystem UI еұ•зӨәз•ҷз»ҷеҗҺз»ӯ SDDгҖӮ

### Target Shape

- `IDataSlot`
  - жҡҙйңІ `DataDefinition Definition`гҖҒ`Type ValueClrType`гҖҒ`bool HasValue`гҖӮ
  - жҸҗдҫӣ `GetEffectiveValueAsObjectForDiagnostics()` е’Ң `GetStoredValueAsObjectForDiagnostics()`пјҢеҸӘдҫӣдәӢд»¶/diagnostic/dump иҫ№з•ҢдҪҝз”ЁгҖӮ
  - дёҚжҸҗдҫӣ `object? Value` дҪңдёәдёҡеҠЎеҖје…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
- `DataSlot<T>`
  - дҝқеӯҳ `T?` жҲ– `T` + `HasValue`гҖӮ
  - `GetEffectiveValue()` иҝ”еӣһ `T`гҖӮ
  - `SetValue(T value)` з”Ё `EqualityComparer<T>.Default` еҲӨзӯүгҖӮ
  - `TrySetFromBoundary(object? raw, ...)` е…Ҳиө° converter/policyпјҢеҶҚеҶҷ typed valueгҖӮ
- `NumericDataSlot<T>`
  - еҸӘз”ЁдәҺ `int/float/double` descriptorгҖӮ
  - modifier з®ЎзәҝеҶ…йғЁз”Ё double и®Ўз®—пјҢдҪҶеҶҷеӣһ typed `T`пјҢslot/cache дёҚдҝқеӯҳ `object?`гҖӮ
- `ComputedDataSlot<T>`
  - зј“еӯҳ `T _cachedValue` + dirty зҠ¶жҖҒгҖӮ
  - resolver иҫ№з•Ңиҝ”еӣһ object еҗҺз«ӢеҚіиҪ¬жҚўжҲҗ `T`гҖӮ
- `DataRuntimeStorage`
  - `_slots: Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>`гҖӮ
  - `TrySet<T>(DataKey<T>, T, ...)` зӣҙжҺҘи§Јжһҗ definition -> `DataSlot<T>` -> typed policy -> `SetValue(T)`гҖӮ
  - `Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` зӣҙжҺҘеҸ– `DataSlot<T>.GetEffectiveValue()`гҖӮ
  - `SetUntyped` дҝқз•ҷдёә loader/debug/TestSystem иҫ№з•ҢпјҢжіЁйҮҠж ҮжҳҺеҖјзұ»еһӢдјҡиЈ…з®ұпјҢдёҚжҺЁиҚҗдёҡеҠЎи°ғз”ЁгҖӮ

### Must Confirm

- noneгҖӮжң¬иҪ®з”ЁжҲ·е·ІжҳҺзЎ®вҖңжҢүз…§ Data зҡ„ж–№жЎҲз”ҹжҲҗ SDD е№¶жү§иЎҢпјҢе…Ҳж”№ dataпјҢе…¶д»–дёҚеҠЁвҖқгҖӮдёәйҒҝе…Қйҳ»еЎһжү§иЎҢпјҢжң¬ SDD йҮҮз”Ё Data-only й»ҳи®ӨеҒҮи®ҫжҺЁиҝӣгҖӮ

### Should Confirm

- еҗҺз»ӯжҳҜеҗҰеҲӣе»әзӢ¬з«Ӣ Event SDD еҲ йҷӨ `PropertyChanged(object?)` е’Ң Event dynamic objectгҖӮ
- еҗҺз»ӯжҳҜеҗҰеҲӣе»әзӢ¬з«Ӣ Feature/Ability SDD еҲ йҷӨ `ActivationData/ExecuteResult object?`гҖӮ

### Defaults I Will Use

- `SetUntyped`гҖҒ`TrySetUntyped` е’Ң `GetAll` жҡӮз•ҷ Data boundaryпјҢдёҚдҪңдёәдёҡеҠЎзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ
- `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged(string, object?, object?)` жң¬иҪ®дёҚж”№пјҢеҸӘд»Һ typed slot еңЁйҖҡзҹҘиҫ№з•Ңз”ҹжҲҗ old/new objectгҖӮ
- `IDataComputeResolver` е…¬е…ұжҺҘеҸЈжң¬иҪ®дёҚж”№пјҢcomputed slot еҶ…йғЁ typed cache е…ҲиҗҪең°гҖӮ
- дёҚж”№ DataOS schemaгҖҒsnapshotгҖҒgenerated DataKeyпјҢйҷӨйқһзј–иҜ‘жҲ–жөӢиҜ•жҡҙйңІеҝ…йЎ»еҗҢжӯҘгҖӮ
- дёҚж”№жёёжҲҸд»“е’Ң BrotatoLike submoduleгҖӮ

### Not Recommended

- дёҚеј•е…Ҙ `DataRuntimeValue` еӨҡеӯ—ж®ө unionгҖӮйЎ№зӣ®зә§и®ҫи®Ўе·ІиЈҒеҶіиҜҘж–№жЎҲеҶ—дҪҷпјҢдјҡеӨҚеҲ¶ descriptor зұ»еһӢдҝЎжҒҜе№¶еҲ¶йҖ ж–°еҠЁжҖҒеҲҶеҸ‘еұӮгҖӮ
- дёҚз”ЁеӨҡеӯ—е…ё `Dictionary<string, float/int/bool>` дҪңдёәжң¬иҪ®й»ҳи®Өж–№жЎҲпјӣе®ғж— жі•иҮӘз„¶иҰҶзӣ– ResourceRefгҖҒstring arrayгҖҒmodifier listгҖҒcomputed е’Ң diagnosticsгҖӮ
- дёҚеңЁжң¬ SDD еҲ йҷӨ Event/Feature object APIпјӣйӮЈдјҡи·ЁеҮәз”ЁжҲ·жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„ Data-only иҢғеӣҙгҖӮ

## Verification

### Standard Answer

- expectedInputs: Data descriptor definitions for float/int/double/bool/string/string_array/object_ref/modifier_list/computed; typed `DataKey<T>` set/get; loader `SetUntyped`; modifier changes; computed dependency dirty.
- expectedObservations: typed set/get creates `DataSlot<T>` or numeric typed slot; typed path does not increment untyped boundary counter; modifier and computed effective values match previous behavior; loader/debug untyped still converts and reports structured errors.
- passCriteria: DataRuntimeTestScene covers typed slot contract, modifier pipeline, computed cache, diagnostics and existing DataOS behavior; grep gate shows `DataSlot.Value object?` and `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>` removed from Data runtime.
- failCriteria: typed `DataKey<T>` write still calls `TrySetUntyped`; slot exposes business `object? Value`; modifier/computed behavior regresses; DataOS validator or build fails.
- artifactPath: `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataRuntimeTestScene.cs` plus command outputs recorded in `progress.md`.

### Commands

```bash
dotnet build Brotato_my.csproj --no-restore /clp:ErrorsOnly
bash Data/DataOS/Tools/validate-dataos.sh Data/DataOS/Authoring/slimeainew.authoring.db
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate SDD-0031
python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all
bash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh
bash Workspace/SystemAgent/Tools/skill-test/lint.sh static all --no-fail --summary-only
rg -n "class DataSlot\\b|object\\? Value|Dictionary<string, object\\?> _computedCache|TrySetUntyped\\(key\\.StableKey, value" Src/ECS/Runtime/Data
```

еҰӮжһң Godot CLI еҸҜз”ЁпјҢиҝҪеҠ пјҡ

```bash
GODOT=/home/slime/Code/Godot/GodotEngine/4.x/Godot_v4.6.2-stable_mono_linux_x86_64/Godot_v4.6.2-stable_mono_linux.x86_64
$GODOT --headless --path . --scene res://Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataRuntimeTestScene.tscn
```

````

   504	            if (kvp.Value is float || kvp.Value is int)
   505	            {
   506	                float value = Convert.ToSingle(kvp.Value);
   507	                if (Math.Abs(value) < float.Epsilon) continue;
   508	
   509	                var modifier = new DataModifier(
   510	                    ModifierType.Additive,
   511	                    value,
   512	                    priority: 0,
   513	                    source: sourceEntity
   514	                );
   515	                AddModifier(kvp.Key, modifier);
   516	            }
   517	        }
   518	    }

# Data иҝҗиЎҢж—¶жіӣеһӢеӯҳеӮЁи®ҫи®Ў

## еҪ“еүҚз»“и®ә

Data еҝ…йЎ»ж”№пјҢиҖҢдё”еә”жҢү hard cutover ж”№гҖӮеҪ“еүҚ Data е·Із»ҸеңЁдәӢе®һжәҗеұӮе®ҢжҲҗ DataOS descriptorгҖҒruntime snapshotгҖҒgenerated `DataKey<T>`пјҢи°ғз”Ёдҫ§д№ҹе·Із»ҸжҳҜ `Data.Get/Set<T>(DataKey<T>)`пјҢдҪҶиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҖјеӯҳеӮЁд»ҚеӣһеҲ° `object?`гҖӮиҝҷдјҡи®© typed handle зҡ„ AI-first ж”¶зӣҠеңЁзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„иў«жҠөж¶ҲгҖӮ

з”ЁжҲ·еҲӨж–ӯвҖңData зҡ„ object й—®йўҳжҜ”иҫғеӨ§вҖқжҲҗз«ӢгҖӮData жҳҜ ECS иҝҗиЎҢж—¶зҠ¶жҖҒе®№еҷЁпјҢиҜ»еҶҷйў‘зҺҮиҝңй«ҳдәҺеӨ§йғЁеҲҶе·Ҙе…·еұӮ APIпјҢдёҚиғҪз»§з»ӯжҠҠ `object?` еҪ“дё»й“ҫи·ҜгҖӮ

з”ЁжҲ·еҜ№дёҠдёҖзүҲи®ҫи®Ўзҡ„жү№иҜ„д№ҹжҲҗз«ӢпјҡдёҚеә”еҶҚз”ЁдёҖдёӘеёҰ `IntValue/FloatValue/BoolValue/...` еӨҡеӯ—ж®өзҡ„ `DataRuntimeValue` union жӣҝд»Ј `object?`гҖӮйӮЈеҸӘжҳҜжҠҠвҖңдёҖдёӘ object еӯҳд»»ж„Ҹзұ»еһӢвҖқзҡ„й—®йўҳжҚўжҲҗвҖңдёҖдёӘз»“жһ„дҪ“жҗәеёҰжүҖжңүеҸҜиғҪзұ»еһӢзҡ„еӯ—ж®өвҖқпјҢдјҡеј•е…ҘеҶ—дҪҷеӯ—ж®өгҖҒйўқеӨ–еҲҶеҸ‘гҖҒи°ғиҜ•жӯ§д№үе’ҢжңӘжқҘзұ»еһӢжү©еј жҲҗжң¬гҖӮSlimeAI ж—ўз„¶е·Із»Ҹжңү `DataKey<T>` е’Ң `Data.Get/Set<T>`пјҢдё»й“ҫи·Ҝе°ұеә”з»§з»ӯиө°жіӣеһӢгҖӮ

з”ЁжҲ·е·ІзЎ®и®Ө `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot` жҳҜеҪ“еүҚжңҖдјҳж–№жЎҲгҖӮжң¬и®ҫи®Ўд»ҘжӯӨдҪңдёәжңҖз»ҲиЈҒеҶіпјҡ`DataSlot<T>` дҝқеӯҳзңҹе®һдёҡеҠЎеҖјпјҢ`IDataSlot` еҸӘдҪңдёәи·Ёзұ»еһӢ slot з®ЎзҗҶе’Ң diagnostics иҫ№з•ҢпјӣдёҚеҶҚжҠҠ `DataRuntimeValue` unionгҖҒ`object? Value` жҲ–еӨҡеӯ—е…ёжӢҶеҲҶдҪңдёәеҗҢзә§еҖҷйҖүгҖӮ

## еҪ“еҲқдёәд»Җд№Ҳиҝҷд№Ҳи®ҫи®Ў

д»ҺзҺ°жңү DocsAI е’Ң PRJ-0002 и®°еҪ•зңӢпјҢData е…Ҳи§ЈеҶізҡ„жҳҜдәӢе®һжәҗжјӮз§»пјҡ

```text
DataOS descriptor -> runtime_snapshot.json -> DataDefinitionCatalog -> generated DataKey<T> -> Data.Get/Set
```

иҝҷдёҖжӯҘзҡ„йҮҚзӮ№жҳҜеҲ йҷӨж—§ `DataMeta` / `DataRegistry` / жүӢеҶҷ keyпјҢйҒҝе…Қ AI дёҚзҹҘйҒ“еӯ—ж®өе®ҡд№үеңЁе“ӘйҮҢгҖӮ`object?` еңЁеҪ“ж—¶жүҝжӢ…дәҶдёүзұ»дҫҝеҲ©пјҡ

- loader еҸҜд»ҘжҠҠ JSON / SQLite / Godot иҫ“е…Ҙз»ҹдёҖйҖҒиҝӣ `DataValueConverter`гҖӮ
- дёҖдёӘ `DataSlot` еҸҜд»ҘеӯҳжүҖжңүзұ»еһӢпјҢйҒҝе…ҚзҹӯжңҹеҶ…йҮҚеҶҷ modifier / computed / changed eventгҖӮ
- дәәе·Ҙи°ғиҜ•е’Ң TestSystem еҸҜд»Ҙз”Ё `SetUntyped` / `GetAll` еҝ«йҖҹжЈҖжҹҘж•°жҚ®гҖӮ

иҝҷдәӣдҫҝеҲ©её®еҠ© Data е®ҢжҲҗз¬¬дёҖиҪ® descriptor-first hard cutoverпјҢдҪҶе®ғдёҚжҳҜжңҖз»ҲеҪўжҖҒгҖӮеҪ“еүҚ AI-first зӣ®ж Үе·Із»Ҹд»ҺвҖңеӯ—ж®өе®ҡд№үз»ҹдёҖвҖқжҺЁиҝӣеҲ°вҖңиҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҘ‘зәҰд№ҹиҰҒ typedгҖҒзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„д№ҹиҰҒеҸҜйӘҢиҜҒвҖқгҖӮ

## жәҗз ҒиҜҒжҚ®

| ж–Үд»¶ | иҜҒжҚ® | йЈҺйҷ© |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `DataChangeRecord(string StableKey, object? OldValue, object? NewValue)` | жҜҸж¬ЎеҸҳжӣҙдәӢд»¶йғҪдҝқз•ҷ object payload |
| `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `DataSlot.Value object?`гҖҒ`GetEffectiveValue(): object?`гҖҒ`SetValue(object?)` | жүҖжңүеҖјзұ»еһӢеӯ—ж®өеҶҷе…Ҙ/иҜ»еҸ–йғҪдјҡз©ҝиҝҮ object |
| `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `ConvertNumericToDefinitionType` иҝ”еӣһ `(object)(float/int/double)` | modifier и®Ўз®—еҗҺйҮҚж–°иЈ…з®ұ |
| `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `DataValueConverter.ConvertInt/Float/Bool/Vector2` иҝ”еӣһ `object` | еҶҷе…ҘиҪ¬жҚўйҳ¶ж®өдёўеӨұ typed иҝ”еӣһ |
| `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `ConvertForRead(object?, Type, DataValueType)` е’Ң `Activator.CreateInstance` | иҜ»еҸ–йҳ¶ж®өйқ  runtime type еҲӨж–ӯ |
| `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>`гҖҒ`IDataComputeResolver.Compute(): object?` | computed иҫ“еҮәд»ҚжҳҜ object |
| `Data.cs` | `SetUntyped(... object?)`гҖҒ`GetAll(): Dictionary<string, object>` | е®ҪеҸЈ API д»ҚеҸҜиў«дёҡеҠЎиҜҜз”Ё |
| `GameEventType_Data.cs` | `PropertyChanged(string Key, object? OldValue, object? NewValue)` | Data changed event дёҺ Event object й—®йўҳиҖҰеҗҲ |

## и®ҫи®Ўзӣ®ж Ү

1. Data runtime hot path дёҚеҶҚдҪҝз”Ё `object?` еӯҳеӮЁж•°еҖје’Ңеёёи§ҒеҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ
2. `DataKey<T>` еҲ° runtime storage зҡ„жіӣеһӢдҝЎжҒҜдёҚеңЁ `TrySetUntyped` еӨ„дёўеӨұгҖӮ
3. loader / debug / TestSystem зҡ„ untyped иҫ“е…ҘеҸӘиғҪеҒңз•ҷеңЁиҫ№з•ҢпјҢе№¶жҳҺзЎ®жіЁйҮҠвҖңдёҚжҺЁиҚҗдёҡеҠЎдҪҝз”ЁпјҢжңүиЈ…з®ұ/GC йЈҺйҷ©вҖқгҖӮ
4. computed resolverгҖҒmodifier pipeline е’Ң changed event еҗҢжӯҘ typed еҢ–гҖӮ
5. жү§иЎҢеҗҺеҝ…йЎ»иғҪз”Ё grep gate иҜҒжҳҺ AI жЎҶжһ¶дё»й“ҫи·ҜдёҚи°ғз”Ё object APIгҖӮ

## жңҖз»Ҳжһ¶жһ„

### 1. з”Ё `DataSlot<T>` жӣҝд»Ј `DataSlot.Value object?`

жңҖз»ҲиЈҒеҶідёҚжҳҜж–°еўһйҖҡз”Ё value unionпјҢиҖҢжҳҜи®©жҜҸдёӘ slot иҮӘе·ұжҢҒжңүзңҹе®һзұ»еһӢпјҡ

зӣ®ж ҮеҪўзҠ¶пјҡ

```csharp
internal interface IDataSlot
{
    DataDefinition Definition { get; }
    Type ValueClrType { get; }
    bool HasValue { get; }
    DataDiagnosticValue ToDiagnosticValue();
}

internal class DataSlot<T> : IDataSlot
{
    private readonly DataValuePolicy<T> _policy;
    private T _value;
    private bool _hasValue;

    public virtual T GetEffectiveValue();
    public virtual bool SetValue(T value);
    public bool TrySetFromBoundary(object? rawValue, DataWriteSource source, out DataWriteReport report);
}
```

иЈҒеҶіиҫ№з•Ңпјҡ

- `DataRuntimeStorage` еҸҜд»Ҙз»§з»ӯз”Ё `Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>` з®ЎдёҚеҗҢзұ»еһӢзҡ„ slotпјӣиҝҷжҳҜзұ»еһӢж“ҰйҷӨзҡ„з®ЎзҗҶиҫ№з•ҢпјҢдёҚеӯҳдёҡеҠЎеҖјгҖӮ
- зғӯи·Ҝеҫ„ `Data.Set<T>(DataKey<T>, T)` еҸ–еҲ° `DataSlot<T>` еҗҺзӣҙжҺҘеҶҷ `T`пјҢдёҚз»ҸиҝҮ `object?`гҖӮ
- зғӯи·Ҝеҫ„ `Data.Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` еҸ–еҲ° `DataSlot<T>` еҗҺзӣҙжҺҘиҜ» `T`пјҢдёҚз»ҸиҝҮ `ConvertForRead(object?)`гҖӮ
- `IDataSlot` еҸӘжҡҙйңІ metadataгҖҒdiagnostic snapshot е’Ңиҫ№з•Ңж–№жі•пјҢдёҚиғҪжҸҗдҫӣ `object? Value`гҖӮ
- е®һзҺ° SDD дёҚеҶҚжҜ”иҫғ `DataRuntimeValue`гҖҒеӨҡеӯ—е…ёеӯҳеӮЁе’Ң `DataSlot<T>` дҪңдёәе№ізә§ж–№жЎҲпјӣеҸӘиғҪеңЁ `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot` еҶ…йғЁз»ҶеҢ– policyгҖҒresolverгҖҒchange event е’Ң diagnosticsгҖӮ

### 2. Catalog е»ә typed runtime definition

`DataDefinition.DefaultValue object?` еҸҜд»ҘдҪңдёә snapshot/DTO еұӮзҡ„еҺҶеҸІиҫ“е…ҘпјҢдҪҶиҝӣе…Ҙ runtime catalog еҗҺеҝ…йЎ»жҠ•еҪұдёә typed definitionпјҡ

```csharp
internal interface IDataFieldDefinition
{
    string StableKey { get; }
    Type ValueClrType { get; }
    DataValueType ValueType { get; }
    IDataSlot CreateSlot();
}

internal sealed class DataFieldDefinition<T> : IDataFieldDefinition
{
    public DataKey<T> Key { get; }
    public T DefaultValue { get; }
    public DataValuePolicy<T> Policy { get; }

    public IDataSlot CreateSlot() => new DataSlot<T>(this);
}
```

`DataDefinitionCatalog.GetField<T>(DataKey<T>)` еҝ…йЎ»ж ЎйӘҢ generated handle зҡ„ `T` дёҺ descriptor `valueType/runtimeTypeId` дёҖиҮҙгҖӮдёҚдёҖиҮҙж—¶ fail fastпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜиҜ»еҶҷйҳ¶ж®өеҶҚ `Convert.ChangeType`гҖӮ

### 3. Converter еҲҶеұӮпјҡжіӣеһӢзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„ + иҫ№з•Ң untyped

дёҠдёҖзүҲи®ҫи®ЎжҸҗеҮә `TryConvert<T>(..., out DataRuntimeValue)`пјҢй—®йўҳеңЁдәҺжңҖз»ҲеҸҲеӣһеҲ°з»ҹдёҖ value е®№еҷЁгҖӮж–°ж–№жЎҲеә”зӣҙжҺҘиҪ¬жҚўеҲ° `T`пјҡ

```csharp
public sealed class DataValuePolicy<T>
{
    public bool TryConvertTyped(T value, DataWriteSource source, out T finalValue, out DataWriteReport report);
    public bool TryConvertBoundary(object? rawValue, DataWriteSource source, out T finalValue, out DataWriteReport report);
    public bool AreEqual(T left, T right);
}
```

| еұӮ | API | з”ЁйҖ” |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Typed hot path | `Data.Set<T>(DataKey<T>, T)` -> `DataSlot<T>.SetValue(T)` | дёҡеҠЎиҜ»еҶҷдё»й“ҫи·Ҝ |
| Runtime read | `Data.Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` -> `DataSlot<T>.GetEffectiveValue()` | дёҡеҠЎиҜ»еҸ–дё»й“ҫи·Ҝ |
| Boundary untyped | `TrySetFromBoundary(object? raw, ...)` | snapshot loaderгҖҒdebug toolгҖҒTestSystem |
| Diagnostics | `ToDiagnosticValue()` | UI/Test dumpпјҢе…Ғи®ёж јејҸеҢ–жҲ–еӨҚеҲ¶ |

иҫ№з•Ңе…ҘеҸЈеҝ…йЎ»еҶҷжё…жҘҡпјҡ

```csharp
// д»…з”ЁдәҺ loader/debug/TestSystem иҫ№з•ҢгҖӮдёҡеҠЎд»Јз ҒдёҚиҰҒи°ғз”ЁиҜҘе…ҘеҸЈпјӣ
// еҖјзұ»еһӢдј е…Ҙ object дјҡдә§з”ҹиЈ…з®ұпјҢдё”дјҡз»•иҝҮ DataKey<T> зј–иҜ‘жңҹеҘ‘зәҰгҖӮ
```

### 4. Modifier pipeline зұ»еһӢеҢ–

`DataModifier.Value` еҪ“еүҚжҳҜ `float`пјҢж•°еҖјдҝ®йҘ°з®ЎзәҝеҸӘеә”еӯҳеңЁдәҺж•°еҖј slotгҖӮдёҚиҰҒи®©жүҖжңүеӯ—ж®өйғҪиө° `object? -> double -> object?`гҖӮ

жҺЁиҚҗеҒҡжі•пјҡ

```csharp
internal interface INumericDataSlot
{
    bool AddModifier(DataModifier modifier);
    bool RemoveModifier(string modifierId);
}

internal sealed class NumericDataSlot<T> : DataSlot<T>, INumericDataSlot
{
    private readonly NumericDataValuePolicy<T> _numericPolicy;
    private readonly List<DataModifier> _modifiers = new();

    public override T GetEffectiveValue()
    {
        var baseValue = GetBaseValue();
        return _numericPolicy.ApplyModifiers(baseValue, _modifiers, Definition);
    }
}
```

е®һзҺ°ж—¶еҸҜд»Ҙз”Ё `FloatDataValuePolicy`гҖҒ`IntDataValuePolicy`гҖҒ`DoubleDataValuePolicy` дёүдёӘжҳҫејҸзӯ–з•ҘпјҢе…ҲдёҚејәдҫқиө– C# generic mathгҖӮйҮҚзӮ№жҳҜ slot еӯҳзҡ„жҳҜ `T`пјҢmodifier и®Ўз®—иҝ”еӣһзҡ„д№ҹжҳҜ `T`гҖӮ

### 5. Computed resolver зұ»еһӢеҢ–

еҪ“еүҚ `IDataComputeResolver.Compute()` иҝ”еӣһ `object?`гҖӮзӣ®ж Үж”№дёәжіӣеһӢ resolverпјҡ

```csharp
public interface IDataComputeResolver<T>
{
    string ComputeId { get; }
    T Compute(Data data, DataFieldDefinition<T> definition);
}

public abstract class FloatComputeResolver : IDataComputeResolver<float>
{
    public abstract string ComputeId { get; }
    public abstract float Compute(Data data, DataFieldDefinition<float> definition);
}
```

`DataComputeRegistry` еҸҜд»Ҙз”ЁйқһжіӣеһӢ metadata з®ЎжіЁеҶҢиЎЁпјҢдҪҶжү§иЎҢж—¶еҝ…йЎ»жҢү field зҡ„ `T` иҺ·еҸ– `IDataComputeResolver<T>`гҖӮзұ»еһӢдёҚеҢ№й…ҚжҳҜ catalog build errorпјҢдёҚжҳҜиҝҗиЎҢж—¶иҪ¬жҚўгҖӮ

computed cache дёҚеҶҚжҳҜ `Dictionary<string, object?>`гҖӮcomputed еӯ—ж®өжң¬иә«е°ұжҳҜ `ComputedDataSlot<T>`пјҢslot еҶ…зј“еӯҳ `T _cachedValue` е’Ң dirty flagгҖӮ

### 6. Data changed event жіӣеһӢеҢ–

`PropertyChanged(string, object?, object?)` дёҚеә”з»§з»ӯжҳҜиҝҗиЎҢж—¶йҖҡз”ЁдәӢд»¶гҖӮжҺЁиҚҗз”ұ typed slot иҙҹиҙЈеҸ‘ typed changeпјҡ

```csharp
public readonly record struct DataChanged<T>(DataKey<T> Key, T OldValue, T NewValue);

internal interface IDataChangeDispatcher
{
    void Emit<T>(DataKey<T> key, T oldValue, T newValue);
}
```

еҜ№еӨ–еҲҶеұӮпјҡ

- й«ҳйў‘дёҡеҠЎзӣ‘еҗ¬пјҡCapability иҮӘе·ұе®ҡд№үйўҶеҹҹдәӢд»¶пјҢдҫӢеҰӮ `HealthChanged(float oldHp, float newHp)`пјҢжҲ–и®ўйҳ… `DataChanged<float>`гҖӮ
- Runtime еҶ…йғЁпјҡslot и°ғ `IDataChangeDispatcher.Emit<T>`пјҢдёҚжҠҠ old/new е…ҲиЈ…жҲҗ objectгҖӮ
- Debug/TestSystemпјҡеҚ•зӢ¬з”ҹжҲҗ `DataDiagnosticChange`пјҢеҸҜеҢ…еҗ«еӯ—з¬ҰдёІгҖҒstable keyгҖҒзұ»еһӢеҗҚе’Ңж јејҸеҢ–еҖјгҖӮ

### 7. `DataRuntimeValue` иЈҒеҶі

дёҚжҺЁиҚҗеј•е…ҘдёҠдёҖзүҲ `DataRuntimeValue` еӨҡеӯ—ж®ө unionпјҢеҺҹеӣ пјҡ

- е®ғеӨҚеҲ¶дәҶ descriptor е·Із»ҸзҹҘйҒ“зҡ„зұ»еһӢеҲҶеҸ‘дҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ
- е®ғи®©жҜҸдёӘеҖјйғҪжҗәеёҰжүҖжңүеҖҷйҖүзұ»еһӢеӯ—ж®өпјҢз»“жһ„еҶ—дҪҷжҳҺжҳҫгҖӮ
- ж–°еўһ `EntityId`гҖҒ`ResourceRef`гҖҒ`EntityIdList`гҖҒиҮӘе®ҡд№ү runtime ref ж—¶дјҡз»§з»ӯиҶЁиғҖгҖӮ
- е®ғдёҚиғҪеғҸ `DataSlot<T>` дёҖж ·и®©зј–иҜ‘еҷЁзӣҙжҺҘжЈҖжҹҘ `DataKey<T>` дёҺ storage зҡ„дёҖиҮҙжҖ§гҖӮ
- е®ғд»Қйј“еҠұеҶҷвҖңйҖҡз”Ё runtime value еӨ„зҗҶеҷЁвҖқпјҢAI е®№жҳ“з»§з»ӯз»•иҝҮ `Data.Get/Set<T>`гҖӮ

еҸӘжңүдёҖз§ҚдҫӢеӨ–пјҡеҰӮжһңжңӘжқҘ profiler иҜҒжҳҺ `Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>` зҡ„иҷҡи°ғз”Ё/зұ»еһӢжЈҖжҹҘжҲҗдёәз“¶йўҲпјҢеҸҜд»ҘеңЁйқһеёёзғӯзҡ„еӣәе®ҡеӯ—ж®өйӣҶеҗҲдёҠеҒҡ source-generated typed storageгҖӮдҪҶйӮЈеә”жҳҜ benchmark й©ұеҠЁзҡ„ P2 дјҳеҢ–пјҢдёҚжҳҜжң¬иҪ® object еҺ»йҷӨзҡ„й»ҳи®Өжһ¶жһ„гҖӮ

## API иЈҒеҶі

| API | иЈҒеҶі |
| --- | --- |
| `Data.Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` | дҝқз•ҷпјҢдё»е…ҘеҸЈ |
| `Data.Set<T>(DataKey<T>, T)` | дҝқз•ҷпјҢдё»е…ҘеҸЈ |
| `Data.Get<T>(string)` | йҷҚдёә internal жҲ–еҲ йҷӨпјӣAI жЎҶжһ¶дёҚеә”дёҡеҠЎи°ғз”Ё |
| `Data.Set<T>(string, T)` | йҷҚдёә internal жҲ–еҲ йҷӨ |
| `Data.SetUntyped(... object?)` | д»… loader/debug internalпјӣжіЁйҮҠжҳҺзЎ®иЈ…з®ұ/GC йЈҺйҷ© |
| `Data.GetAll(): Dictionary<string, object>` | ж”№дёә diagnostic snapshot APIпјҢдёҚдҪңдёәдёҡеҠЎе·Ҙе…· |
| `DataModifier.Source object?` | ж”№дёә typed source idпјҢдјҳе…Ҳ `EntityId?` / `FeatureInstanceId` / `string sourceId` |

## иҝҒз§»жӯҘйӘӨ

1. е»ә `DataFieldDefinition<T>`гҖҒ`DataSlot<T>`гҖҒ`DataValuePolicy<T>`пјҢе…ҲиҰҶзӣ– `int/float/double/bool/string/string[]/ResourceRef/EntityId?`гҖӮ
2. и®© catalog build йҳ¶ж®өжҠҠ descriptor жҠ•еҪұдёә typed runtime fieldпјҢgenerated `DataKey<T>` дёҺ field `T` дёҚдёҖиҮҙж—¶жҠҘй”ҷгҖӮ
3. ж”№ `Data.Get/Set<T>(DataKey<T>)` зӣҙжҺҘиө° `DataSlot<T>`пјҢдёҚеҶҚиҝӣе…Ҙ `SetUntyped(... object?)`гҖӮ
4. ж”№ modifier дёәж•°еҖј slot/policyпјҢз§»йҷӨ `object? -> double -> object?` и·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ
5. ж”№ computed resolver дёә `IDataComputeResolver<T>`пјҢcomputed cache иҝӣе…Ҙ `ComputedDataSlot<T>`гҖӮ
6. ж”№ `DataChangeRecord` е’Ң `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged` дёә typed change жҲ– domain event + diagnostic snapshotгҖӮ
7. ж”№ snapshot loader е’Ң debug/test untyped API еҲ°иҫ№з•Ң converterпјҢдҝқз•ҷжіЁйҮҠе’Ң grep gateгҖӮ
8. иҝҒз§»дёҡеҠЎи°ғз”ЁзӮ№пјҢжё…зҗҶ `Get<T>(string)`гҖҒ`SetUntyped(string, object?)`гҖҒ`GetAll()` йқһжөӢиҜ•и°ғз”ЁгҖӮ
9. жӣҙж–° DocsAI Runtime/Data е’Ң `ecs-data` skillгҖӮ

## йӘҢиҜҒй—ЁзҰҒ

```bash
dotnet build Brotato_my.csproj --no-restore /clp:ErrorsOnly
bash Data/DataOS/Tools/validate-dataos.sh Data/DataOS/Authoring/slimeainew.authoring.db
rg -n "SetUntyped\\(|GetAll\\(|Dictionary<string, object>|object\\? OldValue|object\\? NewValue" Src/ECS/Runtime/Data Src/ECS/Capabilities Data/DataKey
```

йңҖиҰҒж–°еўһпјҡ

- Data generic slot unit / scene testпјҡ`float/int/bool/string/string_array/resource_ref/entity_id`гҖӮ
- Catalog type mismatch testпјҡdescriptor / generated handle / runtime field дёҚдёҖиҮҙж—¶ fail fastгҖӮ
- Modifier testпјҡAdditive/Multiplicative/FinalAdditive/Override/Cap иҝ”еӣһ typed `T`пјҢдёҚз»Ҹ `object?`гҖӮ
- Computed resolver testпјҡ`IDataComputeResolver<T>` иҝ”еӣһ typed `T`пјҢcache dirty жӯЈзЎ®гҖӮ
- PropertyChanged testпјҡдёҡеҠЎ typed event е’Ң debug snapshot еҲҶзҰ»гҖӮ
- еҲҶй…ҚеҹәзәҝпјҡиҮіе°‘з”Ё benchmark жҲ– Godot scene artifact и®°еҪ•ж”№еүҚ/ж”№еҗҺ `Get/Set/Modifier/Computed` еҲҶй…ҚгҖӮ


````

# DataSlotз»“жһ„еҢ–иЈ…з®ұй—®йўҳ

> дёҘйҮҚеәҰпјҡрҹ”ҙ CRITICAL
> еҪұе“ҚиҢғеӣҙпјҡжүҖжңүе®һдҪ“зҡ„жҜҸж¬Ўж•°жҚ®иҜ»еҶҷ
> йў„дј°еҪұе“ҚпјҡжҜҸеё§2000+ж¬ЎиЈ…з®ұ+2000+ж¬ЎжӢҶз®ұ = 32KB/её§ = 1.92MB/з§’

## й—®йўҳжҸҸиҝ°

DataSlotжҳҜDataзі»з»ҹзҡ„еә•еұӮеӯҳеӮЁеҚ•е…ғгҖӮе®ғз”Ё `object?` еӯҳеӮЁжүҖжңүеҖјпјҢеҜјиҮҙжҜҸж¬ЎиҜ»еҶҷеҖјзұ»еһӢпјҲfloat, int, bool, Vector2зӯүпјүйғҪиҰҒиЈ…з®ұе’ҢжӢҶз®ұгҖӮ

## ж¶үеҸҠд»Јз ҒпјҲ10еӨ„пјү

### 1. DataSlot.Value еӯҳеӮЁдёә object?

**ж–Үд»¶пјҡ** `ECS/Runtime/Data/DataRuntimeStorage.cs` з¬¬124иЎҢ
```csharp
public object? Value { get; private set; }
```
**й—®йўҳпјҡ** жүҖжңүfloatгҖҒintгҖҒboolгҖҒVector2еҖјеҶҷе…ҘDataSlotж—¶йғҪиў«иЈ…з®ұдёәobjectеј•з”ЁгҖӮ

### 2. DataSlot.SetValue жҺҘеҸ— object?

**ж–Үд»¶пјҡ** `ECS/Runtime/Data/DataRuntimeStorage.cs` з¬¬139иЎҢ
```csharp
public bool SetValue(object? value)
```
**й—®йўҳпјҡ** зұ»еһӢеҢ–зҡ„Set<T>ж–№жі•е°ҶTеҖјиЈ…з®ұдёәobject?еҗҺдј е…ҘгҖӮ

### 3. DataSlot.GetEffectiveValue иҝ”еӣһ object?

**ж–Үд»¶пјҡ** `ECS/Runtime/Data/DataRuntimeStorage.cs` з¬¬129иЎҢ
```csharp
public object? GetEffectiveValue()
```
**й—®йўҳпјҡ** иҝ”еӣһе·ІиЈ…з®ұзҡ„еҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ

### 4. DataSlot.ConvertNumericToDefinitionType жҳҫејҸиЈ…з®ұ

**ж–Үд»¶пјҡ** `ECS/Runtime/Data/DataRuntimeStorage.cs` з¬¬285-294иЎҢ
```csharp
private object ConvertNumericToDefinitionType(double value)
{
    return Definition.ValueType switch
    {
        DataValueType.Int => (object)(int)value,
        DataValueType.Float => (object)(float)value,
        DataValueType.Double => (object)value,
        _ => (object)value
    };
}
```
**й—®йўҳпјҡ** жҜҸж¬Ўдҝ®ж”№еҷЁеә”з”ЁйғҪи§ҰеҸ‘жҳҫејҸиЈ…з®ұгҖӮ

### 5. DataSlot.ApplyModifiers жӢҶз®ұвҶ’и®Ўз®—вҶ’йҮҚж–°иЈ…з®ұ

**ж–Үд»¶пјҡ** `ECS/Runtime/Data/DataRuntimeStorage.cs` з¬¬231иЎҢ
```csharp
private object? ApplyModifiers(object? baseValue)
```
**й—®йўҳпјҡ** жӢҶз®ұж•°еҖјвҶ’жү§иЎҢи®Ўз®—вҶ’е°Ҷз»“жһңйҮҚж–°иЈ…з®ұгҖӮ

### 6. DataSlot.TryGetNumeric жӢҶз®ұ

}

## и°ғз”Ёйў‘зҺҮдј°з®—

| и°ғз”Ёи·Ҝеҫ„ | жҜҸе®һдҪ“жҜҸеё§ | иЈ…з®ұж¬Ўж•° |

| PropertyChangedдәӢд»¶ | жҜҸж¬ЎеҸҳжӣҙ | 2ж¬ЎиЈ…з®ұ(old+new) |
| дҝ®ж”№еҷЁеә”з”Ё | жҜҸж¬Ўжңүдҝ®ж”№еҷЁ | жӢҶз®ұ+иЈ…з®ұ |

**жҜҸе®һдҪ“жҜҸеё§пјҡ** ~10-15ж¬ЎиЈ…з®ұ+жӢҶз®ұ
**100дёӘе®һдҪ“пјҡ** ~1000-1500ж¬ЎиЈ…з®ұ+жӢҶз®ұ/её§
**200дёӘе®һдҪ“пјҲжҲҳж–—еңәжҷҜпјүпјҡ** ~2000-3000ж¬ЎиЈ…з®ұ+жӢҶз®ұ/её§

## и§ЈеҶіж–№жЎҲ

### ж–№жЎҲAпјҡзұ»еһӢеҲҶеҢәеӯҳеӮЁпјҲжҺЁиҚҗпјү

```csharp
// еҪ“еүҚпјҲжҜҸеё§2000+ж¬ЎиЈ…з®ұжӢҶз®ұпјү
private object? _value;

// дјҳеҢ–еҗҺпјҲйӣ¶иЈ…з®ұзғӯи·Ҝеҫ„пјү
internal sealed class DataRuntimeStorage
{
    private readonly Dictionary<string, float> _floatSlots = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);
    private readonly Dictionary<string, int> _intSlots = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);
    private readonly Dictionary<string, bool> _boolSlots = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);
    private readonly Dictionary<string, object?> _complexSlots = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);

    public T Get<T>(string stableKey)
    {
        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
        return definition.ValueType switch
        {
            DataValueType.Float => (T)(object)_floatSlots.GetValueOrDefault(stableKey),
            DataValueType.Int => (T)(object)_intSlots.GetValueOrDefault(stableKey),
            DataValueType.Bool => (T)(object)_boolSlots.GetValueOrDefault(stableKey),
            _ => (T)_complexSlots.GetValueOrDefault(stableKey)!
        };
    }
}
```

**жіЁж„Ҹпјҡ** ж–№жЎҲAзҡ„Get<T>д»Қжңү(T)(object)иҪ¬жҚўгҖӮиҰҒе®Ңе…Ёйӣ¶иЈ…з®ұйңҖиҰҒж–№жЎҲBгҖӮ

### ж–№жЎҲBпјҡжіӣеһӢDataSlot<T>пјҲе®Ңе…Ёйӣ¶иЈ…з®ұпјү

```csharp
internal sealed class DataSlot<T> where T : struct
{
    private T _value;
    private readonly List<IModifier<T>> _modifiers = new();

    public T Value => _value;
    public void SetValue(T value) { _value = value; }
    public T GetEffectiveValue() { return ApplyModifiers(_value); }
}
```

**д»Јд»·пјҡ** йңҖиҰҒж”№DataKey<T>зҡ„жіӣеһӢдј йҖ’й“ҫи·ҜпјҢж”№еҠЁиҢғеӣҙеӨ§гҖӮ

### ж–№жЎҲCпјҡж··еҗҲж–№жЎҲпјҲжҺЁиҚҗе№іиЎЎзӮ№пјү

```csharp
// з”Ёunion typeжӣҝд»Јobject?
[StructLayout(LayoutKind.Explicit)]
internal struct DataValueUnion
{
    [FieldOffset(0)] public float FloatValue;
    [FieldOffset(0)] public int IntValue;
    [FieldOffset(0)] public bool BoolValue;
    [FieldOffset(4)] public DataValueType ActiveType;
}
```

**дјҳзӮ№пјҡ** йӣ¶иЈ…з®ұгҖҒйӣ¶е ҶеҲҶй…ҚгҖӮ**зјәзӮ№пјҡ** еҸӘйҖӮз”ЁдәҺеҹәжң¬зұ»еһӢгҖӮ

---
name: test-driven-development
description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code
---

# Test-Driven Development (TDD)

## Overview

Write the test first. Watch it fail. Write minimal code to pass.

**Core principle:** If you didn't watch the test fail, you don't know if it tests the right thing.

**Violating the letter of the rules is violating the spirit of the rules.**

## When to Use

**Always:**
- New features
- Bug fixes
- Refactoring
- Behavior changes

**Exceptions (ask your human partner):**
- Throwaway prototypes
- Generated code
- Configuration files

Thinking "skip TDD just this once"? Stop. That's rationalization.

## The Iron Law

```
NO PRODUCTION CODE WITHOUT A FAILING TEST FIRST
```

Write code before the test? Delete it. Start over.

**No exceptions:**
- Don't keep it as "reference"
- Don't "adapt" it while writing tests
- Don't look at it
- Delete means delete

Implement fresh from tests. Period.

## Red-Green-Refactor

```dot
digraph tdd_cycle {
    rankdir=LR;
    red [label="RED\nWrite failing test", shape=box, style=filled, fillcolor="#ffcccc"];
    verify_red [label="Verify fails\ncorrectly", shape=diamond];
    green [label="GREEN\nMinimal code", shape=box, style=filled, fillcolor="#ccffcc"];
    verify_green [label="Verify passes\nAll green", shape=diamond];
    refactor [label="REFACTOR\nClean up", shape=box, style=filled, fillcolor="#ccccff"];
    next [label="Next", shape=ellipse];

    red -> verify_red;
    verify_red -> green [label="yes"];
    verify_red -> red [label="wrong\nfailure"];
    green -> verify_green;
    verify_green -> refactor [label="yes"];
    verify_green -> green [label="no"];
    refactor -> verify_green [label="stay\ngreen"];
    verify_green -> next;
    next -> red;
}
```

### RED - Write Failing Test

Write one minimal test showing what should happen.

<Good>
```typescript
test('retries failed operations 3 times', async () => {
  let attempts = 0;
  const operation = () => {
    attempts++;
    if (attempts < 3) throw new Error('fail');
    return 'success';
  };

  const result = await retryOperation(operation);

  expect(result).toBe('success');
  expect(attempts).toBe(3);
});
```
Clear name, tests real behavior, one thing
</Good>

<Bad>
```typescript
test('retry works', async () => {
  const mock = jest.fn()
    .mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error())
    .mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error())
    .mockResolvedValueOnce('success');
  await retryOperation(mock);
  expect(mock).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(3);
});
```
Vague name, tests mock not code
</Bad>

**Requirements:**
- One behavior
- Clear name
- Real code (no mocks unless unavoidable)

### Verify RED - Watch It Fail

**MANDATORY. Never skip.**

```bash
npm test path/to/test.test.ts
```

Confirm:
- Test fails (not errors)
- Failure message is expected
- Fails because feature missing (not typos)

**Test passes?** You're testing existing behavior. Fix test.

**Test errors?** Fix error, re-run until it fails correctly.

### GREEN - Minimal Code

Write simplest code to pass the test.

<Good>
```typescript
async function retryOperation<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T> {
  for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
    try {
      return await fn();
    } catch (e) {
      if (i === 2) throw e;
    }
  }
  throw new Error('unreachable');
}
```
Just enough to pass
</Good>

<Bad>
```typescript
async function retryOperation<T>(
  fn: () => Promise<T>,
  options?: {
    maxRetries?: number;
    backoff?: 'linear' | 'exponential';
    onRetry?: (attempt: number) => void;
  }
): Promise<T> {
  // YAGNI
}
```
Over-engineered
</Bad>

Don't add features, refactor other code, or "improve" beyond the test.

### Verify GREEN - Watch It Pass

**MANDATORY.**

```bash
npm test path/to/test.test.ts
```

Confirm:
- Test passes
- Other tests still pass
- Output pristine (no errors, warnings)

**Test fails?** Fix code, not test.

**Other tests fail?** Fix now.

### REFACTOR - Clean Up

After green only:
- Remove duplication
- Improve names
- Extract helpers

Keep tests green. Don't add behavior.

### Repeat

Next failing test for next feature.

## Good Tests

| Quality | Good | Bad |
|---------|------|-----|
| **Minimal** | One thing. "and" in name? Split it. | `test('validates email and domain and whitespace')` |
| **Clear** | Name describes behavior | `test('test1')` |
| **Shows intent** | Demonstrates desired API | Obscures what code should do |

## Why Order Matters

**"I'll write tests after to verify it works"**

Tests written after code pass immediately. Passing immediately proves nothing:
- Might test wrong thing
- Might test implementation, not behavior
- Might miss edge cases you forgot
- You never saw it catch the bug

Test-first forces you to see the test fail, proving it actually tests something.

**"I already manually tested all the edge cases"**

Manual testing is ad-hoc. You think you tested everything but:

````

---
name: brainstorming
description: "You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation."
---

# Brainstorming Ideas Into Designs

Help turn ideas into fully formed designs and specs through natural collaborative dialogue.

Start by understanding the current project context, then ask questions one at a time to refine the idea. Once you understand what you're building, present the design and get user approval.

<HARD-GATE>
Do NOT invoke any implementation skill, write any code, scaffold any project, or take any implementation action until you have presented a design and the user has approved it. This applies to EVERY project regardless of perceived simplicity.
</HARD-GATE>

## Anti-Pattern: "This Is Too Simple To Need A Design"

Every project goes through this process. A todo list, a single-function utility, a config change вҖ” all of them. "Simple" projects are where unexamined assumptions cause the most wasted work. The design can be short (a few sentences for truly simple projects), but you MUST present it and get approval.

## Checklist

You MUST create a task for each of these items and complete them in order:

1. **Explore project context** вҖ” check files, docs, recent commits
2. **Offer visual companion** (if topic will involve visual questions) вҖ” this is its own message, not combined with a clarifying question. See the Visual Companion section below.
3. **Ask clarifying questions** вҖ” one at a time, understand purpose/constraints/success criteria
4. **Propose 2-3 approaches** вҖ” with trade-offs and your recommendation
5. **Present design** вҖ” in sections scaled to their complexity, get user approval after each section
6. **Write design doc** вҖ” save to `docs/superpowers/specs/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>-design.md` and commit
7. **Spec self-review** вҖ” quick inline check for placeholders, contradictions, ambiguity, scope (see below)
8. **User reviews written spec** вҖ” ask user to review the spec file before proceeding
9. **Transition to implementation** вҖ” invoke writing-plans skill to create implementation plan

## Process Flow

```dot
digraph brainstorming {
    "Explore project context" [shape=box];
    "Visual questions ahead?" [shape=diamond];
    "Offer Visual Companion\n(own message, no other content)" [shape=box];
    "Ask clarifying questions" [shape=box];
    "Propose 2-3 approaches" [shape=box];
    "Present design sections" [shape=box];
    "User approves design?" [shape=diamond];
    "Write design doc" [shape=box];
    "Spec self-review\n(fix inline)" [shape=box];
    "User reviews spec?" [shape=diamond];
    "Invoke writing-plans skill" [shape=doublecircle];

    "Explore project context" -> "Visual questions ahead?";
    "Visual questions ahead?" -> "Offer Visual Companion\n(own message, no other content)" [label="yes"];
    "Visual questions ahead?" -> "Ask clarifying questions" [label="no"];
    "Offer Visual Companion\n(own message, no other content)" -> "Ask clarifying questions";
    "Ask clarifying questions" -> "Propose 2-3 approaches";
    "Propose 2-3 approaches" -> "Present design sections";
    "Present design sections" -> "User approves design?";
    "User approves design?" -> "Present design sections" [label="no, revise"];
    "User approves design?" -> "Write design doc" [label="yes"];
    "Write design doc" -> "Spec self-review\n(fix inline)";
    "Spec self-review\n(fix inline)" -> "User reviews spec?";
    "User reviews spec?" -> "Write design doc" [label="changes requested"];
    "User reviews spec?" -> "Invoke writing-plans skill" [label="approved"];
}
```

**The terminal state is invoking writing-plans.** Do NOT invoke frontend-design, mcp-builder, or any other implementation skill. The ONLY skill you invoke after brainstorming is writing-plans.

## The Process

**Understanding the idea:**

- Check out the current project state first (files, docs, recent commits)
- Before asking detailed questions, assess scope: if the request describes multiple independent subsystems (e.g., "build a platform with chat, file storage, billing, and analytics"), flag this immediately. Don't spend questions refining details of a project that needs to be decomposed first.
- If the project is too large for a single spec, help the user decompose into sub-projects: what are the independent pieces, how do they relate, what order should they be built? Then brainstorm the first sub-project through the normal design flow. Each sub-project gets its own spec вҶ’ plan вҶ’ implementation cycle.
- For appropriately-scoped projects, ask questions one at a time to refine the idea
- Prefer multiple choice questions when possible, but open-ended is fine too
- Only one question per message - if a topic needs more exploration, break it into multiple questions
- Focus on understanding: purpose, constraints, success criteria

**Exploring approaches:**

- Propose 2-3 different approaches with trade-offs
- Present options conversationally with your recommendation and reasoning
- Lead with your recommended option and explain why

**Presenting the design:**

- Once you believe you understand what you're building, present the design
- Scale each section to its complexity: a few sentences if straightforward, up to 200-300 words if nuanced
- Ask after each section whether it looks right so far
- Cover: architecture, components, data flow, error handling, testing
- Be ready to go back and clarify if something doesn't make sense

**Design for isolation and clarity:**

- Break the system into smaller units that each have one clear purpose, communicate through well-defined interfaces, and can be understood and tested independently
- For each unit, you should be able to answer: what does it do, how do you use it, and what does it depend on?
- Can someone understand what a unit does without reading its internals? Can you change the internals without breaking consumers? If not, the boundaries need work.
- Smaller, well-bounded units are also easier for you to work with - you reason better about code you can hold in context at once, and your edits are more reliable when files are focused. When a file grows large, that's often a signal that it's doing too much.

**Working in existing codebases:**

- Explore the current structure before proposing changes. Follow existing patterns.
- Where existing code has problems that affect the work (e.g., a file that's grown too large, unclear boundaries, tangled responsibilities), include targeted improvements as part of the design - the way a good developer improves code they're working in.
- Don't propose unrelated refactoring. Stay focused on what serves the current goal.

## After the Design

**Documentation:**

- Write the validated design (spec) to `docs/superpowers/specs/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>-design.md`
  - (User preferences for spec location override this default)
- Use elements-of-style:writing-clearly-and-concisely skill if available
- Commit the design document to git

**Spec Self-Review:**
After writing the spec document, look at it with fresh eyes:

1. **Placeholder scan:** Any "TBD", "TODO", incomplete sections, or vague requirements? Fix them.
2. **Internal consistency:** Do any sections contradict each other? Does the architecture match the feature descriptions?
3. **Scope check:** Is this focused enough for a single implementation plan, or does it need decomposition?
4. **Ambiguity check:** Could any requirement be interpreted two different ways? If so, pick one and make it explicit.

Fix any issues inline. No need to re-review вҖ” just fix and move on.

**User Review Gate:**
After the spec review loop passes, ask the user to review the written spec before proceeding:

> "Spec written and committed to `<path>`. Please review it and let me know if you want to make any changes before we start writing out the implementation plan."

Wait for the user's response. If they request changes, make them and re-run the spec review loop. Only proceed once the user approves.

**Implementation:**

- Invoke the writing-plans skill to create a detailed implementation plan
- Do NOT invoke any other skill. writing-plans is the next step.

## Key Principles

- **One question at a time** - Don't overwhelm with multiple questions
- **Multiple choice preferred** - Easier to answer than open-ended when possible
- **YAGNI ruthlessly** - Remove unnecessary features from all designs
- **Explore alternatives** - Always propose 2-3 approaches before settling
- **Incremental validation** - Present design, get approval before moving on
- **Be flexible** - Go back and clarify when something doesn't make sense

## Visual Companion

A browser-based companion for showing mockups, diagrams, and visual options during brainstorming. Available as a tool вҖ” not a mode. Accepting the companion means it's available for questions that benefit from visual treatment; it does NOT mean every question goes through the browser.

**Offering the companion:** When you anticipate that upcoming questions will involve visual content (mockups, layouts, diagrams), offer it once for consent:
> "Some of what we're working on might be easier to explain if I can show it to you in a web browser. I can put together mockups, diagrams, comparisons, and other visuals as we go. This feature is still new and can be token-intensive. Want to try it? (Requires opening a local URL)"

**This offer MUST be its own message.** Do not combine it with clarifying questions, context summaries, or any other content. The message should contain ONLY the offer above and nothing else. Wait for the user's response before continuing. If they decline, proceed with text-only brainstorming.

**Per-question decision:** Even after the user accepts, decide FOR EACH QUESTION whether to use the browser or the terminal. The test: **would the user understand this better by seeing it than reading it?**

- **Use the browser** for content that IS visual вҖ” mockups, wireframes, layout comparisons, architecture diagrams, side-by-side visual designs
- **Use the terminal** for content that is text вҖ” requirements questions, conceptual choices, tradeoff lists, A/B/C/D text options, scope decisions

A question about a UI topic is not automatically a visual question. "What does personality mean in this context?" is a conceptual question вҖ” use the terminal. "Which wizard layout works better?" is a visual question вҖ” use the browser.

If they agree to the companion, read the detailed guide before proceeding:
`skills/brainstorming/visual-companion.md`

````

   421	        var targetType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(clrType) ?? clrType;
   422	        return valueType switch
   423	        {
   424	            DataValueType.String => targetType == typeof(string),
   425	            DataValueType.StringArray => targetType == typeof(string[]),
   426	            DataValueType.Int => targetType == typeof(int),
   427	            DataValueType.Float => targetType == typeof(float),
   428	            DataValueType.Double => targetType == typeof(double),
   429	            DataValueType.Bool => targetType == typeof(bool),
   430	            DataValueType.Vector2 => targetType == typeof(System.Numerics.Vector2) || IsGodotVector2Type(targetType),
   431	            DataValueType.Enum => targetType == typeof(string) || targetType.IsEnum,
   432	            DataValueType.ModifierList => targetType == typeof(FeatureModifierEntryData[]),
   433	            DataValueType.ObjectRef => targetType == typeof(ResourceRef) || (!targetType.IsValueType && targetType != typeof(string)),
   434	            _ => false
   435	        };
   436	    }
   437	
   438	    /// <summary>
   439	    /// жҢү descriptor еҖјзұ»еһӢдёҘж јиҪ¬жҚўиҫ“е…ҘеҖјгҖӮ
   440	    /// </summary>
   441	    /// <param name="rawValue">еҺҹе§Ӣиҫ“е…ҘеҖјгҖӮ</param>
   442	    /// <param name="valueType">descriptor еҖјзұ»еһӢгҖӮ</param>
   443	    /// <param name="convertedValue">иҪ¬жҚўеҗҺзҡ„еҖјгҖӮ</param>
   444	    /// <param name="error">еӨұиҙҘеҺҹеӣ гҖӮ</param>
   445	    public static bool TryConvert(object? rawValue, DataValueType valueType, out object? convertedValue, out string error)
   446	    {
   447	        convertedValue = null;
   448	        error = string.Empty;
   449	        if (rawValue == null)
   450	        {
   451	            return true;
   452	        }
   453	
   454	        try
   455	        {
   456	            convertedValue = valueType switch
   457	            {
   458	                DataValueType.String => ConvertString(rawValue),
   459	                DataValueType.StringArray => ConvertStringArray(rawValue),
   460	                DataValueType.Int => ConvertInt(rawValue),
   461	                DataValueType.Float => ConvertFloat(rawValue),
   462	                DataValueType.Double => ConvertDouble(rawValue),
   463	                DataValueType.Bool => ConvertBool(rawValue),
   464	                DataValueType.Vector2 => ConvertVector2(rawValue),
   465	                DataValueType.Enum => ConvertEnum(rawValue),
   466	                DataValueType.ModifierList => ConvertModifierList(rawValue),
   467	                DataValueType.ObjectRef => ConvertObjectRef(rawValue),
   468	                _ => throw new InvalidOperationException($"жңӘзҹҘ DataValueTypeпјҡ{valueType}")
   469	            };
   470	            return true;
   471	        }
   472	        catch (Exception ex) when (ex is FormatException or InvalidCastException or OverflowException or InvalidOperationException)
   473	        {
   474	            error = ex.Message;
   475	            return false;
   476	        }
   477	    }
   478	
   479	    /// <summary>
   480	    /// жү§иЎҢ write/range/allowed_values зӯ–з•Ҙе№¶иҫ“еҮәжңҖз»ҲеҶҷе…ҘеҖјгҖӮ
   481	    /// </summary>
   482	    /// <param name="definition">еӯ—ж®ө descriptor е®ҡд№үгҖӮ</param>

   486	    /// <param name="error">еӨұиҙҘеҺҹеӣ гҖӮ</param>
   487	    public static bool TryApplyWritePolicies(
   488	        DataDefinition definition,
   489	        object? rawValue,

   491	        out object? finalValue,

   499	    /// <summary>
   500	    /// жү§иЎҢ write/range/allowed_values зӯ–з•ҘпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәз»“жһ„еҢ–й”ҷиҜҜгҖӮ

   507	    public static bool TryApplyWritePoliciesWithReport(
   508	        DataDefinition definition,
   509	        object? rawValue,

   527	        }

   529	        if (RequiresRuntimeObjectReference(definition) && rawValue is string or ResourceRef)

   535	                source,
   536	                rawValue,
   537	                null,
   538	                definition.RuntimeTypeId);
   539	            return false;
   540	        }

   542	        if (!TryConvert(rawValue, definition.ValueType, out var convertedValue, out var error))
   543	        {
   544	            writeError = CreateWriteError(
   545	                definition,
   546	                "wrong_clr_type",
   547	                $"Data value type дёҚеҢ№й…Қпјҡ{definition.StableKey} ({definition.ValueType}) {error}",
   548	                source,
   549	                rawValue,
   550	                null);
   551	            return false;
   552	        }
   553	
   554	        if (RequiresRuntimeObjectReference(definition) && !MatchesRuntimeObjectReference(definition, convertedValue))
   555	        {
   556	            writeError = CreateWriteError(
   557	                definition,
   558	                "wrong_clr_type",
   559	                $"Data object_ref иҝҗиЎҢж—¶еҜ№иұЎзұ»еһӢдёҚеҢ№й…Қпјҡ{definition.StableKey} expected={definition.RuntimeTypeId}",
   560	                source,
   561	                rawValue,
   562	                null,
   563	                definition.RuntimeTypeId);
   564	            return false;
   565	        }
   566	
   567	        if (!IsAllowedValue(definition, convertedValue))
   568	        {
   569	            writeError = CreateWriteError(
   570	                definition,
   571	                "allowed_values_rejected",
   572	                $"Data allowed_values жӢ’з»қеҶҷе…Ҙпјҡ{definition.StableKey} = {ToStableText(convertedValue)}",
   573	                source,
   574	                rawValue,
   575	                "allowed_values");
   576	            return false;
   577	        }
   578	
   579	        if (!TryApplyRangePolicy(definition, convertedValue, source, out finalValue, out var rangeError))
   580	        {
   581	            writeError = CreateWriteError(
   582	                definition,
   583	                "range_policy_rejected",
   584	                rangeError,
   585	                source,
   586	                rawValue,
   587	                definition.RangePolicy.ToString());
   588	            return false;
   589	        }
   590	
   591	        return true;
   592	    }
   593	
   594	    private static DataWriteError CreateWriteError(
   595	        DataDefinition definition,
   596	        string code,
   597	        string message,
   598	        DataWriteSource source,
   599	        object? rawValue,
   600	        string? policy,
   601	        string? expectedTypeOverride = null)
   602	    {
   603	        return new DataWriteError(
   604	            code,
   605	            definition.StableKey,
   606	            message,
   607	            source,
   608	            expectedTypeOverride ?? definition.ValueType.ToString(),
   609	            rawValue?.GetType().Name,
   610	            policy,
   611	            ToStableText(rawValue));
   612	    }
   613	
   614	    private static bool CanWrite(DataWritePolicy policy, DataWriteSource source)
   615	    {
   616	        return policy switch
   617	        {
   618	            DataWritePolicy.ReadWrite => true,
   619	            DataWritePolicy.LoaderOnly => source == DataWriteSource.Loader,
   620	            DataWritePolicy.SystemOnly => source == DataWriteSource.System || source == DataWriteSource.Loader,
   621	            DataWritePolicy.ComputedReadonly => false,
   622	            DataWritePolicy.DebugOnly => source == DataWriteSource.Debug,
   623	            _ => false
   624	        };
   625	    }
   626	
   627	    private static bool TryApplyRangePolicy(
   628	        DataDefinition definition,
   629	        object? convertedValue,
   630	        DataWriteSource source,
   631	        out object? finalValue,
   632	        out string error)
   633	    {
   634	        finalValue = convertedValue;
   635	        error = string.Empty;
   636	        if (definition.RangePolicy == DataRangePolicy.None || convertedValue == null)
   637	        {
   638	            return true;
   639	        }
   640	
   641	        if (!TryGetNumeric(convertedValue, out var numericValue))
   642	        {
   643	            error = $"Data range policy д»…ж”ҜжҢҒж•°еҖјеӯ—ж®өпјҡ{definition.StableKey}";
   644	            return false;
   645	        }
   646	
   647	        var hasMin = definition.MinValue.HasValue;
   648	        var hasMax = definition.MaxValue.HasValue;
   649	        var min = definition.MinValue ?? numericValue;
   650	        var max = definition.MaxValue ?? numericValue;
   651	        var outOfRange = (hasMin && numericValue < min) || (hasMax && numericValue > max);
   652	        if (!outOfRange)
   653	        {
   654	            return true;
   655	        }
   656	
   657	        if (definition.RangePolicy == DataRangePolicy.ClampRuntime && source == DataWriteSource.Runtime)
   658	        {
   659	            var clamped = Math.Min(Math.Max(numericValue, min), max);
   660	            finalValue = ConvertNumericToOriginalType(clamped, convertedValue.GetType());
   661	            return true;
   662	        }
   663	
   664	        error = $"Data range policy жӢ’з»қеҶҷе…Ҙпјҡ{definition.StableKey} = {numericValue.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)}";
   665	        return false;
   666	    }
   667	
   668	    private static bool IsAllowedValue(DataDefinition definition, object? convertedValue)
   669	    {
   670	        if (definition.AllowedValues.Count == 0)
   671	        {
   672	            return true;
   673	        }
   674	
   675	        var stableValue = ToStableText(convertedValue);
   676	        for (var i = 0; i < definition.AllowedValues.Count; i++)
   677	        {
   678	            if (string.Equals(definition.AllowedValues[i].Value, stableValue, StringComparison.Ordinal))
   679	            {
   680	                return true;
   681	            }
   682	        }
   683	
   684	        return false;
   685	    }
   686	
   687	    private static string ToStableText(object? value)
   688	    {
   689	        return value switch
   690	        {
   691	            null => string.Empty,
   692	            bool boolValue => boolValue ? "true" : "false",
   693	            float floatValue => floatValue.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
   694	            double doubleValue => doubleValue.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
   695	            int intValue => intValue.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
   696	            string[] arrayValue => string.Join(",", arrayValue),
   697	            _ => Convert.ToString(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) ?? string.Empty
   698	        };
   699	    }
   700	
   701	    private static object ConvertString(object rawValue)
   702	    {
   703	        return rawValue is string text
   704	            ? text
   705	            : throw new InvalidCastException($"жңҹжңӣ stringпјҢе®һйҷ… {rawValue.GetType().Name}");
   706	    }

numericValue;\n+        var max = definition.MaxValue ?? numericValue;\n+        var outOfRange = (hasMin && numericValue < min) || (hasMax && numericValue > max);\n+        if (!outOfRange)\n+        {\n+            return true;\n+        }\n+\n+        if (definition.RangePolicy == DataRangePolicy.ClampRuntime && source == DataWriteSource.Runtime)\n+        {\n+            var clamped = Math.Min(Math.Max(numericValue, min), max);\n+            finalValue = ConvertNumericToTyped<T>(clamped);\n+            return true;\n+        }\n+\n+        error = $\"Data range policy жӢ’з»қеҶҷе…Ҙпјҡ{definition.StableKey} = {numericValue.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)}\";\n+        return false;\n+    }\n@@\n     private static bool IsAllowedValue(DataDefinition definition, object? convertedValue)\n     {\n         if (definition.AllowedValues.Count == 0)\n@@\n \n         return false;\n     }\n+\n+    private static bool IsAllowedValue<T>(DataDefinition definition, T convertedValue)\n+    {\n+        if (definition.AllowedValues.Count == 0)\n+        {\n+            return true;\n+        }\n+\n+        var stableValue = ToStableText(convertedValue);\n+        for (var i = 0; i < definition.AllowedValues.Count; i++)\n+        {\n+            if (string.Equals(definition.AllowedValues[i].Value, stableValue, StringComparison.Ordinal))\n+            {\n+                return true;\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        return false;\n+    }\n*** End Patch\n"
}

  "name": "apply_patch",
  "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/DataRuntimeStorage.cs\n@@\n     private static bool TryGetNumeric(object value, out double numericValue)\n     {\n         switch (value)\n@@\n         }\n     }\n+\n+    private static bool TryGetNumeric<T>(T value, out double numericValue)\n+    {\n+        switch (value)\n+        {\n+            case int intValue:\n+                numericValue = intValue;\n+                return true;\n+            case float floatValue:\n+                numericValue = floatValue;\n+                return true;\n+            case double doubleValue:\n+                numericValue = doubleValue;\n+                return true;\n+            default:\n+                numericValue = 0;\n+                return false;\n+        }\n+    }\n \n     private static object ConvertNumericToOriginalType(double value, Type originalType)\n     {\n@@\n \n         return value;\n     }\n+\n+    private static T ConvertNumericToTyped<T>(double value)\n+    {\n+        var targetType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(typeof(T)) ?? typeof(T);\n+        if (targetType == typeof(int))\n+        {\n+            return (T)(object)(int)value;\n+        }\n+\n+        if (targetType == typeof(float))\n+        {\n+            return (T)(object)(float)value;\n+        }\n+\n+        return (T)(object)value;\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
}
```

### 000673 agent_message `commentary`

DataRuntime еңәжҷҜе·Із»ҸиҪ¬з»ҝпјҢеҢ…еҗ« typed slotгҖҒmodifierгҖҒcomputedгҖҒruntime object_ref зӯүе…ій”® PASSгҖӮзҺ°еңЁжҲ‘дјҡиЎҘдёҖдёӘ typed range е°ҸжөӢиҜ•пјҢиҰҶзӣ–еҲҡж”¶зҙ§зҡ„ `TryApplyTypedWritePoliciesWithReport<T>` еҲҶж”ҜпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜеҸӘйқ  untyped range ж—§жөӢиҜ•гҖӮ

    52	    private void Data_TypedHotPath_ShouldCreateGenericSlot()
    53	    {
    54	        var storage = CreateRuntimeStorage(Definition("Attribute.BaseHp", DataValueType.Float, 10f));
    55	        var key = new DataKey<float>("Attribute.BaseHp");
    56	
    57	        AssertTrue("typed storage write accepted", storage.Set(key, 20f));
    58	
    59	        var slot = GetRuntimeSlot(storage, "Attribute.BaseHp");
    60	        var slotType = slot.GetType();
    61	        AssertTrue("typed slot is generic", slotType.IsGenericType);
    62	        var genericArgument = slotType.IsGenericType ? slotType.GenericTypeArguments[0] : null;
    63	        AssertEqual("typed slot generic argument", typeof(float), genericArgument);
    64	
    65	        var valueClrType = slotType.GetProperty("ValueClrType", BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Instance)?.GetValue(slot);
    66	        AssertEqual("typed slot reports value clr type", typeof(float), valueClrType);
    67	    }

    82	
    83	    private void Data_WriteDiagnostics_ShouldReportFailureCodes()
    84	    {
    85	        var storage = CreateRuntimeStorage(
    86	            Definition("Attribute.BaseHp", DataValueType.Float, 10f),
    87	            Definition("Attribute.LoaderOnly", DataValueType.Float, 0f, writePolicy: DataWritePolicy.LoaderOnly),
    88	            Definition("Attribute.RejectRange", DataValueType.Float, 0f, minValue: 0f, maxValue: 100f, rangePolicy: DataRangePolicy.RejectRuntime),
    89	            Definition("Attribute.Computed", DataValueType.Float, 0f, writePolicy: DataWritePolicy.ComputedReadonly),
    90	            Definition("Unit.Name", DataValueType.String, "Slime"));
    91	
    92	        AssertFalse("diagnostic unknown key rejected", storage.TrySetUntyped("Attribute.Missing", 1f, DataWriteSource.Runtime, out var unknown));
    93	        AssertEqual("diagnostic unknown code", "unknown_key", unknown.Errors[0].Code);
    94	        AssertEqual("diagnostic unknown key", "Attribute.Missing", unknown.Errors[0].StableKey);
    95	
    96	        AssertFalse("diagnostic wrong type rejected", storage.TrySetUntyped("Attribute.BaseHp", "not-float", DataWriteSource.Runtime, out var wrongType));
    97	        AssertEqual("diagnostic wrong type code", "wrong_clr_type", wrongType.Errors[0].Code);
    98	        AssertEqual("diagnostic wrong expected", "Float", wrongType.Errors[0].ExpectedType);
    99	        AssertEqual("diagnostic wrong actual", "String", wrongType.Errors[0].ActualType);
   100	
   101	        AssertFalse("diagnostic loader policy rejected", storage.TrySetUntyped("Attribute.LoaderOnly", 1f, DataWriteSource.Runtime, out var writePolicy));
   102	        AssertEqual("diagnostic write policy code", "write_policy_rejected", writePolicy.Errors[0].Code);
   103	        AssertEqual("diagnostic write policy", "LoaderOnly", writePolicy.Errors[0].Policy);
   104	
   105	        AssertFalse("diagnostic range rejected", storage.TrySetUntyped("Attribute.RejectRange", 120f, DataWriteSource.Runtime, out var rangePolicy));
   106	        AssertEqual("diagnostic range code", "range_policy_rejected", rangePolicy.Errors[0].Code);
   107	        AssertEqual("diagnostic range raw", "120", rangePolicy.Errors[0].RawValue);
   108	
   109	        AssertFalse("diagnostic computed rejected", storage.TrySetUntyped("Attribute.Computed", 1f, DataWriteSource.Runtime, out var computedPolicy));
   110	        AssertEqual("diagnostic computed policy code", "write_policy_rejected", computedPolicy.Errors[0].Code);
   111	        AssertEqual("diagnostic computed policy", "ComputedReadonly", computedPolicy.Errors[0].Policy);
   112	
   113	        AssertFalse("diagnostic modifier rejected", storage.TryAddModifier("Unit.Name", new DataModifier(ModifierType.Additive, 1f, id: "bad"), DataWriteSource.Runtime, out var modifierPolicy));
   114	        AssertEqual("diagnostic modifier code", "modifier_policy_rejected", modifierPolicy.Errors[0].Code);
   115	        AssertEqual("diagnostic modifier policy", "None", modifierPolicy.Errors[0].Policy);
   116	    }
   117	
   118	    private void Data_ReferenceAndArrayContracts_ShouldNormalizeRuntimeTypes()
   119	    {
   120	        var storage = CreateRuntimeStorage(
   121	            Definition("AvailableAnimations", DataValueType.StringArray, Array.Empty<string>()),
   122	            new DataDefinition
   123	            {
   124	                StableKey = "Feature.Modifiers",
   125	                ValueType = DataValueType.ModifierList,
   126	                RuntimeTypeId = "slime.data.Features.FeatureModifierEntryData[]",
   127	                DefaultValue = Array.Empty<FeatureModifierEntryData>(),
   128	                StoragePolicy = DataStoragePolicy.AuthoringBlob,
   129	                WritePolicy = DataWritePolicy.LoaderOnly
   130	            },
   131	            Definition("AbilityIcon", DataValueType.ObjectRef, null),
   132	            new DataDefinition
   133	            {
   134	                StableKey = "TargetNode",
   135	                ValueType = DataValueType.ObjectRef,
   136	                RuntimeTypeId = "Godot.Node2D",
   137	                DefaultValue = null,
   138	                StoragePolicy = DataStoragePolicy.RuntimeOnly,
   139	                WritePolicy = DataWritePolicy.SystemOnly
   140	            });
   141	
   142	        AssertTrue("json string_array accepted", storage.SetUntyped("AvailableAnimations", "[\"idle\",\"run\"]", DataWriteSource.Loader));
   143	        var animations = storage.Get<string[]>("AvailableAnimations");
   144	        AssertEqual("json string_array count", 2, animations.Length);
   145	        AssertEqual("json string_array value", "run", animations[1]);
   146	
   147	        AssertTrue("json modifier_list accepted", storage.SetUntyped("Feature.Modifiers", "[{\"DataKeyName\":\"BaseHp\",\"ModifierType\":0,\"Value\":5,\"Priority\":2}]", DataWriteSource.Loader));
   148	        var modifiers = storage.Get<FeatureModifierEntryData[]>("Feature.Modifiers");
   149	        AssertEqual("json modifier_list count", 1, modifiers.Length);
   150	        AssertEqual("json modifier key", "BaseHp", modifiers[0].DataKeyName);
   151	        AssertEqual("json modifier type", ModifierType.Additive, modifiers[0].ModifierType);
   152	
   153	        AssertTrue("resource ref string accepted", storage.SetUntyped("AbilityIcon", "res://icon.png", DataWriteSource.Loader));
   154	        AssertEqual("resource ref path", "res://icon.png", storage.Get<ResourceRef>("AbilityIcon").Path);
   155	
   156	        using var node = new Node2D();
   157	        AssertFalse("node ref rejects string", storage.TrySetUntyped("TargetNode", "res://bad.tscn", DataWriteSource.System, out var nodeString));
   158	        AssertEqual("node ref string code", "wrong_clr_type", nodeString.Errors[0].Code);
   159	        AssertTrue("node ref accepts node", storage.SetUntyped("TargetNode", node, DataWriteSource.System));
   160	        AssertEqual("node ref value", node, storage.Get<Node2D>("TargetNode"));
   161	    }

   163	    private void Data_Set_ShouldRespectWritePolicy()
   164	    {
   165	        var storage = CreateRuntimeStorage(
   166	            Definition("Attribute.LoaderOnly", DataValueType.Float, 0f, writePolicy: DataWritePolicy.LoaderOnly),
   167	            Definition("Attribute.SystemOnly", DataValueType.Float, 0f, writePolicy: DataWritePolicy.SystemOnly),
   168	            Definition("Attribute.Computed", DataValueType.Float, 0f, writePolicy: DataWritePolicy.ComputedReadonly),
   169	            Definition("Attribute.DebugOnly", DataValueType.Float, 0f, writePolicy: DataWritePolicy.DebugOnly));
   170	
   171	        AssertFalse("loader only rejects runtime", storage.SetUntyped("Attribute.LoaderOnly", 10f, DataWriteSource.Runtime));
   172	        AssertTrue("loader only accepts loader", storage.SetUntyped("Attribute.LoaderOnly", 10f, DataWriteSource.Loader));
   173	        AssertFalse("system only rejects runtime", storage.SetUntyped("Attribute.SystemOnly", 20f, DataWriteSource.Runtime));
   174	        AssertTrue("system only accepts system", storage.SetUntyped("Attribute.SystemOnly", 20f, DataWriteSource.System));
   175	        AssertFalse("computed rejects write", storage.SetUntyped("Attribute.Computed", 30f, DataWriteSource.System));
   176	        AssertFalse("debug only rejects runtime", storage.SetUntyped("Attribute.DebugOnly", 40f, DataWriteSource.Runtime));
   177	        AssertTrue("debug only accepts debug", storage.SetUntyped("Attribute.DebugOnly", 40f, DataWriteSource.Debug));
   178	    }

   180	    private void Data_Set_ShouldApplyRangePolicy()
   181	    {
   182	        var storage = CreateRuntimeStorage(
   183	            Definition("Attribute.Clamp", DataValueType.Float, 0f, minValue: 0f, maxValue: 100f, rangePolicy: DataRangePolicy.ClampRuntime),
   184	            Definition("Attribute.Reject", DataValueType.Float, 0f, minValue: 0f, maxValue: 100f, rangePolicy: DataRangePolicy.RejectRuntime),
   185	            Definition("Attribute.Validate", DataValueType.Float, 0f, minValue: 0f, maxValue: 100f, rangePolicy: DataRangePolicy.Validate));

   207	    private void Data_RemoveAndClear_ShouldReturnDescriptorDefault()
   208	    {

   384	    private static object GetRuntimeSlot(DataRuntimeStorage storage, string stableKey)
   385	    {
   386	        var field = typeof(DataRuntimeStorage).GetField("_slots", BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance)
   387	                    ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("DataRuntimeStorage._slots field not found");
   388	        var slots = field.GetValue(storage) as IDictionary
   389	                    ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("DataRuntimeStorage._slots is not an IDictionary");
   390	        return slots[stableKey] ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data slot not found: {stableKey}");
   391	    }
   392	}

   143	    {
   144	        var registry = new DataComputeRegistry();
   145	        for (var i = 0; i < resolvers.Length; i++)
   146	        {

   148	        }
   149	
   150	        return registry;

   153	    protected RuntimeDataDescriptorDto Descriptor(string stableKey, string valueType, object? defaultValue)
   154	    {
   155	        return new RuntimeDataDescriptorDto
   156	        {
   157	            StableKey = stableKey,
   158	            ValueType = valueType,
   159	            DefaultValue = defaultValue,
   160	            StoragePolicy = "persisted",
   161	            WritePolicy = "read_write",
   162	            RangePolicy = "none",
   163	            ModifierPolicy = "none",
   164	            MigrationPolicy = "default"
   165	        };
   166	    }

   168	    protected DataDefinition Definition(
   169	        string stableKey,
   170	        DataValueType valueType,
   171	        object? defaultValue,
   172	        float? minValue = null,
   173	        float? maxValue = null,
   174	        DataWritePolicy writePolicy = DataWritePolicy.ReadWrite,
   175	        DataRangePolicy rangePolicy = DataRangePolicy.None,
   176	        DataModifierPolicy modifierPolicy = DataModifierPolicy.None,
   177	        IReadOnlyList<DataAllowedValue>? allowedValues = null)
   178	    {
   179	        return new DataDefinition
   180	        {
   181	            StableKey = stableKey,
   182	            ValueType = valueType,
   183	            DefaultValue = defaultValue,
   184	            MinValue = minValue,
   185	            MaxValue = maxValue,
   186	            WritePolicy = writePolicy,
   187	            RangePolicy = rangePolicy,
   188	            ModifierPolicy = modifierPolicy,
   189	            AllowedValues = allowedValues ?? []
   190	        };
   191	    }
   192	
   193	    protected DataRuntimeStorage CreateRuntimeStorage(params DataDefinition[] definitions)
   194	    {
   195	        var catalog = BuildCatalogFromDefinitions(null, definitions);
   196	        return new DataRuntimeStorage(catalog);
   197	    }
   198	
   199	    protected DataDefinitionCatalog BuildCatalogFromDefinitions(DataComputeRegistry? registry, params DataDefinition[] definitions)
   200	    {
   201	        var catalog = new DataDefinitionCatalog();
   202	        if (registry != null)
   203	        {
   204	            catalog.BindComputeRegistry(registry);
   205	        }
   206	
   207	        for (var i = 0; i < definitions.Length; i++)
   208	        {
   209	            catalog.Register(definitions[i]);
   210	        }
   211	
   212	        catalog.ValidateAndBuildIndexes();
   213	        return catalog;
   214	    }
   215	
   216	    protected Data CreateRuntimeDataFromDescriptors(DataComputeRegistry registry, IEnumerable<RuntimeDataDescriptorDto> descriptors)
   217	    {
   218	        var loader = new RuntimeDataSnapshotLoader(registry);
   219	        var catalog = loader.BuildCatalog(descriptors);
   220	        return new Data(catalog);
   221	    }
   222	
   223	    protected string ResolveRepositoryPath(string relativePath)
   224	    {
   225	        var projectRoot = ProjectSettings.GlobalizePath("res://");
   226	        var candidates = new[]
   227	        {
   228	            Path.Combine(projectRoot, relativePath),
   229	            Path.Combine(System.Environment.CurrentDirectory, relativePath),
   230	            Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, relativePath)
   231	        };
   232	
   233	        for (var i = 0; i < candidates.Length; i++)
   234	        {
   235	            var fullPath = Path.GetFullPath(candidates[i]);
   236	            if (File.Exists(fullPath))
   237	            {
   238	                return fullPath;
   239	            }
   240	        }
   241	
   242	        throw new FileNotFoundException($"{relativePath} not found");
   243	    }
   244	
   245	    protected string ResolveDataOsPath(string relativePath)
   246	    {
   247	        return ResolveRepositoryPath(Path.Combine("Data", "DataOS", relativePath));
   248	    }
   249	
   250	    private void Pass(string label)
   251	    {
   252	        _passedCount++;
   253	        GD.Print($"PASS {GetType().Name}.{label}");
   254	    }
   255	
   256	    protected void Fail(string message)
   257	    {
   258	        _failedCount++;
   259	        GD.PushError($"FAIL {GetType().Name}: {message}");
   260	    }

   674	            // йҖҡиҝҮ Entity дәӢд»¶жҖ»зәҝе№ҝж’ӯж•°жҚ®еҸҳжӣҙ
   675	            // дёӢжёёзӣ‘еҗ¬зӨәдҫӢ: 
   676	            // entity.Events.On<GameEventType.Data.PropertyChangedEvent>(GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged, evt => ...);
   677	            _owner.Events.Emit(new GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged(key, oldValue, newValue));
   678	        }
   679	    }
   680	
   681	    private void OnRuntimeDataChanged(DataChangeRecord change)
   682	    {
   683	        NotifyChanged(change.StableKey, change.OldValue, change.NewValue);
   684	    }
   685	
   686	    private static InvalidOperationException CreateUnboundDataException(string key)
   687	    {
   688	        return new InvalidOperationException($"Data е®№еҷЁжңӘз»‘е®ҡ DataDefinitionCatalogпјҢжӢ’з»қи®ҝй—®еӯ—ж®өпјҡ{key}");
   689	    }
   690	
   691	}

   681	    private static DataWriteError CreateWriteError(
   682	        DataDefinition definition,
   683	        string code,
   684	        string message,
   685	        DataWriteSource source,
   686	        object? rawValue,
   687	        string? policy,
   688	        string? expectedTypeOverride = null)
   689	    {
   690	        return new DataWriteError(
   691	            code,
   692	            definition.StableKey,
   693	            message,
   694	            source,
   695	            expectedTypeOverride ?? definition.ValueType.ToString(),
   696	            rawValue?.GetType().Name,
   697	            policy,
   698	            ToStableText(rawValue));
   699	    }
   700	
   701	    private static bool CanWrite(DataWritePolicy policy, DataWriteSource source)
   702	    {
   703	        return policy switch
   704	        {
   705	            DataWritePolicy.ReadWrite => true,
   706	            DataWritePolicy.LoaderOnly => source == DataWriteSource.Loader,
   707	            DataWritePolicy.SystemOnly => source == DataWriteSource.System || source == DataWriteSource.Loader,
   708	            DataWritePolicy.ComputedReadonly => false,
   709	            DataWritePolicy.DebugOnly => source == DataWriteSource.Debug,
   710	            _ => false
   711	        };
   712	    }
   713	
   714	    private static bool TryApplyRangePolicy(
   715	        DataDefinition definition,
   716	        object? convertedValue,
   717	        DataWriteSource source,
   718	        out object? finalValue,
   719	        out string error)
   720	    {
   721	        finalValue = convertedValue;
   722	        error = string.Empty;
   723	        if (definition.RangePolicy == DataRangePolicy.None || convertedValue == null)
   724	        {
   725	            return true;
   726	        }
   727	
   728	        if (!TryGetNumeric(convertedValue, out var numericValue))
   729	        {
   730	            error = $"Data range policy д»…ж”ҜжҢҒж•°еҖјеӯ—ж®өпјҡ{definition.StableKey}";
   731	            return false;
   732	        }
   733	
   734	        var hasMin = definition.MinValue.HasValue;
   735	        var hasMax = definition.MaxValue.HasValue;
   736	        var min = definition.MinValue ?? numericValue;
   737	        var max = definition.MaxValue ?? numericValue;
   738	        var outOfRange = (hasMin && numericValue < min) || (hasMax && numericValue > max);
   739	        if (!outOfRange)
   740	        {
   741	            return true;
   742	        }
   743	
   744	        if (definition.RangePolicy == DataRangePolicy.ClampRuntime && source == DataWriteSource.Runtime)
   745	        {
   746	            var clamped = Math.Min(Math.Max(numericValue, min), max);
   747	            finalValue = ConvertNumericToOriginalType(clamped, convertedValue.GetType());
   748	            return true;
   749	        }
   750	
   751	        error = $"Data range policy жӢ’з»қеҶҷе…Ҙпјҡ{definition.StableKey} = {numericValue.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)}";
   752	        return false;
   753	    }

   780	        if (!outOfRange)

Output:
---
name: ai-config-management
description: дҝ®ж”№ AI е·Ҙе…·й…ҚзҪ®пјҲskillгҖҒruleгҖҒcommandпјүж—¶дҪҝз”ЁгҖӮзЎ®дҝқз»ҹдёҖжәҗдёҖиҮҙгҖҒеҗҢжӯҘжӯЈзЎ®гҖҒдёҚеј•е…Ҙж јејҸжјӮз§»гҖӮ

metadata:

  version: "1.1"
